AP: FedEx board member Steiner is picked to be next USPS postmaster general amid talk of privatization [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/AP_USPS_Privatization.png]
David Steiner, a former CEO of the nation’s largest waste management company who currently serves on the FedEx board of directors, is poised to take over control of the U.S. Postal Service, becoming the nation’s 76th postmaster general.
The announcement of Steiner’s appointment brought heightened concerns from postal unions over possible efforts to privatize the USPS, which the Trump administration has advocated for. The U.S. Postal Service is an independent agency of the federal government and one of a few government agencies explicitly authorized as a public service by the Constitution.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this issue. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you want the U.S. Postal Service privatized?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 5/18/2025
body:
Heidi talks HB1312 with Pastor Chris Goble as RMV exposes Pueblo schools sharing kids’ data without consent
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**May 18, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This week on _[Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_ , I sat down with Pastor Chris Goble of Ridgeline Church to talk about something many of us are feeling—but not enough are saying out loud: **parental rights in Colorado are under attack, and churches can no longer afford to stay silent.**
We discussed the spiritual and cultural fallout of bills like HB25-1312, which [Governor Polis signed quietly behind closed doors late on Friday](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The new law adds “chosen name” and “gender expression” to Colorado’s anti-discrimination code—effectively allowing schools to socially transition children without telling their parents.
Chris was clear: _this isn’t just a political battle—it’s a discipleship issue_. If we don’t take a stand now, we may lose an entire generation to a worldview that separates children from their families, their biology, and their faith.
🎧 LISTEN to the new _Unleashed_ episode: [“Can Faith Save Colorado? Pastor Chris Goble Breaks It Down”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
And while HB1312 is [making headlines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), it's just one part of a much bigger pattern.
Separately, at Rocky Mountain Voice, we’re continuing our deep-dive investigation into the **TRAILS program in Pueblo D70** —a social-emotional learning curriculum that used therapeutic tools like CBT and mindfulness to guide student behavior and identity development, all without parental consent.
Multiple reports show that children's emotional data was shared with political nonprofits, and the program was rolled out with zero transparency or contracts made available to the public.
TRAILS may not be mentioned in the podcast, but it’s a critical piece of the larger story: Who has the final say over your child’s development—parents or the state?
Catch up on the series below: 🔹 [Gimelshteyn: CPAN files federal complaint over D70’s deceptive TRAILS program violating rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) 🔹 [Notarfrancesco: Pueblo D70 Schools handed kids’ emotional data to political NGOs without parental consent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) 🔹 [McWilliams: Social-emotional learning teaches empathy—but through whose lens?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) 🔹 [Notarfrancesco: TRAILS goes beyond SEL—it’s activism wrapped in therapy language](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Whether it’s through quiet legislation or backdoor school programs, the goal is the same: to erode the role of parents and replace it with an ideology.
Colorado parents are waking up—and so are pastors, teachers, and communities across the state. If you haven’t already, I hope you’ll take a few minutes to listen to the episode and share it with others.
This is the defining issue of our time. And we’re going to keep exposing it—every step of the way.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
P.S. Two exciting events happening this week!
🏫 **Support school choice!** Come to the **John Adams Academy Douglas County community meeting** on **May 19th from 5–7 PM** in Highlands Ranch to stand for classical education and parental rights in our schools. Wear red, white, and blue to show support! [Details here »](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

__

Dear Peter,

Trump loyalist and political advisor, Roger Stone, is once again attacking Democrats for speaking out against Trump and his administration — something I’m all too familiar with.

After the January 6th Committee hearings, Roger Stone unleashed disgraceful attacks to try and damage my name and reputation.

_All for speaking the truth and fighting to protect our democracy.

_But I’m committed to standing up to Trump and his allies, as I did on the January 6th Committee and will continue to do in Congress every day.

**I will not be intimidated by Trump and his MAGA cronies** – but just like they did last election, Roger Stone and other Trump allies will try and unseat Democrats like me who continue to speak out.

clean_body: | | | = | | = | Dear Peter, Trump loyalist and political advisor, Roger Stone, is once again attacking Democrats for speaking out against Trump and his administration — something I’m all too familiar with. After the January 6th Committee hearings, Roger Stone unleashed disgraceful attacks to try and damage my name and reputation. All for speaking the truth and fighting to protect our democracy. But I’m committed to standing up to Trump and his allies, as I did on the January 6th Committee and will continue to do in Congress every day. I will not be intimidated by Trump and his MAGA cronies – but just like they did last election, Roger Stone and other Trump allies will try and unseat Democrats like me who continue to speak out. | | = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me in the fight against Trump. Rep. Zoe Lofgren | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/oedRBqD5sThuk4KdtL0KngFn65A0iIkBInCuVtdTx7cmmzQRFAbdGj_B9euMSEEj0IXpYJYLZCjbzju9wxBowEW56AiEdYbaaQ_LSBHu9DU2UZ2TSiHJceZ05_1y7OVuGAlmoit2oPETg_NZxquk3K0WcIbIXjZ8V15TnbfZ3Te9ev6DWx4wokW-A0bRpD8qKq_y84PLzGev5D6uaA1xEob0UksK_FwT47BVvN1yi8tmZdztd-xJg6PccqVgEeAeMCVr_JQTsEXSjASh_-Iw3Tz6qo3jSz3SdOScQq1b_eSM1-C076iBblOZIIT3pZSCAQHkljFvv48Gf_pevtEyTuy4mt1XNMY-g8Tf54cnRQiQ47UeRDW_93nmdes9HXuIHmiXArR77rp52CsJGvJnwOBIWEOOblgIJk6r4MB7sRjjUvwOyHeCrc3CyZqNWVpJTvjZLy1p88Bew6En8J2O7TEGcSRsxgKeQ384pn0ydSPBoCQsL-0dp1-Tzf5ThBOduSkiV85CgeaDoQ/CMRpAcn4-c3aElWzuKkmtIVkf1NV9y6p/9)As a 4th-generation US farmer, this New York Post map ENRAGES ME to my core.
As you read this email, Chinese-owned businesses own and operate massive swaths of American soil.
Including land adjacent to key military facilities!
They're rigging the system, crushing American producers, and leaving our food supply vulnerable to foreign interests.
I'm working to BAN China from buying up our farmland, But to keep fighting, I need reinforcements.[SAVE AMERICAN FARMS
](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ebf49SeyxuKwE6A1QLGrsvM4GQI_MAiPpbnfG6syJlRHnv6-OPrIvO5De5OqhBk1FbrlbzEZuw_h6hahkg98uLFAqsLsFKK5cErPs5dKN1PiwZ01GVlpnrPsJw7LHJ8a26pcZRxDyywXqUpU5DG6cf8KK0CKRzZone4On5dEQVtUJAftealCqQTPYI1DvLca2q_TN5FKF_9KylHe8dCeIKY8ncTsKeKmva25xdSN8C95JqdNqQCbHy9XcO8h6oKklb-BHJWdBe43_gHS5Syyp0bquwBahyyTFM9rsIKJegsWZVQ1-0z71WyVA43pav0M3PyLKTD_fBRMxVCdW1a2SBgucz_zUG4uh7xR0f83I9LxtGzi08Ae86TqtUwGY6BQcL37XDhOeUoErcjmtkbyUro_3MsIOr3kAzafZNAtBCpuSJCI5CFsSfVtZQtOKppC6_8Z8RzyVGXzDIdHsqkbOg-TmXYQnBXsaw0ZJs8ZngKWBw63BBwhyHXrkOWaRUsytIKCKDC2THmchw/M2MbH-yuvXPi6_D0Xi_zSHSLio_4YUMF/9)Why? Because entrenched special interests - and LOTS of campaign cash - are fighting against us.
On top of that, DC elites don't understand where food actually comes from. They treat farmers like we're disposable -- and they're more concerned with protecting foreign profits than preserving American soil.
**That ends NOW.**
I'm going to the front lines of this fight -- to expose the corruption and PUT AMERICAN AGRICULTURE FIRST. But the special interests are already mobilizing against me.
_They want me to shut up.__They don 't want to upset the apple cart with China.__They want to keep the gravy train rolling._
If you care about our food, our farms, and our freedom -- now's the time to show it.[SAVE AMERICAN FARMS
](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/csUzTuCEavwikc7x2ZrFqWNmFMNZLPssIerfXtqGZ081pwgS-4e_aoWk3gWjsyNguNFwd1_J4HlWweDx4a2l6cKYXzUkzkbg2ukdRjXt-hvPZC-0VBviHb4ewVUGS-GWnfRJZnvkdu-Z9WGfPnyAimx4oABCy23tH3Y_eaVb3QlMJEpCgEL88L8LIXEJ9OnqQS0FPv6EXDJCcIMV0Da_L6m9NwAzr7cwj_9xntNzjSBnSUjwuIzXPXR7aKDXGM1lmbosDo4KwzZfTcHXeUv6hGNoVqrEz6lvwU5YW66Xv8TD6zWBYvyW7C5dwNNcdh_SpUsBJBTb-pb9_8FPM8AIsWO8_3bfqiu0pq_neQ5YKD-nWlachJVOd2F2CqU9mdlbTGjOliRgoK0HV3s83EuxPn8gm40NwVjV0Q4tkvyulm0gd51mKouaOib-zG9fEoZgNF2ob1Qd_Ckd9cC1paFV-vTugQpzy9m0n9yYyoDx-TxAGnwEOXiZQKdHV-xTDlpgv9U5Flys6sZav1zaOvP3M115ee_fAnEpIp6h6A/19uW_X-nC1XWXbLL_mO0dDedLXrWRlc2/9)God Bless,[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/H2NCayAdih__KfSUJCcn95SHVdxhBNxBKhwkeR_vA5Fq4GbD_XIVraOdyUKPJ9yp427NpW2HaX8wLo0-2oIRNcmc_DSC2Bo5N0NrKqIGi2mKFaVvXGSkq0TI8sSgOCCYMfEmm9UYAg6D8JXdrzYbZ0Z4uhCaHwWrZgdBtRwqSGI4dwdchwx7YPae87vciLg933WxYRK6_C0rny4VbIF0XIcWEFQmJzE2fOEeWQdekDTYUFqJiBWrvTmdpso_FjDL_qaKMvrhoNexe8RdIfxpnU4iM5HiMB6SHfdJPXQccZ-cBLkGtOZbfTc8oAo_cK7qTFMYXZ_Ic51qh2Wzp_5hnxBX9advElPxYWXqArnrTvzr_QWVM8r-NWduFrYQs14VqEC9rGml26y03lHVHouKev6UfulXCfV8KGqSU6dRd320tzA9GRwMUypHB80HQRhh2M-bLeaSOWI-IOnVOZuz40cfSDDkdYx_Oetp_mWT-2sktqyRTs92XUMG21zLnUqHc_RujtS0OLIpGg/iqz87BtRShh2reaHD4n_iN9U5z9jwLSc/9)Marlin Stutzman

name: Yvette Martinez
subject: I started writing this email and didn’t realize how long it got!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Dear all,
I am so proud of all of the things we accomplished together in 2024. Thanks to early organizing, incredible candidates, and of course the support from folks like you, we flipped three seats from red to blue, held on to every single vulnerable incumbent seat, and even elected a new Democratic senator.
All of that to say: when we work hard, strategize, support our values, and yes, organize — we win .
The best part of my job is getting to build on our success cycle after cycle, recruiting and supporting incredible people, and then seeing the results in advocacy and policy.
We were able to accomplish everything we did in 2024 through our trademark strategy: organizing everywhere and organizing early. We had offices open months earlier than Republicans did. We had organizers out in the field, connecting with and educating voters before operatives thought it was necessary. In many cases, as early as 2023 .
We won some races by the skin of our teeth – which means that if we had fallen short or started even a little later in some districts, we would’ve lost.
We’re prepared to replicate that strategy again for 2026 – now that we have even more vulnerable incumbents to protect. In fact, we’re just prepared to finalize our 2026 targets in the coming weeks, so we know exactly where we’re going to spend our time and resources.
However, how much we have in our war chest is a huge determining factor in how aggressive we can be, how many candidates we can afford to help, and where we can spend the most time.
As we’re preparing to finalize our 2026 targets, would you make a contribution right now towards our efforts? Control of the House is almost entirely dependent on us protecting our seats here in California. And we can only do that with your help!
My personal fundraising link is below. I would be honored to see your gift come in:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may25?refcode=&amount=]
Thank you for everything,
- Yvette Martinez
Executive Director
California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]
And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.cadem.org/p/BZcF64X0Zkie6fv4FEU9PQ2?unsubscribedata=crWhsXzn14YiUShy1Ph99dY5jlDjm9uaMpIJYpRpqR5OMU7B0yfiTaHe3Cvv%2FsxbTbsENMgbfAigZ93RL%2BUyypwQwTQOOdgp6WZultvPObL8dEEdEGaQDGEaxa05jfIuWKKmB674SJYf3CBIiSYdzy%2FNXMlzEs73XRgw9RLAr6nmsLutjvdKZyLMYk6CmdlX9bkuV%2BdEvdy68q2NeljyIiDp%2FKAkB7tDt52NCcL0AbDOekj%2BTcrcXEB1EdQlD2tLk7u%2FrB%2FKorL0wm3fYZAN85ftxMFvqKEY0g9J093T%2BvPIjKHZU4FHLghAOc4kVSAuYSeCeJu6k43KfsHOB8nPDF9A7QwTHb78vu3hk4O274AB8cMhNCzSm7JKE%2FxZE0JENL5UiUcfW3HzGsM9esqk7Zl9Q2D3S0Bb2cBOKnZxOSY%3D .

# **Red Cross and Metro to Provide Nightly Shuttles to Shelters**
---
May 18, 2025
---
| |
---
Metro will begin providing nightly bus pickups at the **SAVE A LOT** in **The Ville** , located on **Natural Bridge**.
Riders will be transported to a designated Red Cross
shelter where shower facilities will be available.
Metro buses will return to transport residents back to
the Save A Lot the following morning.
**RED CROSS VOLUNTEERS ON SITE TO ASSIST**
This service will run **nightly throughout the week**.
While the shelter destination may vary, updated location information will be provided daily by the Red Cross and shared accordingly.
Red Cross has opened three shelters in St. Louis at the following locations:

* **Grace United Methodist Church** , 6199 Waterman Boulevard
* **Friendly Temple Outreach Center** , 6356 Martin Luther King Dr
* **12th & Park Recreation Center**, 1410 S. Tucker Blvd

Emergency Information: [City Emergency Management Agency](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2Bnod7lVbszS3X8MLFgPhOr-2FAIBKXKLxyeWixqWFOmHuRgt0ndkZcsQL2vRnVGL-2BV-2FcbYrbP3yfLVj2U7DbmdhXUcwR-2BfXU1MLY-2Fu9q53Oye3qnWoXMz2qGDY0Zrkpu-2F8EBzQ-3D-3DWGld_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw2cPiIwOku9xLi2ymff01UaATdnPgM89-2FacDkvmUFcRjIJ3UF7VOMGT4q81fozA5UcvcAOpLnjRWLyKFuBhNQ8giN5-2FbQ9UFHl7p1e902HbCRlbV1-2BEtDuTuphh1HgHLse3AfLne9BkuLXrJLxrAJVVyosDLidEOW-2BPj0zCkDzT9nkI5Wu9HGlI0HQLufXQsl5nNW-2BkGWI3U88T0RcSJE1GUcuq40rHbD26Mvqt8T0mF3sMwUfYD-2BVqPfufgAGTn43F5Kx9QD6i90fLxgX3XquoB8B1m6exWLe7mVGNe7E-2B-2BgDUvYw2hqLb51s5wDCV90sc265MYnWhFtHYPvjp2CThLpFA7NJImH1PgThvtMoaqX6-2FGIHf8RunSznQjLRh2iy6V52oE-2BDJFfiCawgTm-2BlXv0egZyhlNUwmYjLJwUx7aJAD3DDKS28lWDahNrEWXl9NaH4w6jAOhTS67R0kX4lGaPP3Q3YXYWQE9BopZCj-2Fhx1VRuyJTcGz-2FqfIug92IYcLX-2BMkZWN7fyLVxMtvgAcroGdG7EyeBlAxaU5uzZ4hLGcWQXC3Ux0XmylECMQqlaCUvHbPeWEMC0SPOKmC9as-2FX5EaCJnRh59voLd889FZgrtCnTidsHrACFDkSD-2FEMuTarfueZtTNI5sdyjk8M-2F76EqOuurIDV3E-2FF1FMVl7DZ12qULQx7ro-2FMLacEq7z7PyB8RzsRxSz0jQU3Qh2wRTHPW2ph-2By5rGRCaC-2Fz1COjIQHdTYKMdsseZGr4MdMRN8A-3D-3D) **About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: 3 things (part 3)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
It’s me again — sharing more updates directly with you on what I’ve been doing to fight back against President Trump, and what you can do too. As always, let me know if you have any feedback, what you like (or what you don’t like), and what you want to see!
3 things I did in the past few weeks to push back against Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and House Republicans:
1. I joined CBFD Indivisible’s monthly meeting , talking about all the ways I’m fighting the Trump Administration and conducting congressional oversight. It was great to answer questions from folks for almost an hour. I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with my constituents whenever I’m home!
2. I participated in the House Armed Services Committee’s markup of part of the Republican majority’s horrific reconciliation bill that adds $150 billion **more** to our defense budget without improving the quality of life of our service members and their families. During the markup, I introduced an amendment to prevent any of that money from being spent on Secretary Hegseth’s rumored ✨makeup studio✨ at the Pentagon (I wish I was joking). Every single Republican on the committee voted against my amendment.
3. I waived onto the Oversight Committee’s DOGE Subcommittee — meaning I temporarily joined the subcommittee to question witnesses at a hearing. MAGA-loving Marjorie Taylor Greene chairs the subcommittee and organized a hearing on...(drumroll, please)...USA Fencing...all as a ruse to yell about trans kids, cozy up closer to Donald Trump, and distract from the Republican majority’s efforts to gut Medicaid. I didn’t want to let MTG’s deranged remarks go unanswered — you can watch my remarks here [https://www.instagram.com/share/_e_JjYNqr] .
3 things you can do to fight back and make a difference in your community:
1. Sign up for the “No Kings Day of Action” [https://www.nokings.org] on June 14 and encourage your friends and neighbors to do the same. Millions showed up across the country on April 5 to stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk — and this march promises to be even bigger. Mark it on your calendars and start organizing your network. If you’re in San Diego, the event starts at 10am at Waterfront Park — I hope to see you there!
2. Call Republican Members of Congress to sign onto Democrats’ discharge petition to protect Medicaid and SNAP. House Democrats have filed a discharge petition to force the Republican majority to consider Rep. Brendan Boyle’s bill, the Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP Act . We only need four Republicans to join us and sign our discharge petition. You can call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 to speak to Republican Members of Congress.
3. Keep showing up. We are five, exhausting months into Trump’s second term. His Administration is tearing at the fabric of our democracy and committing injustices at breakneck speed. But they want us to be tired, to get distracted, and to feel defeated. We have to keep showing up. Keep calling your representatives. Keep participating in town halls. Keep marching in the streets. Keep talking to your neighbors and sharing your stories. It’s more important than you know.
3 pieces of good news:
1. The Supreme Court ruled that the Trump Administration can’t resume deportations under the Alien Enemies Act. This is a big loss for Trump, who has been itching to restart his illegal mass deportations. It isn’t the end of the fight, but it’s still a big deal (and – an added bonus – Trump is furious about the decision)!
2. The Republican majority in the House still can’t get to yes on Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” to gut Medicaid. The Budget Committee met this week and was supposed to advance the massive reconciliation bill that calls for millions of dollars of cuts to Medicaid in order to cut taxes for millionaires and billionaires. But right now, the Republican majority has too many defectors. They’re forcing Members back in at 10pm tonight to try again — but for now, the resistance is holding!
3. A U.S. District Court judge blocked the Trump Administration’s mass layoffs of the federal workforce! The judge sided with unions and advocacy groups that Trump has to seek Congress’s approval to broadly restructure the federal workforce.
Keep fighting, stay positive (as much as you can!), and have a good week!
Warmly,
Sara

clean_body: [] Friends, It’s me again — sharing more updates directly with you on what I’ve been doing to fight back against President Trump, and what you can do too. As always, let me know if you have any feedback, what you like (or what you don’t like), and what you want to see! 3 things I did in the past few weeks to push back against Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and House Republicans: 1. I joined CBFD Indivisible’s monthly meeting , talking about all the ways I’m fighting the Trump Administration and conducting congressional oversight. It was great to answer questions from folks for almost an hour. I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with my constituents whenever I’m home! 2. I participated in the House Armed Services Committee’s markup of part of the Republican majority’s horrific reconciliation bill that adds $150 billion more to our defense budget without improving the quality of life of our service members and their families. During the markup, I introduced an amendment to prevent any of that money from being spent on Secretary Hegseth’s rumored ✨makeup studio✨ at the Pentagon (I wish I was joking). Every single Republican on the committee voted against my amendment. 3. I waived onto the Oversight Committee’s DOGE Subcommittee — meaning I temporarily joined the subcommittee to question witnesses at a hearing. MAGA-loving Marjorie Taylor Greene chairs the subcommittee and organized a hearing on...(drumroll, please)...USA Fencing...all as a ruse to yell about trans kids, cozy up closer to Donald Trump, and distract from the Republican majority’s efforts to gut Medicaid. I didn’t want to let MTG’s deranged remarks go unanswered — you can watch my remarks here [] . 3 things you can do to fight back and make a difference in your community: 1. Sign up for the “No Kings Day of Action” [] on June 14 and encourage your friends and neighbors to do the same. Millions showed up across the country on April 5 to stand up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk — and this march promises to be even bigger. Mark it on your calendars and start organizing your network. If you’re in San Diego, the event starts at 10am at Waterfront Park — I hope to see you there! 2. Call Republican Members of Congress to sign onto Democrats’ discharge petition to protect Medicaid and SNAP. House Democrats have filed a discharge petition to force the Republican majority to consider Rep. Brendan Boyle’s bill, the Hands Off Medicaid and SNAP Act . We only need four Republicans to join us and sign our discharge petition. You can call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 to speak to Republican Members of Congress. 3. Keep showing up. We are five, exhausting months into Trump’s second term. His Administration is tearing at the fabric of our democracy and committing injustices at breakneck speed. But they want us to be tired, to get distracted, and to feel defeated. We have to keep showing up. Keep calling your representatives. Keep participating in town halls. Keep marching in the streets. Keep talking to your neighbors and sharing your stories. It’s more important than you know. 3 pieces of good news: 1. The Supreme Court ruled that the Trump Administration can’t resume deportations under the Alien Enemies Act. This is a big loss for Trump, who has been itching to restart his illegal mass deportations. It isn’t the end of the fight, but it’s still a big deal (and – an added bonus – Trump is furious about the decision)! 2. The Republican majority in the House still can’t get to yes on Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” to gut Medicaid. The Budget Committee met this week and was supposed to advance the massive reconciliation bill that calls for millions of dollars of cuts to Medicaid in order to cut taxes for millionaires and billionaires. But right now, the Republican majority has too many defectors. They’re forcing Members back in at 10pm tonight to try again — but for now, the resistance is holding! 3. A U.S. District Court judge blocked the Trump Administration’s mass layoffs of the federal workforce! The judge sided with unions and advocacy groups that Trump has to seek Congress’s approval to broadly restructure the federal workforce. Keep fighting, stay positive (as much as you can!), and have a good week! name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: The Case for Tariffs: Main Street vs Wall Street
body:
The Case for Tariffs: Main Street vs Wall Street Peter Ohtaki — May 18, 2025 I wrote the November election was Revenge of the Fly-Over States, “The Rust Belt lost manufacturing jobs for over 25 years | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663%26ss_email_id%3D682ab00ec815210800bbc36f%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BCase%2Bfor%2BTariffs%253A%2BMain%2BStreet%2Bvs%2BWall%2BStreet%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-19T04%253A14%253A11Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=l1lV1dEfFFnoROagVNRpNJ1NfsI%3D)
---
|
## The Case for Tariffs: Main Street vs Wall Street
---
Peter Ohtaki — May 18, 2025
---
I wrote the November election was [_Revenge of the Fly-Over States_](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2Frevenge-of-the-fly-over-states%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663%26ss_email_id%3D682ab00ec815210800bbc36f%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BCase%2Bfor%2BTariffs%253A%2BMain%2BStreet%2Bvs%2BWall%2BStreet%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-19T04%253A14%253A11Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=5GDgOnja-OAUKUWgxXFwwz7LNx4%3D), “The Rust Belt lost manufacturing jobs for over 25 years as both parties advocated free global trade. Real income and property values haven’t changed much as a consequence. I’ve seen it every July in western Michigan in my in-laws small town. Small towns nationwide have lost jobs and are angry. It led to the Tea Party over bailouts to Wall Street in 2009. Trump listened in 2016 & MAGA capitalized on that anger. And now it’s grown to half of the country between the coasts - **_derisively called the “fly-over states”_. **
---
|
---
|
#### **Reason 1: One-third of U.S. manufacturing jobs lost since 2000** , shown on NewsNation _Cuomo_ 4/18/25
---
On the Coasts, we are unfamiliar with the long list of plant closures in communities across this country. Silicon Valley, Hollywood and Wall Street have comparative advantage relative to other countries, while manufacturing jobs were lost across Middle America. J.D. Vance’s auto-biography _Hillbilly Elegy_ documents the pain growing up in rural Ohio and the opioid epidemic borne from successive layoffs. Tariffs are encouraging companies to shift manufacturing back to the U.S. Apple and Nvidia have each pledged $500 billion for manufacturing here but it’ll take 2 years to build new plants. Bringing auto and aviation parts manufacturing back to the Midwest may take longer. Every new manufacturing job will create another 1.7 service jobs. Exports will grow after an initial disruption as trade deals are negotiated and encourage US exports to countries who do not retaliate.
#### **Reason 2:**[**China undervalues its currency 25-40%**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fusw.org%2Fpress-release%2Flabeling-chinas-currency-undervalued-correct-usw-calls-for-more-action%2F%23%3A%7E%3Atext%3DChina%2520undervalues%2520its%2520currency%2520by%2Cmuch%2520as%252040%2520percent%2520overpriced.&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=hduBTzQ-N-mdq68_woNNZCzTrzo%3D)**to make it’s exports cheaper**
Most economists say tariffs are protectionist - protecting less efficient domestic industries. But China, for example, doesn’t compete on the same terms - for decades, China has undervalued their currency (yuan), some say by 40% relative to the dollar when calculated on purchasing-power-parity, so imports from China seem cheap. China also keeps U.S. industries from competing in their market, restricting our exports there, so now the U.S. trade deficit with China has grown to nearly $300 billion in 2024. On top of this China steals our industrial secrets (intellectual property) through espionage and hacking. **And decades of trade deficits means China owns much of our national debt.**
---
|
---
| [_The Wall Street Journal,_](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wsj.com%2Feconomy%2Ftrade%2Fus-trade-import-export-deficit-charts-490a7bce&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=BkDER8Gl2F1TqXnWimnsh59jnJU%3D)March 1, 2025
---
**Wall Street hates tariffs** Wall Street values companies based on profitability (earnings per share), and stocks were priced for perfection in company financial performance. Most assumed tariffs were a negotiating tactic with Mexico and Canada over border security and fentanyl, so Wall Street was surprised by the size and breadth of President Trump’s tariffs. Most Americans are comfortable with “reciprocal” tariffs where we tariff imports from a given country at the same percent as they tariff our exports. Wall Street and our 401(k)s grew steadily with rising stock prices fueled by companies’ profits from reduced costs as offshoring manufacturing to countries with cheap labor, especially China, for retailers like WalMart and Amazon, Apple, auto and appliance manufacturers, private equity and leveraged buyout firms. You may remember Oliver Stone’s movie _Wall Street_ where Gordon Gekko says, “Greed is good.” **Wall Street does not want to see profitable offshore supply chains unwound.** **Inflationary impact will be low** The SF Federal Reserve calculated [**imported products and parts are only 10.6% of our consumption**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.frbsf.org%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2Fel2019-01.pdf&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=DRxmSjecMQmxpXFgl-0nIkSF2xU%3D), since services are virtually entirely domestically sourced. So 20% average tariffs on 10.6% would mean inflation of 2.15%, although I’d expect Americans to shift their spending on products from higher tariff countries (China) to lower tariff countries like India, Chile (fruit) and Vietnam (clothes) or American-made products. I’d expect the Federal Reserve will hold on interest rate cuts until it has a better sense of tariff-induced inflation then start cutting rates before year-end.
#### **Reason 3: Tariffs pay for extending tax cuts**
The Trump administration expects $1 trillion in tariffs over next year, which will enable extending his tax cuts from his first term. The [Congressional Budget Office and Joint Committee on Taxaction (JCT) estimates](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftaxfoundation.org%2Fblog%2Fextending-tcja-economic-model-crowd-out%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=Tf7QVzCL9rWOYHkDa1V1lghONpg%3D) extending the TCJA individual provisions would reduce revenue by $3 trillion from 2025 to 2034. So tariffs pay for the tax cuts in 3 years, after which tariffs can balance the budget deficit and start paying down Federal debt, while GDP grows by .5%/year.

---
**For more on tariffs, my friend Dan Torunian is speaking this Wednesday “** _**10 Things You Need to Know About Tariffs**_**” -**[**to register for this luncheon**](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmprwf.com%2Fmeetings-and-events%23upcoming-events&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=IRoCMJ3tTzwnunNtFAtoMUY6f9k%3D)[View](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=682ab00ec815210800bbc36f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663%26ss_email_id%3D682ab00ec815210800bbc36f%26ss_campaign_name%3DThe%2BCase%2Bfor%2BTariffs%253A%2BMain%2BStreet%2Bvs%2BWall%2BStreet%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-05-19T04%253A14%253A11Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_6818448dfe3c3e2f50342663&l=en-US&s=JIS448AzXhg5m33rx1OQ0xpFhvM%3D)

Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth.

| | |
# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

subject: Join the tradition! Lincoln-Reagan Reception Thurs May 29

body:
Support candidates down ballot..
| | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jb2NUuhFHW93spknfMNGN1utjQHFUD3BScDcI3yg13KR20-ZH9GXj0BG97Kh8-efUpliMw9ITTRQmvu_bJzlIyJaQQwUbPn2g3XIYOxhEDRVMO2H_fzlM_OxmDHs15q0F2DjxlC9ttFU_ito4GKt5w==&c=bWQwoTEMbC0IXqyWcHuWNtgesw0Hyo49pzhz6DFESONj_NFuRDCEuw==&ch=Hrmx-oFKuODfcx8fig7VVp7d9cTANTbD1kL9izpo1GSTbVXaz-NTww==)

Hello Peter,
I wanted to make sure you received your personal invitation to attend this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception on Thursday, May 29 in Boston!
The MassGOP's Annual Lincoln-Reagan Reception is a long-standing tradition in Massachusetts that Former Governor Charlie Baker and Lt. Gov. Karyn Polito have participated in for more than a decade!
Please, join the tradition this year and help support candidates down the ballot.
Last year's event proved particularly impactful: funds raised enabled the MassGOP to navigate a challenging presidential election year in a deep blue state and achieve a historic victory in the 2024 Massachusetts State Legislature races. Defending all incumbent seats and adding five new Republicans, the party achieved a remarkable gain unseen since 1984.
In just three weeks, the party has the opportunity to keep that winning momentum with Taunton City Councilor Larry Quintal in his race for State Rep on June 10th.
Your invitation to this year's Lincoln-Reagan Reception is below with all of the details.
Please RSVP to [finance@massgop.com](mailto:finance@massgop.com) or [online here](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jb2NUuhFHW93spknfMNGN1utjQHFUD3BScDcI3yg13KR20-ZH9GXjwf1a_1jX3TiDWHNY1YshgdGacjagK4Pn_VAkuyOtbBRi1BU7BF33V7_F93pZle51Df0EmzbgX8F4HGM2wMZxjolb9xD6Gs5ElfmB2Iz6CvQGTFg5U1CFhesMcXRUfQJkjGv4jB5CP1tDQdbKWk8jkFdtLZBf9P4Hg==&c=bWQwoTEMbC0IXqyWcHuWNtgesw0Hyo49pzhz6DFESONj_NFuRDCEuw==&ch=Hrmx-oFKuODfcx8fig7VVp7d9cTANTbD1kL9izpo1GSTbVXaz-NTww==).
See you on the 29th!
Kind regards, Amy
Amy Carnevale Chair, Massachusetts Republican Party

body:
Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth.

| | |
# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---

name: The Flyover
subject: Biden's Cancer Diagnosis, American Nutella, and a One-Hit Wonder
body:
Former President Joe Biden, 82, has been diagnosed with an [aggressive form of prostate cancer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD0O3CAQhU-DO1Z48G9Bkcbdpk1pjc1gE2GwYLKrvX3E5ghpppmnT-97v57rE33w8fiJFxl2aY30LoGYKa-btxTLjnGnbD0eMRVf8KK8goJeql6282rRh8_aNdY4IiDdkGnHbhy6CWZoTrNNOJLb9A5D33c4Dlb1egPtSI0wD23jTaWpvp3V3LdaPVpwGodOTxMO2rlRdIqs55Qfv5OPfJILn_Si_NjT1QRzMt9F6B8CFgFL_NypcH0JWCpYwKLqaScBy58iq5-AxaV8UZZ3plItWX5l5YlF4nFkKsW_SN45FUYm-W8EySfyN1PuTGglJ3n6IrcUqUKbbOz99iH4MtTax4U-fGvyf237MvA3AAD__-1IjfY) that has spread to his bones, his office confirmed Sunday.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc-K2zAQxp9GvsXYkuzYBx9Cg9hDd6HQ3W1PZlYaKVP0J5WUhH374hDoA-z1-zHfzI95f16fgTxF9wIBl2rTGvFWPNaKef0gg7FoiBqzIXAxFSoQMK-848OuG3b9vBog_7nKxiwWkaNocOn3cj_Kic-8OS3ThxBC9lpL7GY52cF2I3AAkMPezlI2tGxt3dDP3Tz0omt7bgWMUkwTjMLaPZMdGqopt38SxXpC6z_TFXOrU2j8cqr1XJg4MK4YV46uFF17S9kbnbbLY5uyY1ydwSHjSr2-_Hh7Orw9HRUT6lLDqiGcgVxk4vj6_u2gvv_--YsPjI8bLOmSNTJxfCx9xAENXQITRwxA_hFWzFsE-u-FClVK8QF0ihVj_d-yu4_t7uKSD01ezPlG3lMZN1230bte_dJPrgv_FwAA__8nSaD5) | |
# Monday, May 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1780, candles were lit at noon as an [eerie darkness fell over parts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwZstfGBsDwxdvKVrR-sCR3wthghQorx9lb5Cl2_8ftL_67JfkCOn2yeeZFvIe6JnjdQalf3KnlJ1mBwVz3hLuXLFk8oOEqZeTv247h45vnbdeRuIgFRHdpz1bPQCK3SHXeb1Kg3gvDrtggFUuM5OSz2FicyVOrbvNzmNq1ynUclhhKDQaLUsaFQIs9CSPLdchu_MqR0U4is_qAwun120R2v3KtSHgE3AdnBtubDje32yO4ZETcAGEpSATU7vMQI2j-Wn9_jqx3mRArauWH9_coxczRu8ncjxD2j_qvKw8BsAAP__G7BzFQ) of New England and southeastern Canada. The cause remains uncertain, but the leading theory points to a mix of forest fire smoke, dense fog, and thick cloud cover. In its final run at Baltimore’s Pimlico Race Course before a major renovation, the Preakness got a fitting headline: a horse named _Journalism_ surged from behind to win the 150th running. Take a look at [the photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQheHTQLfIHhsDhYs0223alGgWj2ESYyPbWrS3j8gV0j99T_q_HvMDOXBcP3EnW32aI50lUK2U5yc7imXBuFB2jGtMhQvulGcQ0N9Ef5PT7JDDe9ats54ISLVk5aAHo0eYoN2sceCByPl-lBpAGjJyeDqhafKDWkzL9tJELycx9VKJToJXaLQaRzTK-6HRghzXlLvvxLFu5MM7vSh3S9rbYLdaj9KojwbuDdzP8-yOTPgTqZRr0cD92FJNtxVDoPxuQGVcOK5ttu44OQQu5vpYd-TwZ9Z_hXhZ-A0AAP__0XxyQQ) and watch a nail-biting video in _Sports_. ## Biden Diagnosed with Advanced Prostate Cancer
Former President Biden, 82, has been diagnosed with an [aggressive form of prostate cancer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD0O3CAQhU-DO1Z48G9Bkcbdpk1pjc1gE2GwYLKrvX3E5ghpppmnT-97v57rE33w8fiJFxl2aY30LoGYKa-btxTLjnGnbD0eMRVf8KK8goJeql6282rRh8_aNdY4IiDdkGnHbhy6CWZoTrNNOJLb9A5D33c4Dlb1egPtSI0wD23jTaWpvp3V3LdaPVpwGodOTxMO2rlRdIqs55Qfv5OPfJILn_Si_NjT1QRzMt9F6B8CFgFL_NypcH0JWCpYwKLqaScBy58iq5-AxaV8UZZ3plItWX5l5YlF4nFkKsW_SN45FUYm-W8EySfyN1PuTGglJ3n6IrcUqUKbbOz99iH4MtTax4U-fGvyf237MvA3AAD__-1IjfY) that has spread to his bones, his office confirmed Sunday. The cancer was discovered after he [reported worsening urinary symptoms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAQhp9GOwwMIlpQ3MZub3tLgzLszgbBAFmzb3_jnpPzAqedP5l83_fvttwsBYr3v3ZHU31aIp4lYK2Yl5UcxrLZuGF2ZO8xFSp2x7wAB8W4YmJanKXwXvrWGY8IKFs0Qvd66EeYoH0YhSA0aKfAWetXXEE6UKNzXEjkTrRkrm9ciYlPSkjeCfDSDr0cRztI73XTc3RUU-6eiWJ9oA_v9MLcbWlvg3nUepRG_mlgbmA-z7OL63ZZXHsD85ECVdpKA_MzIftINTD7lHfM7MhYrktlPyP7dkXHjpxKtRXZVwSWt2iBa6VFm407TgqBynAR3ndL4UNUf5XxZeB_AAAA__-Icoiq), prompting further evaluation that revealed a high-grade tumor (Gleason score 9). While the disease is considered serious due to its metastasis, it is hormone-sensitive, allowing for potentially effective treatment options. Biden and his family are currently reviewing those options with his medical team. President Trump [expressed condolences](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGuozAQBdCvMR2RGRsTChfb0GXbLdEQD2FWxkb2bKL8_Yo86f3Aq0eae8_9c5tvyJHT4zfu5GXNc6JXjSRCZV44UKp3THcqgfGRcuWKO5UZNPSt7ttunANyfM-2CX4lAjIN-W6wg7NXGKHZ_EjQB2dtWHAIwTlCWJcFdHAWjF10w_78pvtu1GPfGX3pYDXorLle0Zl1HZTVFFhyufzNnGSjNb7zk8rlnvcm-k3kqMr8UjApmGSjjWM8bwqmLe90ghRMGHZOXKWgcE4Kpt5oN5ixlfJvP9qPtT1KroJC7Re6_VYrmJriw_HiGLm6s9NjR_7kNPKj4Z4e_gcAAP__2DODIg) and wished Biden "a fast and successful recovery" in a Truth Social post.
## Mexican Ship Hits Brooklyn Bridge
A tall Mexican Navy ship on a goodwill tour [crashed into the Brooklyn Bridge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3y3SAMxE-DO78B4c-CIg3dP21Kj2yErQTDGyDP8e0zzhXSSM3O7m_3x9fyhRw47t_xJFN9WiJdJVCtlJeVHcWyYdwoO8Y9psIFT8oLSOhb2bdqXhxyuJeuccYTAemGjBq7cegmmKE5DAzd2MtOSo1ee0XroLxe1eb0qJVH2bB53GSvZjn3SsuXAq9x6PQ04aC9H0UnyXFN-fUzcawH-XCnD-XXls4mmKPWdxH6mwArwF7X9fpdsCaH9yMQYEtN-RZgn2bPw8opCrBPrAArn6MmAfakP7xhbMvB7_bKKe7thXe75pR-hTu2a2a3U7tlLIcAO-lRzkOnpRwF2CYb9744BC7Dg7yfyOEfYv2vXT8G_gYAAP__pLuJnw) in New York Saturday night after losing power and sailing the wrong way, killing two crew members and injuring 22. The _Cuauhtémoc_ , carrying 277 aboard, mostly cadets, was supposed to head south [toward Iceland but drifted north instead](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ_GdHtkG8xP4SIN3U2bEi14DZsYG9k-94i3j8grpJlmpE_fzK-v5Qs5cNx_4km2-rRE-pRAtVJeVnYUy4Zxo-wY95gKFzwpL1pqA9KAmhaHHO6la5z1RJrahqwauqHvRj3p5rBDi86bnpSUozHeTasyckKHA5HxfmrYPjRp1CQno1r5Utq32HftOGLfej-ITpLjmvLrd-JYD_LhTt-UX1s6m2CPWq8i2h9Cz0LP8b5SqU8l9PyAhZ7lE2oQen4XePYJPZeDL9gw55vjDlpKuChdgeDgWqAeBGtO6U-4I6yZ3U6ABQph3g7A6CBT2d4E6aKMlVOEd3SUP3gLPTfZuuvDIXDpH_v9RA7_bOt_Xfxt9d8AAAD__yxmkLQ), its 147-foot masts colliding with the bridge’s 135-foot clearance around 8:20 p.m. Terrifying footage shows sailors dangling from rigging as the masts sheared off. [See the video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQRE8jdRb4EWWpYJFGndOmJNbkrr0BRRokYdk5faBcId0AA7zBvK-LuwBHTrdP2NA2yi7hXiO2hsVdOWCqHpLHEhhuKVeusGFxSihzEuYkFxeA49uNfbCEqFD3aOV5PE_jrBbV3y2KUZuFJJD2YRZ-IjAU9IQSYSGSPduDJoxcxGKkFoNUpGEa9TzDpInO3SgwcMtl-M6c2h0pvvMTy-Dz1kd7b-1RO_3RqbVT677vw_Xqj65T63GmU-uTA-Yj-Mds4kv-vFDkvtjw2DlGrtOxcduA4x-z_UvE06rfAAAA___vQXHe). The Coast Guard says all three masts were destroyed, and the vessel remains moored at Pier 36 under a 50-yard safety zone as salvage plans develop. The National Transportation Safety Board is investigating the incident.
## Nutella Peanut Coming to US in 2026
Nutella is introducing its first new flavor in over 60 years: Nutella Peanut. [See the packaging here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnsTtbMPiLguI26XLbLa2xZ0hmhSEyJChvv8q-wvZHvyP9v67rFSVIvP3Hg13xaY1cc-BS-Fw3IY55x7jzSYK3mLJkPPhcQcHYqbHTdiWU8F6HlpxnBjYtOz0P8zQsYKG9ux1xVhvRsqGdYENLDIybMkxqt9604j6aGrVVdtRG9Rq8wWkwy4KT8X5uBsUkJZ39d5JY7uzDO7347Pd0tMHdS3nkxvxr4NLApdba-5QII1WJ_Nk0cInPwiFg92CMz9JpPRsDk25PR48qIUiePje3AyX8suVPLV4OfgIAAP__3bVzaw). This blend of the classic cocoa-hazelnut spread with roasted peanuts is tailored for American tastes and will hit U.S. shelves in spring 2026. Despite the addition of peanuts, Nutella Peanut is [not intended to replace peanut butter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGngQ5kjz-AwsVt0uW2W6KJPSSzMjaynaC8_Sr7CtsfnZ_0_7quV-TI6f4fd3Jty2uis0Zqjcp640CpekyeSmC8p1y54k5lBQFmEGaQyxqQ43vVfXAbEZDqyclJT1bPsED_cGAJ7M174yd_k9ZL7xcRjKHZKK1Q9ew-b8LIRSxGKjFK2BRareYZrdq2qdOCArdcxu_MqT1oi-_8ojL6vPfRPVo7aqf-dXDp4HKe54gxFvJ8UP1MOrikZ6MYcTgI07MNmFJ-Jk87pTZIOSmlQPfFhePkGLnaD3nfkeMv0f7U5eXgJwAA__-e5Xcg) but to offer a unique, snack-friendly option. Production will take place at Ferrero's Franklin Park, Illinois facility, which is undergoing a $75 million upgrade to accommodate the new product. This investment is expected to create 65 new jobs.

**➤****Scottie Scheffler** captured his third major title Sunday with a five-shot victory at the PGA Championship in Charlotte, North Carolina. clean_body: Former President Joe Biden, 82, has been diagnosed with an that has spread to his bones, his office confirmed Sunday. | | | | | | Monday, May 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1780, candles were lit at noon as an of New England and southeastern Canada. The cause remains uncertain, but the leading theory points to a mix of forest fire smoke, dense fog, and thick cloud cover. In its final run at Baltimore’s Pimlico Race Course before a major renovation, the Preakness got a fitting headline: a horse named Journalism surged from behind to win the 150th running. Take a look at and watch a nail-biting video in Sports. Today’s edition is brought to you by one of our favorite sponsors: .** This Christian humanitarian organization is delivering critical aid to families in Somalia, where a devastating humanitarian crisis is unfolding. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Biden Diagnosed with Advanced Prostate Cancer Former President Biden, 82, has been diagnosed with an that has spread to his bones, his office confirmed Sunday. The cancer was discovered after he , prompting further evaluation that revealed a high-grade tumor (Gleason score 9). While the disease is considered serious due to its metastasis, it is hormone-sensitive, allowing for potentially effective treatment options. Biden and his family are currently reviewing those options with his medical team. President Trump and wished Biden "a fast and successful recovery" in a Truth Social post. Mexican Ship Hits Brooklyn Bridge A tall Mexican Navy ship on a goodwill tour in New York Saturday night after losing power and sailing the wrong way, killing two crew members and injuring 22. The Cuauhtémoc , carrying 277 aboard, mostly cadets, was supposed to head south , its 147-foot masts colliding with the bridge’s 135-foot clearance around 8:20 p.m. Terrifying footage shows sailors dangling from rigging as the masts sheared off. . The Coast Guard says all three masts were destroyed, and the vessel remains moored at Pier 36 under a 50-yard safety zone as salvage plans develop. The National Transportation Safety Board is investigating the incident. Nutella Peanut Coming to US in 2026 Nutella is introducing its first new flavor in over 60 years: Nutella Peanut. . This blend of the classic cocoa-hazelnut spread with roasted peanuts is tailored for American tastes and will hit U.S. shelves in spring 2026. Despite the addition of peanuts, Nutella Peanut is but to offer a unique, snack-friendly option. Production will take place at Ferrero's Franklin Park, Illinois facility, which is undergoing a $75 million upgrade to accommodate the new product. This investment is expected to create 65 new jobs. () ➤ Also on Meet the Press , former Vice President Mike Pence said that President Trump’s proposed tariffs would be the largest peacetime tax increase in U.S. history and would raise costs for American consumers. () ➤ Trump’s Middle East envoy Steve Witkoff said Sunday he expects a “successful” call between Trump and Putin today ending the war in Ukraine. () ➤ Secretary of State Marco Rubio dismissed a U.S. intelligence assessment that Venezuela’s government doesn’t control the Tren de Aragua gang, insisting instead that the regime exports and cooperates with the group. () | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. And now, children are wasting away from malnutrition, crying themselves to sleep from the sharp hunger pains in their bellies... The situation in Somalia is desperate. People are dying. You might not have known that. There are no news crews there. Yet, it’s one of the largest humanitarian crises in the world today. Millions are at risk of starvation, as the fragile nation teeters on the brink of another famine... . Christian humanitarian organization World Concern is present in Somalia and in the hardest-hit areas around the globe , providing urgently needed food, water, and emergency supplies to families in need in Somalia and in the 9 other countries where World Concern works. . | ➤Scottie Scheffler captured his third major title Sunday with a five-shot victory at the PGA Championship in Charlotte, North Carolina. The world No. 1 battled early pressure from Jon Rahm and a brief tie at the turn, but regained control with steady play on Quail Hollow’s back nine, finishing with an even-par 71. () ➤ Journalism, the racehorse, took home the 150th Preakness Stakes after falling behind by as many as five lengths early in the race. () ➤ Philadelphia Phillies star reliever Jose Alvarado has been handed an 80-game suspension from MLB for violating the league's policy on performance-enhancing drugs. () ➤ Caitlin Clark and Angel Reese reignited their rivalry on Saturday when Clark’s foul on Reese led to a verbal altercation. Clark’s Indiana Fever went on to win the game in blowout fashion, 93-58. () ➤ Yesterday’s results: | | | | | | | | | | ➤ Tech giants OpenAI and Oracle are helping the United Arab Emirates develop what may become the world’s largest data center, covering 10 square miles and using about as much power as five nuclear reactors. () ➤ The guest list for President Trump’s private dinner for top $TRUMP meme coin holders has been finalized. While top holders are effectively anonymous, expert analysis suggests that 19 of the top 25 operate outside of the U.S. () ➤ Ziploc and Newell Brands (the maker of Rubbermaid) are both under new class action lawsuits alleging their plastic containers can release harmful microplastics into food. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Car insurance costs to hit record highs in 2025. With car insurance premiums projected to hit $2,101 in 2025, overpaying isn’t an option. Switching providers could save you $1,300 yearly–don’t leave it on the table. View to see if you could save. | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia faces a crisis from natural disasters, conflict, poverty, and disease. The worst drought in 40 years devastated crops and livestock, while food imports from Russia and Ukraine were halted. Two in five Somali children now suffer from acute malnutrition. Christian humanitarian organization World Concern is present in Somalia and in the hardest-hit areas around the globe , in Somalia and in the 9 other countries where World Concern works. Your generous gift today will deliver: • Emergency nutripackets for malnourished children • Food vouchers so families can eat immediately • Water trucked to remote areas and delivered to thirsty families • Hygiene supplies—soap, buckets, and more, to protect weakened bodies from disease | ➤ Scientists say natural hydrogen trapped underground could power the planet for 170,000 years, offering a massive clean energy source if it can be economically extracted. () ➤ The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved a blood test that could help diagnose Alzheimer’s disease, allowing for more effective treatment plans through early detection. () ➤ A bird expert advises what to do if you find a baby bird out of its nest: If it’s a featherless nestling, put it back in its nest if you can. If it’s a feathered fledgling, leave it alone. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Empty Your Bowels 2x FASTER With THIS Underwater Gut Superfood. Bloated, backed up, and tired of nothing working? Add a pinch of this underwater gut superfood before meals - flush pounds of toxic waste, reboot digestion, and feel lighter fast. Backed by science, proven by thousands. () | Beyond Our Borders is brought to you by: ➤ After a 10-week blockade, Israel says it will allow a “basic amount of food” into Gaza to prevent a starvation crisis. Talks in Qatar to release 58 remaining hostages are deadlocked, with Hamas demanding a permanent cease-fire in exchange, something Israeli leaders have so far rejected. () ➤Pope Leo XIV , the first American to lead the Catholic Church, officially began his papacy Sunday with an inaugural Mass in St. Peter’s Square, attended by 150,000 people, including world leaders and pilgrims. () ➤ Austrian singer JJ took home the title at the 2025 Eurovision Song Contest in Basel, Switzerland. With eccentric themes, cross-continental flair, and plenty of glitter, Eurovision once again delivered spectacle and surprise. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤I don’t mean to alarm you , but if you have hearing problems, you need to see Doctors were stunned by the brain damage caused after just one month of hearing loss. The good news? It’s not permanent and can be reversed—if you act now. to discover the surprising way to restore your hearing health. | ➤Newly released footage shows New Jersey state troopers reacting to a major sinkhole that opened along Interstate 80 near Wharton the day after Christmas 2024. Officials now say two lanes could reopen by May 21, with the full highway expected back in service by June 25. () ➤ An elementary student in England caused a school evacuation on Friday after bringing a World War II hand grenade to show-and-tell. () ➤ Nicole F. name: Lamont McClure
subject: A run for their $$$
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef26f49e-96a1-4550-a71d-762e1a8dafcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, my name is Lamont McClure and I’m running for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District. Before I tell you a bit about myself, [will you chip in any amount to support our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us end Donald Trump’s MAGA majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T556324dd-f4dc-45c3-b236-31bde0bf3fda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd33792d-b2d5-4e34-9ac9-ba6e758a01cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peter, as a lifelong public servant and a born-and-bred Pennsylvanian, I’ve always been committed to advocating for the everyday folks in our community. I know from experience what it means to fight for families like mine that, during some months, lived paycheck to paycheck and spent every dime to put food on the table. Through it all my Mom and Dad taught me that whatever God-given talent I may have, I have an obligation to use it to serve others. As County Executive in Northampton County, I put the needs of hard-working Pennsylvanians above all else. I spearheaded the fight to protect a public nursing home from greedy big business, safeguarded the parks, trails, and open spaces that make Pennsylvania beautiful, and invested in mental health and addiction intervention services to protect the most vulnerable members of our county. And I did it without raising taxes, in fact, I cut taxes for folks across Northampton County. Now, I’m ready to take my three decades of public service to Washington to give D.C. elites a run for their money. Let’s be honest: Donald Trump’s DC is a mess. He and his buddy Elon Musk have unleashed utter chaos on our government, cut millions in funding for essential programs, and undermined our democracy. My Republican opponent, Ryan Mackenzie, has already cozied up to Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda. Pennsylvania deserves better. Peter, I know where I came from, I know whose side I’m on, and I’ll never stop fighting for working people. We’ve got a tough race ahead of us, but I know I can win this thing with folks like you in my corner. [Can I count on you to chip in $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action and help us flip the House blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3d3f5d9-0e2a-4e15-9e39-01e3253e6b31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T921d7dc2-6937-478a-98da-21226077f45b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c588cd2-0627-4f38-9533-9af691fdd388/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb4d8ad6-0009-49fc-b885-f7612396010c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|
---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250519_mcclure_b1_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f41f67a-8b0b-4dcb-a62b-04e31e31d5a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: James Comey called to eliminate President Trump
body:
You need to see what he did >>>

| | | | |
---
**[Disgraced former FBI Director James Comey publicly called for the assassination of President Trump.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, his actions are beyond anything we’ve ever seen from a government official.
In a (now deleted) Instagram post, James Comey called for someone to “86” (slang for kill or eliminate) “47” (the 47th President of the United States, Donald Trump).
The former FBI Director knows that President Trump has faced TWO very public assassination attempts over the last year and he knew that this post would be read as another call to violence.
**This is what the Deep State really looks like.**
But now that the mask is off we must hold Comey accountable.
We must act and show the Swamp that the two tier justice system that shielded them for accountability is being put to an end.
The days of Swamp creatures like James Comey calling for violence and openly conspiring against President Trump without consequences are over.
**_[That’s why I am calling for the immediate arrest of James Comey](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This behavior is nothing new for James Comey. Back in 2016, he plotted a coup against President Trump’s then candidacy and was a primary conspirator in the fake Russia, Russia, Russia hoax.
We now know that he lied to a FISA Court so he could use the full force of the FBI to spy on the Trump campaign and obstruct the votes of the American people.
Comey also cleared President Trump’s opponent, Hillary Clinton, of criminal liability before even interviewing her or key witnesses in the midst of her email scandal.

_**In order to keep Donald Trump out of public office James Comey abused his power at the FBI to protect Hillary Clinton and her political allies while spinning a web of lies to destroy Trump’s campaign.**_
James Comey and his Deep State cronies tried everything to stop President Trump and did not care about how their actions harmed our justice system and weakened our nation’s standing in the world.

**Thankfully, they failed.**
Donald Trump is currently serving his second term as president while James Comey is living in disgrace as a living embodiment of DC corruption.

**But James Comey isn’t handling defeat well and he is done taking measures to hide his schemes from the public.**
The public can see for themselves that our former FBI Director is now openly calling on social media for President Trump to be assassinated.
**_[I drafted a letter calling for the immediate arrest of James Comey and I am asking every patriot reading this message to take action and add their name>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

[ARREST JAMES COMEY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I need your help highlighting this story because we cannot trust the mainstream media to provide accountability. For years our nation’s corrupt liberal media have covered up Comey’s crimes and clear abuse of power.
That’s why it’s up to patriotic Americans like you and I to hold Comey’s feet to the fire.
I am using my platform to make sure James Comey is held accountable. So please, add your name to my petition and make a contribution to my team’s efforts to Drain the Swamp once and for all.
_Your fighter in Congress_ _,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/av3n/?__vbtrk=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkxMTY1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: The Maine Wire
subject: Holy Smokes, Batman: Troy Jackson Is Running for Governor!
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Holy Smokes, Batman: Troy Jackson Is Running for Governor! (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=28efd1a677&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Maine Wire Staff on May 19, 2025 06:57 am
Former Maine Senate president Troy Jackson announced Monday morning that he is officially running for governor and plans to launch his campaign in Kittery at the Portsmouth Naval Shipyard at 11:30 a.m., according to a statement. Mainers, he says, are “under attack from billionaires, special interests, and their friends who control Washington.” Jackson pledged he [...]

The post Holy Smokes, Batman: Troy Jackson Is Running for Governor! name: The Texas Flyover
subject: $3.5B Plant Opens, Most Overpriced Retirement Towns, and a $30,000 Reward
body:
A morning newsletter focused entirely on news from the state of Texas. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEtuwyAURVeDZ7b4mnjAoFKUWTrtEPF5iZHAICC_3VdOq26g03eu3r06X2d9NiGG7fppEqj-vGS9waNF6B2qZsKWaLaeC2wt5dbzHWqpwWmKqRixGMmivQnxpfnglcV-IQMoIrmcBRVkHlblOLdYOmkt5QdB6OKcNR6YXbyRjuAhqP0ZFmQhBBPBpsUJ7IkkjBlviXCIY_Ch5zr1FTo8TbvE175kcjkNUa29l4bYB6InRE9hu0PrU8oeUrYhwp7aETvdetIt36oDxI6QTIiIzvsxgQ-3hNixmODHYmrfoLY1lF_uTComXLd34g-SAx45lvpHA5kxW_jM6GEeqvLlEWIMbZaI4-te9R7b_6f4ruh3AAAA__9_hpBH) | |
# Monday, May 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1910, a [500-pound meteorite](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuynDAURFcjMlH6AgoUOCF7Th1S-lwG2ReJQvIw7N6Ft_Dyru4-59fX8uUSpvz66Xaw7bOWJcNVEVqDc5HaH-hyKwfkupfayhvO40xhEUxoyjTlZoku4b2oLlrPouEdWD6qcdBC86HbrOPKC-2DX9mqjV4HIxzTEwe1ThCk6JJ9ypjmhnPGtexN0CzykUvpouc6EMUgplbOvm3Q4OPqivfzpA9l79BurR2VyB9EzETM13X1DwL9Xf6e2eETImIuR8qpZCLmzSHCXWkoOzTqMEGudE2IEGnbgNY_NxGzO1sKCAvIyYCQnpoJAtUKgE4DizR67ScJiono-63t2J02HldCTHUYiWKv3aX_4137nte3Ff8CAAD__yPUjKk) landed in Delta County during the passage of Halley's Comet. Some residents thought it was an alien spacecraft, recalling rumors of UFO sightings several years earlier. The Houston Texans hosted a high school girls flag football championship this past weekend for more than 80 schools, crowning winners in three divisions. Check out video of the event [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu5CAQBNDT4IwRDcYeBw42cfY33dBqAzYtYbCg98_M7VfeK_y4VKWn-vO1fiElysdvPMPM772sObxaCsyhrsZuV8LM5Qq5naVx-Q71quRWrbSVykqYVo-UPmvf-XlTfoIuzDD242C1haGLs3PgVbD7Piljn88JgnkiWuyf6EY_mI7me0xZmAAUWPOYnFUeRjAG_QbWiV4FT1zqg2Pg8Ma2p88tebhydmmOzFcT5pfQi9ALbg7MnQi9XKWx0EssfxuXLO9ubvKgmprcEx5yL4U3TEm6Wl65SSMjHVE2F0tJ0kU8Lyq5Sa5ImfIhd3SUiD9CLzD0g9IKhF66OvvrRSlRG0bRq-NESv91_LNPv2f9LwAA__9W8oxU). Today's sponsor is [Mode Mobile](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEtuwyAURVeDZ7b4mnjAoFKUWTrtEPF5iZHAICC_3VdOq26g03eu3r06X2d9NiGG7fppEqj-vGS9waNF6B2qZsKWaLaeC2wt5dbzHWqpwWmKqRixGMmivQnxpfnglcV-IQMoIrmcBRVkHlblOLdYOmkt5QdB6OKcNR6YXbyRjuAhqP0ZFmQhBBPBpsUJ7IkkjBlviXCIY_Ch5zr1FTo8TbvE175kcjkNUa29l4bYB6InRE9hu0PrU8oeUrYhwp7aETvdetIt36oDxI6QTIiIzvsxgQ-3hNixmODHYmrfoLY1lF_uTComXLd34g-SAx45lvpHA5kxW_jM6GEeqvLlEWIMbZaI4-te9R7b_6f4ruh3AAAA__9_hpBH), offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity for _The Flyover_ readers.

## GlobalWafers Opens $3.5B Sherman Plant
Taiwanese silicon wafer manufacturer GlobalWafers [opened its $3.5 billion plant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2ypCAQBeCn0QyLBvEnINjEbDbd0GqgGalCsYCdGd_-lvMKN-_qc77z77E-MMRwPP_iTrp-fFoPepdItVJepTJnxKOmk46yp1LTi_KZg10FF4pxxWBeHYZ4rX3rtOFuhpY0jP04KKFgaDc9KaBxnrwESWI2SGZS6AY7mF723Ms26PsZVzADcFCym63iDkaQEp0BZZuekws15a5uVOmDxcfrbtLZtLdRb7WepZF_GrE0YvHhwMNSd-GW0n3RiOUmNWJ5xmQwvtFTLuxrYv8L82hryhe7pYVxCUoKPoluq3tss3bnO8QYyjA2PX_uGOI3tv5urJcWPwEAAP__ye1-hA) in Sherman on Thursday and announced plans for a $4 billion expansion at the 142-acre site. “ _Our U.S. customers appear to have a very strong demand for U.S.-based production capacity_ ,” said GlobalWafers chairperson and CEO Doris Hsu, citing [heightened interest in avoiding tariffs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upSAUhZ8GOww_omNBMY3dnXZKs4HtkQTBwJ7jPW8_0Ve47crKyvq-v1_rF8QU8-sPHGjpeytrxqslJMK6auPOBJnKibkdpVF5Yz1r9KsSynBhuJzXADF91qEL1okwyw6tnIZpNMrIsdut0UoPzqlfGmeH_u64UbhJbIN2Xpgu2ntMGDlLKaTR_eyNCHKSWkNw0ng2CAyRSu1pR8JvaFv63E96X44u2Z3obEz_Zmpharmuqw9A4DET1vDJcETf7ipTC2amlhuQqeWVioN0wYa18YeQP-P8ifgGjsfM2471gMxvD40PLnMIIVIsGRL_13jMb2x0YCamlq7acF4xpdjGiQ3idUBMz0v6mdu3Vf8DAAD__--ckYo) on semiconductors manufactured overseas. The Sherman plant was built with [$406 million in anticipated funding](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuyqyAYhZ8GOxyuMRYUp7HLaXfp_MivMoPAAInJ2-8xr7DrdZlvrZ_H_AAffNz-w4Gmvdc0RzxrwNawzFLbHCC2lDHWI9WWXlhy8cssmNCUacrH2YEPn1l1zljmRt6h4YMablpofut2g87a-wrMAYyLsApAgBISllEDG6TuvLnKmOYj54xr2Y-LZo4PXEpwluuFKIbOt1T6tmPDN9Q1fC6SfklHF8zeWq5E_iNiImI6z7M_ID5XWNqz-Lg5_8LLScR0TSNi2kKyEE5YsVTaEq0Zo6PgnG8-RQhUUetD8CnSZ6UpY4FLqLTuWA6I9AtBxDSou5R3IqauGJfPK1NvA1FsO8CHL17726kvI34DAAD__6RnjrE) from the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act. Hsu indicated GlobalWafers plans to build two more phases at its Sherman campus, noting the development timeline depends on “reasonable pricing, prepayments, and government support.” The facility is expected to [produce 1.2 million wafers a month](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SpiAQQE-jGRY_ohIYbGI2m25oNdB-UItgQe84c_stvytM2l39qt_787F_QEwxv37DiSt9HWXPeLeERFh3pe2VIFO5MLezNCqfWK8a3S651IxrJszuIabvfez9ark3osdVzOM8aanF1IcVlkVpPwl3uEUrZcHJY5Geo53lZITr4_rAuBZGCC60GozT3ItZKAXeCu26kaOPVOpAAQm_oB3p-_lkcOXs0xqIrtapX53cOrnd9z38JczPspPbY9PJ7X3GAoJPMeMzeaViId1wYG3M_aPGKCCr0dqSWcnMxpRiycyXlKCyFrCekJkL8WLvKJ3coFJ0CXdn3GgWpdisR81Gr2ZmlPPMzZYf3IAFUEOgM_V19df9kNs0dyN_nRDTW4N-Fv9zlf8DAAD__95CmgE) and will eventually employ 1,500 people.
## PBR Crowns Champion at World Finals
Fort Worth and Arlington hosted the Professional Bull Riders (PBR) World Finals last week. The finals culminated in a weekend showdown among the sport’s top 25 riders, which was dominated by [three-time world champion Jose Vitor Leme of Brazil](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO2zAQRb-G6sYgKdFaFSrSqNu0KQU-Zi1m-QI5Me2_D6Rf2GaaAe695_z53D-1Dz49fuuIK72-8p6wt4BEWPdRmRJ0olwwtZgb5SfWUr3dJZcKuAKx7E778N6nwa2Gu0UMuIp5mu9KKnEfjhWlwVl88EXqcdZ6_BB3JydtnTIo3WQGv55hXIlFCC7UeFus4k7MYhy1M0JZNnF0nnK90YGEL92-wvtccrM5DmE9iEpj4y8mNya33vutmOvH5HbCMLmdDUxu_Dyl5kfF1vwTwaf2ryLQgdB9gr-5ITzPKggYEaL-xgaPipqwEdgc0Wj7DT5BMRUO3yjXN1AGg2Br7gndFXbp6bkGB_bQsficmNyGurrSfQi-3Wc28UfUPlwQ9DP1z1X-DwAA__-hhJqL). The event began with the four-day [Eliminations round](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO2zAMhp_G3hhIshXHg4cu3q5rR4OWmBNRWRIk5pJ7-8JB3-AWDgT5gR__Px_bB3Lk9PkbD1rkdc9bomeLJEJ1G-xeIibJhVI7cpP8RbVUdptRxoKyoOfNI8fvbez9sis_654WPY3T1Rqrr31YzH61qMf5Oky32Uzj_XbT4-BxJrIOHfa8nDBl9ay10na4zM4qryc9DOh3bV03KvIsuV4kkNAL2z1-n5dcXD76uASR0rrhV2fWzqxlf_c7s54inVlPemdWdZaUQYPHKDnBX2wUoTySkwcKNWj8kgAloiO4c-IWAAVajh7yQ-CtXPYKz1yjPycwNnikSNgCSCDYCZsART44oXBODZ4sAY6cmlCFWUHJnAQqewLJQC-h5CESekDJ5T_aBTzKuR64QEVHnVn7uvjy5Bi5XaduVJ8Hcnw_QH4W29di_gUAAP__a5qwFA), which Leme won with 353 points. Dalton Kasel of Decatur, the world’s top-ranked rider going into the competition, finished sixth with 125 points. The top five riders in the Eliminations round advanced to the championship round, along with the 15 riders who had accumulated the most points during the season. The top five finishers in the [second-chance Ride for Redemption round](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGSnDAMhp8GOu3YgCFbUKTZ7tKmZGQsL7oY22OL3ds8fYbNI1yjQr_mG33S74_lAzlwvP_CnWb58mmJ9KyBRKgsvbE5YJSUKdY9VUkPKrnwunSqM6AM6OvikMNrGVo3W-WuuqVZT8M0ms7osd1mGleve2uUN9NoB-PRWGXGYbXGE06u5fmEKaOvWitt-st1NcrpSfc9OqvN2gyKHEsqF9lI6AurD69zk8ua9jbMm0iuTf-z6W5Nd8v23W-62ynSdLeT3nQ3dRYK_HfHAp9UaGes8MIID14lFViPuCF4CpwJ_FECRlgDHo4T7CkKnvFnAYwOHEamAH-IMsc7EJYIniMG8PwgsFRkqyAJZCPItsAzleD-j1Q4YiCs2zu0hFVg3XDPnGLdOEOKsOML9AT6B6AAikAVdHycVm2ZXX5yCFzHqRnUfUcO70vI9_73mLt_AQAA__-HuLQr) completed the field for the championship. Leme won $1,632,667 with his first-place finish at AT&T Stadium. On Saturday, a team called the [Jokers netted $500,000](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu5CAQRVeDM1p8XGYcEEzirCed0AKDu2sagwU1_dn9k_2W8JIq6QZX556_1_nqMGG-_XFbtPRey5zjq6VIFOuswe_JZSp7zG0rjcoz1r3iMiuhgAvgcpyDw_SZ-y5YL8Iou2il6c0ACuTQ3a0W4pf0A_QmqHHwy2qEgnE1QvcKYPAd2qNMgBylFBL0ZVxABGmk1i54CQvrRQxIpV7oHim-XVvT5yC5LGXrkr0T7Y3p30xNTE27P3OmpmMIU9PRztQkjvOvPGJt_IWZnwseGHgty4O375d5LSEW7og7It7IBfy_cczc1cMSlcxPAqamrtqwvzAlbINhvbhtDtOJRD8T-bTqKwAA__-DIIWX) for winning the multi-discipline Kid Rock’s Rock N Rodeo team competition.
## Most Overpriced Retirement Towns
Personal finance website GOBankingRates surveyed real estate agents to compile a list of the five most overpriced retirement towns in Texas. All five are located [in or adjacent to the Hill Country](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHupCAQx_GnwU7DIOhRUFxjt9deaRBmVxIEAnPr-vYX9xX-_eSbz_z-PtaHDTGk1x97oKHPM68JzxaRCOs6qq1EmygXTO3IjfIba6nBrYIL1XPVg169DfFaZefNxr2GDg3Mcp6UUDB1uxlRT5Pn3E6g-GZ_SZQwWXyCxk3qTXXB3DGuQANwUOOgneIeZhhH6zdQjkmOPlCuA-1I-LHtGa9bMrh8dNHsRKWx8TcTCxPLeZ7DcTWbbncK-T5iYrm_YmLZQ4y9y_8S1YuJxVYKLiITy7fbV6RQ8cBEvcuNWi_4KOQMcih76arx5QwxhjbNTPLXYUP8Guhny72N-B8AAP__mbaDjg): Boerne, Fredericksburg, Georgetown, Kerrville, and Marble Falls. The report cited institutional investors and high property taxes—[approaching 3% of a home’s assessed value](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAQQL8GOwyDIktB8Rq7fe0rDcrokodgYLLu_v2Nm9zcD7jt5GTmnPl3n-4uxJC2v25HS681TwnPGpEIy9Sp-YguUT4w1T1Xyk8sRwnLJIVUXCgOZvIuxPfUN97Owhto0ILu9aCkgqF5WOz6Vc9iEUbioOFmQKz6psGgu_XgfBPstUwoMAACVNeaRQkPGrrO-RnUwnqBPlAuLT2Q8OXqGt-XSbvkvYn2QXRU1v1hcmRyPM-z3fLs0v-QtuII64UxORakUHDHREyOV1YKaWNyvLr4dxh6_rnAf2hO-UzXwEWOlRwhdxsmqkyOTbH-OEOMoQ6a9WLbXYgfLfrdM59WfgUAAP__bLKMTg)—as factors that drive up prices. It also cautioned potential buyers to consider the risks of water scarcity and development restrictions when deciding where to retire. In Fredericksburg and Marble Falls, institutional investors have snatched up properties, creating “artificial competition” that has caused home values to increase “beyond what local economics justify.” Both of these towns, along with Kerrville, are affected by development restrictions and aging infrastructure. Boerne’s average home value is $550,180, and Georgetown is one of the most expensive destinations in Texas for assisted senior living facilities. Georgetown has been one of the [fastest-growing mid-size cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SpSAUhJ8GMyx-RJeAYBOz2XRDC-So1CBYcGa4vv2Wdx9hwq6u7vq6_34sHzbEkPY_9gSDry0vCVqNgAhlkcpd0SbMF6R65or5G8pVwroIJhRlinK9eBvivQydN455zTswfBqmUQnFx-4wbN2clEwDd8qNzqrJSy71L820FpNTXTBPGVNcc864kr1eFfN84lJa77haycDAB8ylxwMQXrZu8X5I-jWfXTQH4lWJ_E3ETMTcWus_XzY9JhHzs4aI-R37L-mVr69oMeREoWI4LUKl9ciN7pDLDphbop93BGoL0M1WhIp0L7mFtNM1YIBKQ6J4AF3zV8JyEzF3xfirhRhDHScysP20Ib4J8We_fhvxLwAA__9ILJAN) in the country in recent years, driving prices up across the board.
