clean_body: A morning newsletter focused entirely on news from the state of Texas. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it. | | | | | | Monday, May 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1910, a landed in Delta County during the passage of Halley's Comet. Some residents thought it was an alien spacecraft, recalling rumors of UFO sightings several years earlier. The Houston Texans hosted a high school girls flag football championship this past weekend for more than 80 schools, crowning winners in three divisions. Check out video of the event . Today's sponsor is , offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity for The Flyover readers. Abilene 🌦️ 93/71° | Amarillo ⛅ 80/54° | Austin 🌩️ 96/76° | Brownsville 🌦️ 94/80° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 90/80° | DFW 🌩️ 85/72° | El Paso ☀️ 86/62° | Houston 🌩️ 90/77° | Laredo ⛅ 104/79° | Lubbock ⛅ 87/60° | Midland ☀️ 89/65° | San Antonio 🌩️ 98/76° | Tyler 🌩️ 89/73° | Waco 🌩️ 89/74° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | GlobalWafers Opens $3.5B Sherman Plant Taiwanese silicon wafer manufacturer GlobalWafers in Sherman on Thursday and announced plans for a $4 billion expansion at the 142-acre site. “ Our U.S. customers appear to have a very strong demand for U.S.-based production capacity ,” said GlobalWafers chairperson and CEO Doris Hsu, citing on semiconductors manufactured overseas. The Sherman plant was built with from the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act. Hsu indicated GlobalWafers plans to build two more phases at its Sherman campus, noting the development timeline depends on “reasonable pricing, prepayments, and government support.” The facility is expected to and will eventually employ 1,500 people. PBR Crowns Champion at World Finals Fort Worth and Arlington hosted the Professional Bull Riders (PBR) World Finals last week. The finals culminated in a weekend showdown among the sport’s top 25 riders, which was dominated by . The event began with the four-day , which Leme won with 353 points. Dalton Kasel of Decatur, the world’s top-ranked rider going into the competition, finished sixth with 125 points. The top five riders in the Eliminations round advanced to the championship round, along with the 15 riders who had accumulated the most points during the season. The top five finishers in the completed the field for the championship. Leme won $1,632,667 with his first-place finish at AT&T Stadium. On Saturday, a team called the for winning the multi-discipline Kid Rock’s Rock N Rodeo team competition. Most Overpriced Retirement Towns Personal finance website GOBankingRates surveyed real estate agents to compile a list of the five most overpriced retirement towns in Texas. All five are located : Boerne, Fredericksburg, Georgetown, Kerrville, and Marble Falls. The report cited institutional investors and high property taxes——as factors that drive up prices. It also cautioned potential buyers to consider the risks of water scarcity and development restrictions when deciding where to retire. In Fredericksburg and Marble Falls, institutional investors have snatched up properties, creating “artificial competition” that has caused home values to increase “beyond what local economics justify.” Both of these towns, along with Kerrville, are affected by development restrictions and aging infrastructure. Boerne’s average home value is $550,180, and Georgetown is one of the most expensive destinations in Texas for assisted senior living facilities. Georgetown has been one of the in the country in recent years, driving prices up across the board. | Flying together with our sponsor Motorola, Nokia, Apple... This Smartphone Innovator? In the 80s, Motorola made phones mobile. In the 90s, Nokia gave them personality. In the 2000s, Apple made them smart – changing the industry forever. But for years, the innovations dried up. Until . Mode’s EarnPhone flips the model entirely – paying users for everyday phone use instead of draining their wallets. With $325M+ earned and saved by customers, 45M+ users across 170+ countries, and $75M+ in revenue, Mode is leading the next evolution. Now, , they’re preparing for their biggest leap yet. And they’re inviting investors to get involved at a share price of just $0.30. . | ➤ Cameron County: A popular beach access point on South Padre Island is getting a $4.5 million upgrade. The project will reinforce the sand dunes and add pavilions, restrooms, and a 142-car parking lot. () ➤ Austin: The Texas House approved a measure last week to require air conditioning in state prisons by 2032. In March, a federal judge ruled that the absence of air conditioning was a violation of the constitutional prohibition on cruel and unusual punishment. () ➤ Kaufman County: The sheriff’s office has released computer-generated images of what fugitive Trevor McEuen might look like if he has altered his appearance. Last week, Gov. Greg Abbott announced a $30,000 reward for information about McEuen, who fled ahead of his capital murder trial. () ➤ Killeen: Fire Captain Marvin Taylor III, who was killed in a crash on Mother’s Day after the birth of his fifth child, was honored with a portrait painted by Philadelphia forensic artist Jonny Castro. Taylor’s funeral is on Tuesday. () ➤ Galveston County: Authorities arrested nearly 300 people and confiscated dozens of guns during Jeep Weekend. Over 400 officers from multiple agencies provided security for the annual event. () ➤ Austin: The Army Training and Doctrine Command program will relocate from Virginia’s Fort Eustis to Austin, where it will merge with the Army Futures Command to create the Army Transportation and Training Command. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20news%20source&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you'll%20love%20it%20too.%0A%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20Texas%20news.%20They%20cover%20everything%20happening%20around%20the%20state%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. | ➤ Texas Tech and Texas won their regional tournaments yesterday to advance to the best-of-three super regional round of the college softball playoffs, while No. 1 Texas A&M fell to Liberty University 6-5 in a tie-breaker game. This weekend, the Red Raiders will face Florida State, and the Longhorns play Clemson. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: RSVP -- Luminis Career and Resource Fair
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors, I know that many Marylanders are suffering right now because of this Administration's callous actions. Many have lost jobs and income. As a result, I am pleased to announce that Luminis Health and partners are joining forces to host a career and resource fair in just a few weeks, and I am excited to join them in this effort! There will be employers and vendors from multiple industries, and there will be space allocated for private conversations between job seekers, and employers and vendors. During these challenging times, it's important that we keep an eye on our wellbeing, so there will also be health screenings available to the public. Click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14242.8719580.5352535.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fluminis%2f&redir_log=977348130008297) to RSVP for the career and resource fair! Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14242.8719580.5352535.7190525)

There will be employers and vendors from multiple industries, and there will be space allocated for private conversations between job seekers, and employers and vendors. During these challenging times, it's important that we keep an eye on our wellbeing, so there will also be health screenings available to the public. Click to RSVP for the career and resource fair! Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks United States Senator

name: Jessica at Evergreen Action
subject: FWD: 📣 Urgent call to action: Join us TODAY to fight back
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Join progressive voices across the country to mobilize against GOP assault on working class
| | |
---
| Hi friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw Lena’s invitation to today’s virtual rally and town hall on how to advocate against the Republican budget bill that would cut crucial federal programs to fund billionaire tax breaks. **It’s happening this evening at 7:30 p.m. ET / 4:30 p.m. PT. Can you make it?**

[**Sign up here to join us alongside an incredible lineup of voices in the progressive movement**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600367/87SdQ4wZ), and read more details below.

Thanks for all you do.

Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director of Digital Advocacy and Platforms
Evergreen Action

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
Date: Thur, May 15, 2025
Subject: 📣 Urgent call to action: Join us Monday to fight back |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600368/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi—

After weeks working behind closed doors, House Republicans have gone public with their heinous budget bill, and are quickly moving to a full vote in the House of Representatives.

Just as we feared, the bill not only makes massive cuts to Medicaid and SNAP food assistance funding, it also guts historic clean energy programs and tax credits passed under the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)—**programs which are vital for ensuring energy affordability, economic competitiveness, and cutting climate pollution.**

To learn more about what’s at stake and how you can help advocate in the coming days, **join me on Monday, May 19 at 7:30 p.m. ET / 4:30 p.m. PT for a virtual town hall** with our friends at Americans for Tax Fairness, Public Citizen, and other progressive groups who are fighting back against these disastrous attacks on lifesaving programs.

The town hall will be followed by a **National Call-In Day on Tuesday, May 20** , when we’ll use our collective voices to pressure lawmakers to vote NO.

[**Sign up here to join the fight!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600369/87SdQ4wZ) |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600370/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
[JOIN US](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600371/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We know the GOP budget bill will be catastrophically harmful to millions of Americans across the country, who are already struggling to keep up with higher bills. On Monday, we’ll hear from experts on what we stand to lose, and learn exactly how to get involved.

Now is the time for us to stand united across movements and across communities to fight back against this shameful attack on the working class and all the progress we’ve fought so hard to win.

[**I hope you’ll get involved and join me for this mass online call next Monday, May 19.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3600372/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Where has the Trust Gone?
body:
This week will be marked by the release of the new book, Original Sin by Alex Thompson and Jake Tapper about Joe Biden's disastrous choice to run for re-election.

| |
---|---|---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7fb01e4-0b09-407f-81c8-c6edcb038f4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week will be marked by the release of the new book, _[Original Sin](https://substack.com/redirect/448651e5-f340-405f-8e0a-83eef6cc3626?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ by Alex Thompson and Jake Tapper about Joe Biden's disastrous choice to run for re-election. The press [excerpt](https://substack.com/redirect/bc7a044f-1eef-41a2-babd-47d3684ecf19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has already set off a mini-firestorm with an account of Joe Biden's incoherence backstage at the now-infamous LA fundraiser hosted by George Clooney last June.
I joked with a friend, "Who knew it would take George Clooney to save democracy?" His [Op-Ed](https://substack.com/redirect/5e5f4067-5dec-4423-995e-3d3c25af02e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was too little too late.
I saw Joe Biden in person last February at an event in South Carolina and his condition was . . . not great. He was having trouble remembering people. He whispered. His skin was translucent. He didn't walk so much as shuffle. And his delivery off of a teleprompter was uneven, occasionally unclear and wholly unconvincing. Afterwards, the crowd chanted "Four more years! Four more years!"
I turned to Evelyn who was there and said, "Four more years? He looks like death warmed over. Four more weeks is more like it."
The Democrats have yet to truly reckon with just how badly Joe Biden screwed over all Americans who would prefer not to have Trump in office. He bears more responsibility for Trump's return than any other figure, and essentially hand-delivered the White House back to Trump due to his stubbornness, delusion and pride. Even when he stepped aside in July, Kamala Harris was hurriedly anointed without a primary and then urged to run on the legacy of an unpopular incumbent. Joe could have said, "Feel free to throw me under the bus, run your own campaign." Instead, his message was, "No daylight" between you and me.
Joe and the Dems failing to come clean will also greatly weaken all critiques of Donald Trump's mental acuity. Everything seems like hypocrisy now.
Who is to blame?
The list starts obviously with Joe Biden himself, who described himself as a bridge to the next generation. That doesn't exactly scream "I should be President until I die / age 86."
Then it's the leaders of the DNC who protected and enabled Joe by canceling primaries and shuffling the calendar to insulate Joe from competition. South Carolina was moved up to #1 in order to scare off any challengers and reward Jim Clyburn for enabling Joe's 2020 victory.
Then it's the top figures of the Democratic Party who could have forced a primary. This includes anyone who could have run a credible primary challenge, including Gavin Newsom, JB Pritzker, Gretchen Whitmer, Amy Klobuchar, Pete Buttigieg and others. Imagine if one of these figures had made a speech at the end of 2023 and kicked off a campaign against Joe?
Only one elected officeholder had the courage to take on the challenge: Rep. Dean Phillips. In South Carolina at the event I attended, Dean Phillips said to Gavin Newsom, "You should have fucking run!"
He was right. Dean was the only one who put the interests of the country ahead of his own. Of course, Dean's reward was a malicious press campaign and a premature end to his political career.
I'm sure some of the other potential contenders saw what happened to Dean and said, "I'm smart for passing on challenging Joe."
Maybe smart, but bad for the country.
Last, it's the Dem-aligned press corps that ignored any critiques of Joe Biden's mental faculties even after the American people had concluded that he was simply too old to run for re-election.
You can probably sense my anger and frustration in writing this. I saw this coming; I was standing next to Dean in New Hampshire and South Carolina while the Dems were trashing him, only to change their tune a mere five months later. Here's my endorsement [speech](https://substack.com/redirect/7617833e-05d7-4854-8cbd-13451296ac4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Dean which expresses my sentiments in January 2024.
Half the country is still pissed off at being gaslit about Joe Biden's fitness for office. The Democratic Party should own its failure in full. Joe Biden should come out and say, "I never should have run again, I made an error, and I apologize to the American people for failing them when it came time to be a statesman and leader. I should have put their interests ahead of my own. I failed and I'm sorry." That's the only way to retake his legacy.
As it is, Joe Biden's failure will continue to hang over the Party and stain the careers of anyone who was part of his Administration. Who feels like a leader while covering for Joe? In my opinion, the next nominee is likely to be someone who had no attachment to the Biden team and can credibly say, "Look, I was busy getting results in Harrisburg/Lansing/Annapolis/Frankfort. I had nothing to do with this mess."
Where has the trust gone? It went up in smoke along with Joe Biden's legacy when the Democratic Party fell in line rather than raise their hands and say, "Hey, are we sure that our 81-year old historically unpopular incumbent is up for this?"
Careerism and conformity won the day when courage was called for. The path back is unclear. We will all pay the price for years to come.
Sorry this isn't better news! To help build a new political party, check out Forward [here](https://substack.com/redirect/6ead58a7-31e0-4050-8fd9-d295e234e2b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); we just picked up some great new people. For my interview of entrepreneur Neil Parikh who is using AI to make people mentally healthier, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/1ecf6e1e-c5fa-48ec-a876-7a07df06237c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Building is the answer.

subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsuttgbhpejkm505hlalttlm82h2a3qsgk6m0li0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs)
[****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6pabl28r88lf39o9i68n8qupe3q3c57nmaseiio_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2fvvor1qiq3kn6hakqnga7nofau3qv04nbv6f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuir2uie4tc9dl1bqs4rnku5l9u35mfcu0fgncbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z72i0fefu95m148jgnq3hhogg5pqg1gqcekhf6qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zms30th1ihe30uee8hp03npv3fhlu39trbfmbu98_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm0ob6chh2bs)

---

body:

Yesterday, we marked the 100th day of the Trump Administration, which has been defined by chaos, cruelty and corruption.
From threatening our rights to gutting the civil service and working to enrich the ultra-wealthy while crushing working families with the largest peacetime tax hike in history, President Trump is again dragging America backward.
It’s no surprise he has the lowest 100-day presidential approval rating in 80 years. The last record low? His own, from his first term in 2017.
We’re fighting this reckless Administration in Congress and the Courts – but we also need the help of the community. I need your help organizing, energizing and mobilizing like never before. Talk to your neighbors, knock on doors, make calls, volunteer, march, vote. Contribute to candidates like me who are committed to democracy and accountability. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
And, most importantly, show up with empathy. People are losing their jobs, their savings and their hope. Let’s be there for them.
We're not just fighting against Trump. We’re fighting for a country that works for all of us.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

subject: Join Me to Save OMG from a Lawsuit Threatening Press Freedom
body:
On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, “Trump’s a sociopathic narcissist...I’m in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do” about Trump.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zibc6a35uo8sn8vcrnpea8mcf33s5l4aheopd7vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zifrbekiqfmtlhlhfge2a50tnjtlii8e46rqje90_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, founder of O'Keefe Media Group (OMG), where we risk everything to expose corruption through undercover journalism.

Right now, we're facing a newly filed, **federal lawsuit that could destroy our mission and silence journalists everywhere** --[**and I need your help**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbcho1glmbnbv8iclebqisshifuglacli3hoj6p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs).

On May 14, 2025, Jamie Mannina, a former Pentagon contractor, sued me and OMG in Washington, D.C. federal courts after we caught him on tape saying, "**_Trump 's a sociopathic narcissist_** _..._ I'm in conversation with a couple of retired generals to try to explore what we can do" about Trump.

His baseless claims--defamation, fraud, wiretapping--**are meant to bankrupt us**.

As I told the Associated Press, "This is an attack against the First Amendment... the process is the punishment."

If Mannina's defamation claim wins, **it 's over for OMG**.

Our "American Swiper" program, which drives our exposes, could spark countless lawsuits from others we've exposed, ending our work.

**We have just 21 days from being served to hire top D.C. attorneys and respond, or we risk losing by default**.

Liberty Guard is hosting our legal defense fund, and [**I 'm asking you to join our fight with a donation today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ooobkklbnb26qdcitaksl1nol9noigpjomgnjo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs)

Please donate today to stand with OMG and save press freedom.

More than ever, I need patriots like you to help respond by this 21-day deadline and keep the OMG alive and allow us to **keep fighting corruption with the truth**.

[**Your support will defend not just OMG but the right to fearless journalism.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsu0bulhcsjkd91uc26nqa9igieuch6714a5u4jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs)

Join The Fight Today,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have 21 days to act, or the powerful win. [**Donate now to protect the First Amendment.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zda9pp5478t11msres4eoef5khq9h1gd2v1ge11g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm8pj4chh2bs)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Kind words from Mark Levin
body:
Honored and humbled. But let me be clear...

| **__A Personal Note from the Desk of Jim Jordan__**
---
Friend,
---
It was an honor to hear a great patriot like Mark Levin call me... _“truly one of the great Representatives.”_
---
But I know deep down... as hard as I fight every day, the GREATEST fighter in our country is _**YOU**_.
---
I recognize that every single one of our achievements and victories is _thanks to the Silent Majority of grassroots Americans like you who power our movement._
---
_Without your steadfast support, the MAGA movement would never have taken off and we’d all but certainly lost America to the Radical Left YEARS ago._
---
_But today, thanks to you, we are winning!_
---
Right now, we’re witnessing just how far the Left is willing to go to hold onto power for dear life.
---
They’re engaging in rampant legal warfare to try and bring down the Trump Administration, dismantle DOGE, stop deportations of illegal aliens, bring back DEI, and halt the agenda _YOU_ voted for.
---
**But the People’s House has stopped the Left dead in their tracks time and time again!**
---
Our _razor-thin_ House Majority truly is our last line of defense against the Left’s lawfare, which is why they’re outraising us 10:1 – _yes, you read that right: 10 to 1_ – to take the majority and silence our voices.
---
**In fact, Democrats have already introduced articles of impeachment in the House so that they can begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump if they seize power in the midterms.**
---
I transferred $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign to save our House majority in 2024. Protecting our majority mattered far more than my own re-election. And this time around, the stakes are just as high...
---
...That’s why I’m asking you to match my commitment to saving America by making a contribution of any amount you can.
---
_And if you cannot give at this time, don’t even think twice! All I ask is that you say a prayer for President Trump, the folks fighting hard at DOGE, and, of course, America._
---

name: Official Republican Communication [From Team Scalise]
subject: May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| |
---
| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

---
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z417a97j1ldls1qe7ssdhj2j9k6qagi6e75h2a8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm4oj1c9h2bs "Jeanine pirro")
---

**[The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcod571i1qcoite4o49upu4r9dgtigocu69spibo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm4oj1c9h2bs "The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed in a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:")**
* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"
* The New Republic slammed her as "UNHINGED"

Judge Jeanine served as a District Attorney and has defended our values for decades. But her qualifications don't matter to the Liberal Mob.

They're going scorched earth against her anyway in a desperate attempt to:** 1)** eviscerate the reputations of Trump allies, **2) ** drive Republicans down at the polls, and ** 3) ** spin up Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

_It 's about power and money. Nothing else._

**That 's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for MAGA Patriots in moments like this. [So we're activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfrlnjpqd72pb78o8de21tqangt06of07rbf78f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm4oj1c9h2bs "So we’re activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.")**

We know it's ambitious.

But every dollar we collect will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and broadcast the truth about President Trump and his closest allies.

If we falter, the consequences could be catastrophic: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials, including the President himself.

**NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So we urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month ...**

RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW!

**This is the defining moment of the MAGA Movement -** **[will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6q2dk68bgafor5rt72edi3pmt49ggksk9emnou0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm4oj1c9h2bs "will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?")**

---

_Sent via Team Scalise_

---

* * *

\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---

clean_body: Honored and humbled. But let me be clear... | A Personal Note from the Desk of Jim Jordan Friend, It was an honor to hear a great patriot like Mark Levin call me... “truly one of the great Representatives.” But I know deep down... as hard as I fight every day, the GREATEST fighter in our country is YOU. I recognize that every single one of our achievements and victories is thanks to the Silent Majority of grassroots Americans like you who power our movement. Without your steadfast support, the MAGA movement would never have taken off and we’d all but certainly lost America to the Radical Left YEARS ago. But today, thanks to you, we are winning! Right now, we’re witnessing just how far the Left is willing to go to hold onto power for dear life. They’re engaging in rampant legal warfare to try and bring down the Trump Administration, dismantle DOGE, stop deportations of illegal aliens, bring back DEI, and halt the agenda YOU voted for. But the People’s House has stopped the Left dead in their tracks time and time again! Our razor-thin House Majority truly is our last line of defense against the Left’s lawfare, which is why they’re outraising us 10:1 – yes, you read that right: 10 to 1 – to take the majority and silence our voices. In fact, Democrats have already introduced articles of impeachment in the House so that they can begin impeachment proceedings against President Trump if they seize power in the midterms. I transferred $2.5 MILLION from my own campaign to save our House majority in 2024. Protecting our majority mattered far more than my own re-election. And this time around, the stakes are just as high... ...That’s why I’m asking you to match my commitment to saving America by making a contribution of any amount you can. And if you cannot give at this time, don’t even think twice! All I ask is that you say a prayer for President Trump, the folks fighting hard at DOGE, and, of course, America. Thank you and God Bless you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. name: Official Republican Communication [From Team Scalise]
subject: May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| |
---
| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za10rkfohtl15ursa5ugb0c19sa2am4pj1me4rp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "Jeanine pirro")
---

**[The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zutjofso9pp5fdfhqp2pnhbrn3c8pmkuimof49p8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed in a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:")**
* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"
* The New Republic slammed her as "UNHINGED"

Judge Jeanine served as a District Attorney and has defended our values for decades. But her qualifications don't matter to the Liberal Mob.

They're going scorched earth against her anyway in a desperate attempt to:** 1)** eviscerate the reputations of Trump allies, **2) ** drive Republicans down at the polls, and ** 3) ** spin up Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

_It 's about power and money. Nothing else._

**That 's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for MAGA Patriots in moments like this. [So we're activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za00vs9397ut8m3e2e979fe1r1rt16mced5dmgag_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "So we’re activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.")**

We know it's ambitious.

But every dollar we collect will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and broadcast the truth about President Trump and his closest allies.

If we falter, the consequences could be catastrophic: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials, including the President himself.

**NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So we urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month ...**

RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW!

**This is the defining moment of the MAGA Movement -** **[will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlnscqfcgtoh9639o2p0ht4ukrfkm9ojoip7b518_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?")**
---
**[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdsm5id7856su7erv7np0kj0pjnj997mj85ijnk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3q38cn4uahbrcc1vvh68927i1avv4nnu0uaimbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3ahqr41ng91r9usm1mcdavv72uoefser338qlrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs)**
---
- House GOP
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp27b4ka562old4g4101d29dgtrjokli9j1lkjbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "Liberal Trump Resistance")
---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbs8g3v8bp85djb3jbfbr82jpbfp3rsuudp0d0qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmcp34cph2bs "DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW")

name: America First Alert
subject: Your input could shape America’s defense policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump and Senate Republicans need your input to help shape the future of U.S. defense.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zji2tl11rtim0oom7l01bo3hbkmmu3iikl3hqk3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)

Friend,

President Trump is leading a **[powerful America First comeback](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvalakqhomdtva1ojoimg1h3an8efctg74kk09o8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs) **--and on June 14th, he's taking it to the streets with a **[historic military parade](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuo8lidue3r4tqtfcqji2f1n1jqoc18vfcaf1al0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)** honoring his 79th birthday and the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army.

But this isn't just about honoring our military--it's about **[reclaiming national strength](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcaknf9dvtd3v12i49mqlb8th574nir7mibeuc28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)** and putting _American security, veterans, and defense back at the TOP of the agenda._

That's why President Trump and Senate Republicans are launching a **[National Security Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcbn151fns4ga544o0v3968f0ab0e51uogsncr70_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs) **--and we need YOU to be part of it.

**[DO YOU BELIEVE IN AMERICA FIRST SECURITY?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z074i94dlsgq3bn75q396913gtc99lpmpfmqcrmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)**

This survey will help shape the next wave of America First policy:

✅ Military readiness and modernization
✅ Veterans' care and respect
✅ Border security and law enforcement
✅ Standing up to global threats like China and Iran
✅ Defending peace through strength--not weakness

**[If you believe in President Trump's vision for American strength, take the _National Security Survey_ today to support this critical effort.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jat1e769irbt4pq76u0rd0luoechjtg71b10bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)**

**[👉 TAKE THE SURVEY](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlthteab1luunm1opdm9u4812umojqp2rr0v5oq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)**

**[America's future security begins with YOU.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6125krmdegm3t56p3nrtoja2kem5j7chh1ckneg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)**

This is your chance to be heard--and help us shape the next America First defense agenda. President Trump and Senate Republicans are listening.

**[TAKE THE SURVEY- SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT »](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zivuuo1ac2daube61kp2edtq7lluq0jjnq77v3k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)**

Let's show Washington that the American people still believe in _strength, sovereignty, and leadership._

For America,
GOP Headquarters - Washington D.C.

***P.S. The parade is a symbol. But the real fight is about the future. Take the survey. Add your voice. Stand for strength.***

| Paid for by the NRSC.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.NRSC.org](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd26mhvjlm4t2i8aqssiehdk0n16033001tr5428_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74cph2bs)

name: Elise Stefanik [House GOP Leadership Chair]
subject: I’m watching this race like a hawk for a few reasons:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team.

Hi, this is Elise Stefanik!
I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team.
Now that I'm officially staying in the 119th Congress, I'm meeting with colleagues to make sure we have what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican Congress for all four years of his term.
Our margins are so thin, so that will depend FULLY on a few important races in a few battleground districts.
One of those is my friend, Monica De La Cruz.
Monica rocks. She's a pro-Trump Hispanic conservative who helped turn out Latino voters for the President. I'm watching her race like a hawk for a few reasons:
1) The Democrats named her as their ONLY TARGET in all of Texas2) Liberal groups are already hammering her with FAKE NEWS attack ads3) If we lose her seat, the Democrats will take COMPLETE CONTROL
[You know I don't beat around the bush - so I'll just come right out and say it: I'm personally asking you to send a few bucks directly to MAGA hero Monica De La Cruz.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpqu773gpkii4qs2jio3v8909ofv62pk1dqi7i2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ico2pdfitammjaum0e269imvkl0d5kh8a929l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)[SUPPORT MONICA HERE ->
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7k60tauc5gnsip084iecd2sccim19lj9rfl9k80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)Every penny counts in this fight. The Democrats ALREADY started pouring cash into South Texas to destroy her, and the only way to save this seat is hard work, grit, and having the resources to fight back.
The entire fate of our Majority could very well come down to Monica winning or losing.
[So with all that in mind, is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to Monica's campaign right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkj7esqiggruv7ts7ehfpi83blqal7d8c9q4d10_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)
Monica is a true patriot who will fight to the bitter end for our values AND our President. Let's show her we've got her back.
Thanks for standing with me and with Monica. We're in this together!
For America,
Elise StefanikHouse Republican Leadership Chair[SUPPORT MONICA HERE ->
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z35mobe5o9n942jd6hap1eaff2mpgd3mt9ql92mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)
* * *
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhg98b25c5dfucuesv6e42m2q6f8f6h9n7i73qs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)National Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list!
There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now.
[So I'm pleading with you to help me save Texas-15 today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlcv1n999nkhq53gm01728rov1etoko5pckok8e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm2p74clh2bs)
- Monica De La Cruz| | |

name: Linda Goldstein
subject: I'm in court today to defend abortion
body:
Peter, the fight for medication abortion is happening in real time. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107960944/546402080/2141984067?sourceid=1150688&utm_campaign=25emama-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE2OTVhZC1iNDM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GgBlU9JYaYf8kxuRf7OUQnETn1xrNXWFcEXjQu8UG4=&emci=a963154a-d431-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7c1695ad-b434-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107960946/546402081/2141984067?sourceid=1150688&utm_campaign=25emama-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE2OTVhZC1iNDM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GgBlU9JYaYf8kxuRf7OUQnETn1xrNXWFcEXjQu8UG4=&emci=a963154a-d431-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7c1695ad-b434-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

Today, I'm standing in a federal courtroom in Charlottesville, Virginia, arguing to protect our right to access mifepristone, one of the most widely used and safest abortion medications available, without medically unnecessary restrictions.

This is the first time the new Trump administration is in court to argue over medication abortion. [**And make no mistake: what happens in this courtroom could reshape access to abortion care across the U.S.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107960949/546402082/2141984067?sourceid=1150688&utm_campaign=25emama-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE2OTVhZC1iNDM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GgBlU9JYaYf8kxuRf7OUQnETn1xrNXWFcEXjQu8UG4=&emci=a963154a-d431-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7c1695ad-b434-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**SUPPORT THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107960951/546402083/2141984067?sourceid=1150688&utm_campaign=25emama-0503aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medab&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE2OTVhZC1iNDM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GgBlU9JYaYf8kxuRf7OUQnETn1xrNXWFcEXjQu8UG4=&emci=a963154a-d431-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=7c1695ad-b434-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "SUPPORT THE FIGHT")

name: Official Republican Communication [From Team Scalise]
subject: May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Get ready for your blood to boil!

| |
---
| | | **May God bless and protect Judge Jeanine Pirro!**

The Liberal Mob has declared all-out political war on the Trump Administration - and now they have a new target in the President's interim US Attorney in DC, Judge Jeanine.

---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf4pt0ekpvrj0qgjdn4l7e85q2qh603cjba21doo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "Jeanine pirro")
---

**[The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9433b2aaelm0pc0ve62231o3j7rppcsnhfu0mag_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "The moment she was named, the Liberal Mob unleashed in a coordinated political hatchet job to destroy her:")**
* SNL debuted a DISGUSTING skit attacking her on Mother's Day
* A DNC operative called her an "EMBARRASSMENT"
* A prominent Liberal talking head called her a "LUNATIC"
* The Atlantic fired off a hit piece smearing her as a "PARTISAN HACK"
* The New Republic slammed her as "UNHINGED"

Judge Jeanine served as a District Attorney and has defended our values for decades. But her qualifications don't matter to the Liberal Mob.

They're going scorched earth against her anyway in a desperate attempt to:** 1)** eviscerate the reputations of Trump allies, **2) ** drive Republicans down at the polls, and ** 3) ** spin up Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

_It 's about power and money. Nothing else._

**That 's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for MAGA Patriots in moments like this. [So we're activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zphjqthq04smhqqnbuoq71oefdevgq7vp0d13qvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "So we’re activating our biggest fundraising blitz of the year. We just set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month to make sure we have the resources needed to hold the line.")**

We know it's ambitious.

But every dollar we collect will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and broadcast the truth about President Trump and his closest allies.

If we falter, the consequences could be catastrophic: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials, including the President himself.

**NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So we urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month ...**

RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW!

**This is the defining moment of the MAGA Movement -** **[will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvslgr4v204fk45d298ssjotj1kvkds8jhlpf348_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "will you rise to the challenge and join the fight?")**
---
**[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaj7jvbgpa10ckielqh8rln3genstdstple13a5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1i20mgbeduf34js436mhuljvrmlnv83muc9rd0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2mv8c9jr4b9kot4qlcvjqtmqiqtlab7fucvdcc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)**
---
- House GOP
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_

---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze5a22mh50fh0fi5nml6sl6f9si1an6qns7kvpl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "Liberal Trump Resistance")
---

If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
---
| | | [DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpook7m037mp5b5jgtf669qt4k6ttn6hm1a11rj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs "DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW")

name: Elise Stefanik [House GOP Leadership Chair]
subject: I’m watching this race like a hawk for a few reasons:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team.

Hi, this is Elise Stefanik!
I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team.
Now that I'm officially staying in the 119th Congress, I'm meeting with colleagues to make sure we have what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican Congress for all four years of his term.
Our margins are so thin, so that will depend FULLY on a few important races in a few battleground districts.
One of those is my friend, Monica De La Cruz.
Monica rocks. She's a pro-Trump Hispanic conservative who helped turn out Latino voters for the President. I'm watching her race like a hawk for a few reasons:
1) The Democrats named her as their ONLY TARGET in all of Texas2) Liberal groups are already hammering her with FAKE NEWS attack ads3) If we lose her seat, the Democrats will take COMPLETE CONTROL
[You know I don't beat around the bush - so I'll just come right out and say it: I'm personally asking you to send a few bucks directly to MAGA hero Monica De La Cruz.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5vjh10rgfrce7ueopgocl3tgv5i3hqratihb0io_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze31n24o7lo6b0unrc0cn8lqltcckm4mp02938kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)[SUPPORT MONICA HERE ->
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z92utjkjon1ukfnuig4plj67pbdq1i3u88mt7omg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)Every penny counts in this fight. The Democrats ALREADY started pouring cash into South Texas to destroy her, and the only way to save this seat is hard work, grit, and having the resources to fight back.
The entire fate of our Majority could very well come down to Monica winning or losing.
[So with all that in mind, is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 to Monica's campaign right now?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7kbbetdgidislqh4umlob66ludq2546tg0u5658_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)
Monica is a true patriot who will fight to the bitter end for our values AND our President. Let's show her we've got her back.
Thanks for standing with me and with Monica. We're in this together!
For America,
Elise StefanikHouse Republican Leadership Chair[SUPPORT MONICA HERE ->
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf04du27t0tbt773a6mra0elduc75ksk6lr0aci8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)
* * *
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z46hv1i7cd8gq0nmh8cvh9lunu1je10jcmkgn538_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)National Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list!
There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now.
[So I'm pleading with you to help me save Texas-15 today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z74sopvo1hemf4k7lc8nqjt16n4jtrgi8pl3udu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjmao76clh2bs)

clean_body: I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team. Hi, this is Elise Stefanik! I was just named Chair of our House Republican Leadership team. Now that I'm officially staying in the 119th Congress, I'm meeting with colleagues to make sure we have what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican Congress for all four years of his term. Our margins are so thin, so that will depend FULLY on a few important races in a few battleground districts. One of those is my friend, Monica De La Cruz. Monica rocks. She's a pro-Trump Hispanic conservative who helped turn out Latino voters for the President. I'm watching her race like a hawk for a few reasons: 1) The Democrats named her as their ONLY TARGET in all of Texas2) Liberal groups are already hammering her with FAKE NEWS attack ads3) If we lose her seat, the Democrats will take COMPLETE CONTROL penny counts in this fight. The Democrats ALREADY started pouring cash into South Texas to destroy her, and the only way to save this seat is hard work, grit, and having the resources to fight back. The entire fate of our Majority could very well come down to Monica winning or losing. Monica is a true patriot who will fight to the bitter end for our values AND our President. Let's show her we've got her back. Thanks for standing with me and with Monica. We're in this together! For America, Elise StefanikHouse Republican Leadership Chair * Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list! There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now. - Monica De La Cruz| | | | | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Sen. Markwayne Mullin **[set the record straight on CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8e038d-7bc8-4ba6-9464-20ac1bdcf6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about President Trump accepting Qatar's luxury jet gift despite Democrat outcries.
Mullin refused to let him spin the story...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8e038d-7bc8-4ba6-9464-20ac1bdcf6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8e038d-7bc8-4ba6-9464-20ac1bdcf6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
CNN host Jake Tapper raised concerns that Attorney General Pam Bondi formerly was a lobbyist to the United States on behalf of Qatar, "Do you have any concerns about her giving the clearance?" Tapper asked Mullin.
**["Why is this an issue?! I can't figure it out!"](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8e038d-7bc8-4ba6-9464-20ac1bdcf6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Mullin asked. "Last time I checked, we were okay when France gave us the Statue of Liberty."
"Some of the concerns I've heard raised, again by conservatives as well as liberals, is that Qatar is the home country of the political leadership of Hamas, Qatar has funded terrorism, Qatar is the supplier of propaganda via Al Jazeera,... people do not think that Qatar is a good faith actor on the world stage.
Mullin fired back, explaining that talks to gift the jet to the U.S. began under the Biden administration a year ago, "No one is discussing that part! They're just discussing that the deal ended with President Trump! Maybe the media doesn't know, maybe I'll give you a pass on that one!"
Watch the heated interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8c8e038d-7bc8-4ba6-9464-20ac1bdcf6b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Birch Gold Group](https://substack.com/redirect/1c8cb7a1-e70a-42e1-aa09-cd59f3ae729c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **Central Banks Are Hoarding Gold Before July (Here's Why)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c8cb7a1-e70a-42e1-aa09-cd59f3ae729c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Central banks across the globe are buying gold at the **fastest pace in modern history** - the highest annual totals ever recorded.
_Why the urgency?_ They recognize that the BRICS nations can do **incredible damage to the dollar**.
Hi, this is Donald Trump Jr., here with an urgent message.
BRICS has slowly created an **alternative global financial system** - designed to function entirely outside the dollar. Central banks understood this plan years ago, and the damage it could inflict on the dollar. Their solution? _**Convert their dollars to gold.**_
At a summit this July in Rio de Janeiro, BRICS is poised to announce their alternative to the dollar-based financial system. This "Rio Reset" represents the moment when their years of behind-the-scenes preparation becomes public. And it's for this moment that central banks have spent years preparing for. **Will Your IRA or 401(k) Follow Their Lead?**
As BRICS prepares their shot at the dollar, most Americans' retirement remain exposed.
The good news? You can follow the central banks' strategy with a Gold IRA - _before_ the Rio Reset this July. Don't wait until after July and the Rio Reset, when everyone may be rushing to buy. Central banks are acting now - and so should you.

# Young Republican FIRES BACK at Jasmine Crockett for trashing Trump in front of congress
GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[fired back at Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing President Trump and his administration of "ignoring" law and order to achieve his ends.
Gill called Crockett and the rest of the Democrats out for being bold hypocrites.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Imagine the type of world where the President does whatever he wants and no one can reign him in!" Crockett exclaimed. "It's a world that right now many people are afraid of!"
"If Joe Biden would've done an executive order despite what the Supreme Court said, that would've been a problem!" she added. "What it means to have law and order in this country is that you follow the order and you go through the appeals process even if you dislike what the judge did!"
**[Gill began his response by directly addressing Crockett's complaints.](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "In the lead up to the 2024 election, Democrats knew that they couldn't fairly win, they were running a candidate who's cognitive state was declining before our very eyes on national T.V. while they were trying to tell us that he was sharper than ever," he began. "They were trying to tell the American people that defunding the police makes our communities safer, that men can get pregnant and should be sharing locker rooms with our daughters,..."
"In order to get over this messaging issue they began to flood the country with people that they thought would eventually become Democrat voters!" Gill explained. "What we witnessed was a grotesque exercise of raw political power by the Democrats against their enemies!"
**[Watch Gill tear Crockett and the Democrats apart](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for their crocodile tears over Trump's "abuse of power."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c73d13d9-7119-401f-8a5a-aa83d7809111?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Biden's cancer diagnosis raises "cover up" red flags
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/755ef42b-b0e6-4e4d-8f46-e56b2219215c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former President Joe Biden, 82, was diagnosed with an aggressive form of prostate cancer, graded a Gleason score of 9, after a "small nodule" was found during a recent medical exam. The cancer has spread to his bones, his spokesman confirmed. Medical experts have expressed disbelief that such an advanced stage went undetected, given Biden's access to routine healthcare. Prostate cancer is typically caught early through PSA blood tests, recommended for men over 50.
Dr. Howard Formman called it "inconceivable" that Biden's condition wasn't monitored earlier, noting that a Gleason 9 cancer would have shown elevated PSA levels for years. He questioned how Biden, who likely underwent frequent PSA tests, could be diagnosed so late. Dr. Steven Quay echoed these concerns, explaining that even aggressive prostate cancer takes 5-7 years to metastasize without treatment. He suggested it would be "malpractice" for Biden's cancer to be first detected at this stage in May 2025, implying the diagnosis may have been known but not disclosed during his presidency.
Donald Trump Jr. speculated about a possible "cover-up" regarding Biden's health.
"What I want to know is how did Dr. Jill Biden miss stage five metastatic cancer or is this yet another coverup???" the President's son wrote on Truth Social.
Despite the concerns, Biden's team has not addressed the timeline of his diagnosis. Experts hope treatment can maximize his quality of life. The situation has raised serious red flags about transparency in reporting the health of the president to the American people.

body:
Dems are pushing for control...

|
Friend,
The Left is coming after Wisconsin and **control of the House is at stake**.
Liberal activist lawyers from out of state are pouring money into Wisconsin and launching aggressive redistricting lawsuits to flip my congressional seat. They’re trying to rig the map because they know they can’t win on their ideas. If they get just one seat in Wisconsin, we lose control of the House of Representatives in DC. Once again, all eyes are on us in Wisconsin.
We can’t let them succeed.
I’ve fought hard in Congress to defend our conservative values, and now I need your help to keep fighting. [**Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to protect this district and the House majority?**](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=7db37ad842&e=561a28864e)
Every dollar helps us push back against the Left’s money machine and defend Wisconsin’s voice in Washington.
Let’s stop this power grab together.
Thank you,
**Scott Fitzgerald**
U.S. Representative, Wisconsin’s 5th District

clean_body: Dems are pushing for control... | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend, The Left is coming after Wisconsin and control of the House is at stake. Liberal activist lawyers from out of state are pouring money into Wisconsin and launching aggressive redistricting lawsuits to flip my congressional seat. They’re trying to rig the map because they know they can’t win on their ideas. If they get just one seat in Wisconsin, we lose control of the House of Representatives in DC. Once again, all eyes are on us in Wisconsin. We can’t let them succeed. I’ve fought hard in Congress to defend our conservative values, and now I need your help to keep fighting. Every dollar helps us push back against the Left’s money machine and defend Wisconsin’s voice in Washington. Let’s stop this power grab together. ## John Brennan Makes Himself Look Worse With Jaw-Dropping Defense of James Comey on ’86 47′ Post – RedState
Former FBI Director Jim Comey created a firestorm with his post about the shells he found on the beach that formed the message "86 47." Many interpreted that as a threat against the life of President Donald Trump, given the commonly-understood meaning of the term 86 — meaning to kill or get rid of [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/yu8GqsruSSLliwi3pIl8ZsaZbGNL0LbduZjpHf4vYYsCO-AgLnmGJSWMx_zp2G94l1jvIT-a0wUrNLd-jBkXjp5i1YtH8TRLqB39L4y2JwejIYoIwrBKopQJPuFi4DmQQ9GyPTl0ceLNayjUA38iOn6mdJpgSbj6QS6qdDu5moNXeq-mQizUemiYxB1Qx4eY40_XFuPtrvC_CJTH6lATY_zw-TgnkDaaoUqcKLLYK4uFe9PYJ3lkGSntRNoCCdqy1-44RqVGyZjaY_LyvMdAqulGSg5tplzF142_nCh9aq88CNZxQQInWBK85GGIb0Guaj-bDF0fFO_s4ss2gCaF4updfbUkn39smtNJRdRclVz1b9O3oeneMfySVlKgcwcp2ru5vdovGCd9skRkmoo/aJBggWF85cHaGdY0GsiEI40iwjgVMM7P/9)

President Donald Trump’s election was greeted in Europe with outright fear by parties of the Left and wary apprehension by the center-right but with open elation by a resurgent sovereigntist Right. Now the Left and the center are regrouping and coming up with a strategy to rein in the surging populists. One day, there is a faint pale-green flush in the trees, then the next day, there are leaves, fully formed, with that beautiful pale green of spring. It’s a great time of year, but then, every time of year is a [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/QnSK0z6oeaVQu9oC8ekP-Pixoz6s5YC-8Iqv1elj6hI0ZuB-EfpwlnlLnjcLSzXspd7AVGL9NMOqw0-Sbji1-hZn9_gbrwp0V1kcWg5Khm3kkxDBu-lP7lzSsUBUYXO89f8UzafpAzQKKaN0qoO8roKuDBhlo17VgrhezWmnC3COPyyZ9ekPnmRCg4LvYIqxuhwdK_-hVHYEblKAoTBAjcDzGGJqiUwg4sleeKWT_8aaaZTKTuHmUWLfzYobXGYULjxVjnGEis5utQvgwGkP1l4NMo8InfBAg49JK7HXS6OulacD7bEfhjl9c5zG8fsVbm96j5Yy6-ClJj--6nJHOFhEimYSyzMFKfvlryEOPgYcGuq7/XPdCw9NZO8PMHx--o9wB14m1cKmsF76v/9)

On Sunday night, however, the measure survived a crucial House vote and will live [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/B5GlXMT7ZnuKNT9MQ1HAC2l9WbhnRcG2BkESyJqaErsJOT63jim0gm_5gkvsuaKpNC8hR9_d6WHhD9VTsXDi9JJa27ZycpRKCvS0C9yL-MZYqK5EIuQ5xoxzxlZWQhX2LvqjCyfp5cQVyFtKYWulxCWe9ir9AbEQHBbVFwbe6A9kOAC8Q8CXspfHP8VEYJ0dRLwjkXp5KbIoQw9Ml3axpaNwyaGsdnj0PtzOX9Ua0hkaIWYWzZaI7d0eu-DdnzIxFee47t9WG5uPW-unN6OvPQwAxWY1JQgkjI0686RQk5pj413cGxASlOs-h1jHoM8OwPr88ddMEp7DxnZAohyhj7ChcTsg6d83BTn5wLvUhJkaJ3ipIblqpqOXipW5uaJ2T4ghYEfYCPNJ/fOCO0T9OZl_KrPHbIeFUkDDkGOpgxfyS/9)

## The Worst News Outlet of the Week
For the past week there was basically one topic that dominated the news cycle – the media. With excerpts released from the Jake Tapper-Alex Thompson book on the decline of Joe Biden and the impact on the election, the press has been in a cyclone of spin and reassessments of their own behavior. Given [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/cC0CU75gkNBqKrGmh279RdMP5jgcEh_4uxTW0o-6Va9pEDn-Ksa0LVN5Jpq5v9b5aYl4ZjVWwfjJ7Dk3DaHqLJ4rOqeBxHDmqqp9Cn0-xiJnzNi5HLYj9YiMlgbrL1laSuIITUzF4LpGyxznIh2BzH1uzfBvWlepkotH_arnDbJCUTqPe1ufriLZDcrh6HN40vYL4Mi2A3iYZsxrV_jrQC1f8P-anj1ZrcEMqdvPTphBQAn34XmUuCoIKRWUJ3CYUWC2Kxq9_1VPVGYWLbYXXO3eQ027fFJoXG0HroiN5Rg-Uz8YdHEum1BOpdU/TVrK0rLYJJYvQ_b4TGq-wYXXefzb0EWI/9)

name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.

| | |
#
---
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zag42f4fiqt3dmg829di5coujfol9f8a4khfg1k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1q1es45mc31cccgaqmqj1grb7vkcg79ss7ikif0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.**[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgvjo1lvdnp3lf9kom61pdqpr4tklsainfk9u4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoclpr06uh4v6i3njji0chu8ijdom6v7ee7f9fg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly.In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won.Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck.It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it. We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level.But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage.Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9she6reltg8d73kb5g1fvt54u17uiae2lo6dt00_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)****If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0ve964mdav10iuhbd0bfi5jkmcee4f3h3ofic0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkbijbk1s9qomac5h0pe9jh7c5lnrouc0429mob8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
Founder and President
---
NumbersUSA
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtmn9dn5f6hoob7l5eu49b4s3702nd3b44o5at8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
| | **P.S.** I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. **[So please, don’t delay — click here or the button below to complete your Birthright Citizenship Survey and stand with us today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9i6ahpsins0euc65jvlcmhnq2kde4nd42170u10_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)**
---
**Take the Survey**
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakmhicetn0r3dscht7tk4p1iod97mn6b6pvg4ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)
---
NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence.
---
**NumbersUSA.com**
---
|
---
**NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation**1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5r54sgtp93757oqq44u05tirvcd5gob6cq1vcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c5im9p71c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjoipd4h7dn8304ghl0fkbma1dbnbknjl85fie7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvhquknpu1gu1eqpo7v01okeutqpc51obgk28e7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm6pr1c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT: Stop What You’re Doing and Call Your Rep
body:
We must make changes to the One, Big, Beautiful, Bill – Call now!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** In November you voted for America First, and as we've seen since then, not all Republicans are on board with this new direction. And then last week, the grassroots answered our survey about a few urgently-needed changes that need to be made to the One, Big, Beautiful Bill--and we heard you loud and clear.
Now it's time to make sure your U.S. Representative hears you loud and clear about exactly what America first means and what Americans want in the One, Big, Beautiful Bill.
* **Start work requirements for Medicaid right now** - don't wait until 2029.
* **Stop spending money on Green New Deal and Inflation "Reduction" Action** - That's killing our economy, and middle-class America.
* **No more "free" money**--including no $1,000 "MAGA Account" giveaway.
**The time to make changes to this bill are rapidly dwindling.** The final version could be voted on in a couple of days. We must ensure that the strongest bill possible is sent to the Senate.
**ACTION:** **Call your representative right now!** Use the United States Capitol Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask for your House Representative. Don't know who your representative is? That's okay, **[go to this website](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab1fcf09/1edb9794ab1ee016 "https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative")** and input your zip code, then call the switchboard and ask for your representative's office. Once you are connected, give your name and the city where you live, and then read those three bullet points above to the person who answers the phone. **We have a once in a generation opportunity to right the wrongs done to the American people and put our country back on track for us and future generations. We cannot allow Congress to throw this opportunity awa! Use your voice, use it today!** In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
