Start work requirements for Medicaid right now - don't wait until 2029. Stop spending money on Green New Deal and Inflation "Reduction" Action - That's killing our economy, and middle-class America. No more "free" money--including no $1,000 "MAGA Account" giveaway. The time to make changes to this bill are rapidly dwindling. The final version could be voted on in a couple of days. We must ensure that the strongest bill possible is sent to the Senate. ACTION: Call your representative right now! Use the United States Capitol Switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask for your House Representative. Don't know who your representative is? That's okay, "" and input your zip code, then call the switchboard and ask for your representative's office. Once you are connected, give your name and the city where you live, and then read those three bullet points above to the person who answers the phone. We have a once in a generation opportunity to right the wrongs done to the American people and put our country back on track for us and future generations. We cannot allow Congress to throw this opportunity awa! Use your voice, use it today! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin ______ ** ******** | | | | | | | This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$3.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $3 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
It’s a familiar spectacle.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2551%2E4032634%2EUS2E1Z)
---
It’s a familiar spectacle. You’ve seen it at Cabinet meetings. You’ve seen it in TV interviews. You’ve seen it in front of Congress. Donald Trump’s subordinates try to stay in his good graces by going on camera and lavishing him with over-the-top compliments. They lay it on thick, and this strategy often works out for them — after all, Trump’s primal hunger for praise is insatiable. But this recent example was _beyond ridiculous._ It came from RFK Jr., the Secretary of Health and Human Services. Normally, he’s busy firing experts and discrediting vaccines instead of addressing deadly measles and bird flu outbreaks. But last week, he stood next to Donald Trump at the White House and declared: _“There's writers like Elizabeth Warren or Robert Reich who are saying that President Trump is on the side of the oligarchs. There has never been a president more willing to stand up to the oligarchs than President Donald Trump."_ Where to begin... Do YOU agree with RFK Jr. that Donald Trump stands up to oligarchs? Do any of these actions sound like confronting the rich and powerful figures who’ve rigged the rules of our economy to make themselves richer and more powerful?
* Hosting million-dollar dinners between Big Pharma CEOs and their regulator RFK Jr.
* Turning the White House into a Tesla dealership
* Working to deliver a giant tax handout to his “rich as hell” donors
* Gutting agencies and firing staff that were investigating the companies of his co-president, Elon Musk, a.k.a. the richest man in the world
* Nominating billionaires to lead the Departments of the Treasury, Commerce, Education, and the Interior. And the Small Business Administration. And NASA.
* Inviting some of the richest men in the world — Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg — to enjoy prime seating at his inauguration, right beside family members and in front of cabinet nominees.
* Promoting a $5 million dollar “gold card” offering, inviting the wealthy to buy access to US citizenship.
* His son opening an invitation-only club in DC — called “the Executive Branch” — to host business and tech moguls who are looking schmooze with advisers and cabinet members.

**I didn’t think so.** Trump and his administration have paved the way for the president, his top officials, and his billionaire buddies to personally feed at the trough of government corruption. RFK Jr. won’t be able to stop me from calling out the Trump administration’s corruption. I’ve proposed the most ambitious set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate — including banning members of Congress, presidents, and senior administration officials from owning or trading individual stocks; slamming shut the revolving door between government and big businesses; and ending lobbying as we know it. And I’m working to get the rich to pay a fair share in taxes so we can fund opportunity for all — where every kid can get a great public education, every family can find a decent place to live that doesn’t break the bank, every parent can find quality affordable child care, and no one goes broke because they got sick. **Taxing the rich, rooting out corruption — that’s what it _actually_ looks like to stand up to oligarchs.** [**If you’re in this fight to end Washington corruption so our government can work for working families, and if it makes sense for you to make a financial contribution right now, please pitch in $28 or any amount to power our movement for reform.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3009?amount=28&t=8&akid=2551%2E4032634%2EUS2E1Z)

clean_body: It’s a familiar spectacle. | | | It’s a familiar spectacle. You’ve seen it at Cabinet meetings. You’ve seen it in TV interviews. You’ve seen it in front of Congress. Donald Trump’s subordinates try to stay in his good graces by going on camera and lavishing him with over-the-top compliments. They lay it on thick, and this strategy often works out for them — after all, Trump’s primal hunger for praise is insatiable. But this recent example was beyond ridiculous. It came from RFK Jr., the Secretary of Health and Human Services. Normally, he’s busy firing experts and discrediting vaccines instead of addressing deadly measles and bird flu outbreaks. But last week, he stood next to Donald Trump at the White House and declared: “There's writers like Elizabeth Warren or Robert Reich who are saying that President Trump is on the side of the oligarchs. There has never been a president more willing to stand up to the oligarchs than President Donald Trump." Where to begin... Do YOU agree with RFK Jr. that Donald Trump stands up to oligarchs? Do any of these actions sound like confronting the rich and powerful figures who’ve rigged the rules of our economy to make themselves richer and more powerful? Hosting million-dollar dinners between Big Pharma CEOs and their regulator RFK Jr. Turning the White House into a Tesla dealership Working to deliver a giant tax handout to his “rich as hell” donors Gutting agencies and firing staff that were investigating the companies of his co-president, Elon Musk, a.k.a. the richest man in the world Nominating billionaires to lead the Departments of the Treasury, Commerce, Education, and the Interior. And the Small Business Administration. And NASA. Inviting some of the richest men in the world — Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg — to enjoy prime seating at his inauguration, right beside family members and in front of cabinet nominees. Promoting a $5 million dollar “gold card” offering, inviting the wealthy to buy access to US citizenship. His son opening an invitation-only club in DC — called “the Executive Branch” — to host business and tech moguls who are looking schmooze with advisers and cabinet members. I didn’t think so. Trump and his administration have paved the way for the president, his top officials, and his billionaire buddies to personally feed at the trough of government corruption. RFK Jr. won’t be able to stop me from calling out the Trump administration’s corruption. I’ve proposed the most ambitious set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate — including banning members of Congress, presidents, and senior administration officials from owning or trading individual stocks; slamming shut the revolving door between government and big businesses; and ending lobbying as we know it. And I’m working to get the rich to pay a fair share in taxes so we can fund opportunity for all — where every kid can get a great public education, every family can find a decent place to live that doesn’t break the bank, every parent can find quality affordable child care, and no one goes broke because they got sick. Taxing the rich, rooting out corruption — that’s what it actually looks like to stand up to oligarchs. body:
Do you support Trump’s deportations?

Friend,

President Trump is calling for 20,000 more officers to assist with his deportation efforts.

**[He's doubling down on his successful strategy to secure the border and remove illegal immigrants from America in order to protect citizens like you!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zspvu6rcrti0gutk5qer2u0jkr21mp92179equh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdjm1pb6chh2bs)**

Under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, foreign criminals were able to smuggle drugs into America and menace law-abiding American citizens with near impunity.

President Trump and his allies in the Senate won't rest until we've fixed their mess by DEPORTING every last criminal illegal alien.

But radical Far-Left Democrats can't stand it...

_The same politicians who happily hired 80,000 new IRS agents to spy on your bank account are now up in arms about hiring 20,000 officers to remove violent criminals from America._

_They 'd rather facilitate an invasion of our country than do the bare minimum to keep you safe._

From radical, terrorist-supporting Hamas sympathizers to violent MS-13 gang members, the Democrats are actually fighting to protect these criminals!

name: Lee Johnson
subject: I'm running to retire Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5165d13f-65ba-4de2-92b7-837b731afe9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, My name is Lee Johnson, and I’m running for the United States Senate to retire Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. I wasn’t born into politics — I was born in a construction family — operating heavy equipment before I could drive. My family taught me how to build things — like roads and bridges — and I’ve carried that with me everywhere: from construction sites and factory floors to boardrooms. I’m running because Lindsey Graham has forgotten about the people back home. He’s leading the charge to gut Social Security and Medicaid, and now, he backs the chaotic tariffs that are raising prices and cutting paychecks across South Carolina. We need honest leadership in Washington. I’ll fight to ban members of Congress from profiting off of public service. And I pledge to serve no more than two terms as your Senator, to ensure that our state has fresh, accountable leadership in Congress. This is a fight we can win, but we need your support. [Can you split a donation between our campaign, and Blue Amp Action ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22d9998c-0be9-4ed2-9659-7a17c815c468/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec6b04d6-8cd2-464c-8a82-a929d1e0e8e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I believe that Washington needs more builders — not dividers. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - to build an economy that works for everybody, not just the elite few. Lindsey Graham hasn’t held a town hall in 8 years. He stopped listening, and we’re paying the price. That’s why I’m hitting the road to listen to voters across South Carolina and make their voices heard. [If you can, split a donation between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us reach voters across South Carolina and build a movement to beat the Washington establishment and fire Lindsey Graham.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e444eeb-5b95-45eb-87e4-d64321b8cb9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) From building infrastructure, to working on major water and energy projects, to leading major companies — I’ve spent my entire life building things from the ground up and fixing them when they break. I know how tough it is just to get by right now. Prices are rising. Wages aren’t moving. The gap between the haves and have-nots is widening. And politicians in Washington — like Lindsey Graham — have left us behind. That’s why I’m running for the US Senate. [Split a donation between our campaign and Blue Amp Action today to join our fight and together, we will fire Lindsey Graham.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td92270d1-0aba-4b71-b20a-8ce61ef5daca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Lee
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac77434f-d2d4-4e42-8323-1db5d5a1035e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: There is hope
body:
Every day that passes, Republicans are getting closer and closer to passing a bill that will cut Medicaid...
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=611%2E2563979%2EvJLGB7)

Every day that passes, Republicans are getting closer and closer to passing a bill that will cut Medicaid, food assistance programs, veterans' health care and housing and so much more all to give more money to people in this country who already have it all.
It is nothing short of some of the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country taking away from people who are struggling just to get by.
We're sorry to put that thought into your head -- but it is what is on the brink of happening.
The good news -- the glimmer of hope -- is that there are cracks in the Republican Party.
There are Republican elected officials who feel the pressure from ads, town halls, and organizing happening in their districts that their re-election is in jeopardy if they vote for these cuts.
They are right to be scared.
Which is why we have to keep up the pressure before time runs out.
[**Please, Peter. If stopping this legislation feels worth $5 to you, make that donation to the Democratic Party today. The DNC is leading the way on the organizing work that needs to get done to stop this bill. But they can't do it without the resources.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505019&refcode2=611_2563979_vJLGB7&akid=611%2E2563979%2EvJLGB7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

|
Grok is an AI (artificial intelligence) bot on Elon's social media platform X that users can ask to elaborate on topics or fact check other users claim. Last week, the bot started responding to user's requests with statements about "white genocide" in South Africa - a false claim often used by self identifying Neo-Nazis - and expressing doubt about the Holocaust, even if it was completely unrelated to the request from users.

---
| | [](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015-zXSDIVMgLkk6os7GE6jORE5Ht6SX_clZQht5Si693_k1ROhb2MvnyJM6x8Nty1viIVMVzejQG1AZjWKR5aSGgTZslEz5tAK9nFO6KqoTmzdaSsFYLcrevzQ5-OlnuOvlM7FXEvXnWb9n2yn9YyPTCTqSQrRi8-RBiGxBxNY7T2ZDg0HqIVi7ISMYhmbwFCGATworlFYahqNlO20LIxbQ==&c=43VqqMuAIzPCpTXRsopomNK4KkBOS8Zcn-UgEUtHBavVI1p-yl8pkA==&ch=5No4qn9xBhWJfW_Ata5LvjU6OLHQDfKgLQAttwGkluOpFrwPPpFtng==)
---
|
Restoring apartheid South Africa is a cause celebre in far right circles because of their adoration of the apartheid system in which black South Africans were basically enslaved in a hierarchy which placed white Europeans at the top. Elon's wealth can be traced to his parents' apartheid era diamond mine with horrific conditions, and Trump this week started bringing in white "refugees" from the country.
Last week, we highlighted how Kanye West's new song "Heil Hitler" amassed millions of views on X - aided by a formula Musk specifically designed to push extreme right-wing propaganda into Americans' social media feeds. Musk's AI bot pushing Nazi propaganda at the same time isn't a coincidence \- Elon Musk is intentionally using his social media platform to push blatant pro-Nazi propaganda and is testing a new superweapon to do so - AI. Fortunately, the way to counter this new superweapon is by doing the work that we already are \- boots on the ground, having real face to face conversations with voters in deep red districts and on conservative college campuses. Study after study has shown that the type of deep canvassing we do is the most effective tactic to persuade voters - even more powerful than the misinformation people read online.
Deep canvassing used to be something Democrats did well, but for the last decade Dems have increasingly diverted resources from canvassing to TV and social media ads that no one watches. It's no coincidence that during this time, the amount of Americans falling for misinformation pushed by the far-right has drastically increased.
National Ground Game PAC is gearing up for a big canvassing operation in the 2026 midterms, but we need help from supporters to build the infrastructure to effectively counter Trump and Elon's propaganda in key races that will determine the control of the House.
[Will you rush a donation to help us expand the amount of races we will be knocking doors in so that we can counter Elon's Nazi propaganda?](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015-zXSDIVMgLkk6os7GE6jORE5Ht6SX_clZQht5Si693_k1ROhb2MvnyJM6x8Nty1viIVMVzejQG1AZjWKR5aSGgTZslEz5tAK9nFO6KqoTmzdaSsFYLcrevzQ5-OlnuOvlM7FXEvXnWb9n2yn9YyPTCTqSQrRi8-RBiGxBxNY7T2ZDg0HqIVi7ISMYhmbwFCGATworlFYaheqTliEnQKKQ==&c=43VqqMuAIzPCpTXRsopomNK4KkBOS8Zcn-UgEUtHBavVI1p-yl8pkA==&ch=5No4qn9xBhWJfW_Ata5LvjU6OLHQDfKgLQAttwGkluOpFrwPPpFtng==)

clean_body: Elon Musk’s latest tactic would make the infamous Nazi propaganda minister, Joseph Goebbels, blush. | | | | | == | Friend Elon Musk's latest tactic would make the infamous Nazi propaganda minister, Joseph Goebbels, blush: | | == | Grok is an AI (artificial intelligence) bot on Elon's social media platform X that users can ask to elaborate on topics or fact check other users claim. Last week, the bot started responding to user's requests with statements about "white genocide" in South Africa - a false claim often used by self identifying Neo-Nazis - and expressing doubt about the Holocaust, even if it was completely unrelated to the request from users. | | == | Restoring apartheid South Africa is a cause celebre in far right circles because of their adoration of the apartheid system in which black South Africans were basically enslaved in a hierarchy which placed white Europeans at the top. Elon's wealth can be traced to his parents' apartheid era diamond mine with horrific conditions, and Trump this week started bringing in white "refugees" from the country. Last week, we highlighted how Kanye West's new song "Heil Hitler" amassed millions of views on X - aided by a formula Musk specifically designed to push extreme right-wing propaganda into Americans' social media feeds. Musk's AI bot pushing Nazi propaganda at the same time isn't a coincidence \- Elon Musk is intentionally using his social media platform to push blatant pro-Nazi propaganda and is testing a new superweapon to do so - AI. Fortunately, the way to counter this new superweapon is by doing the work that we already are \- boots on the ground, having real face to face conversations with voters in deep red districts and on conservative college campuses. Study after study has shown that the type of deep canvassing we do is the most effective tactic to persuade voters - even more powerful than the misinformation people read online. Deep canvassing used to be something Democrats did well, but for the last decade Dems have increasingly diverted resources from canvassing to TV and social media ads that no one watches. It's no coincidence that during this time, the amount of Americans falling for misinformation pushed by the far-right has drastically increased. National Ground Game PAC is gearing up for a big canvassing operation in the 2026 midterms, but we need help from supporters to build the infrastructure to effectively counter Trump and Elon's propaganda in key races that will determine the control of the House. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | We can't allow this propaganda to spread without a counter offensive. | | == | | == | == | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I'm sorry. Really:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
As your Majority Leader, my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason.

I am genuinely sorry, Friend.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._
**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. [You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement - and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb43fgi81d119ebacbo0gn8ukr878m3qogr2dor8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)**
Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.
They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.
[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z573tmhecfe3vhpiib3j6loipeiu74o6uhahosqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _
BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.
Our MOST IMPORTANT deadline yet is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.
[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final May deadline?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6upkk02dd8vm8uvh4u10f371fsqdk5ogp9j9ggg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z997e3n1sth2evs2kd99qtm7tm24bb1lbg78igq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.
God bless you, _- Steve_
**STEVE SCALISE** House Majority Leader

* * *
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmlk7cvdgp75btojp637lb236sphvnn7ils9oq0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

| | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zelmp0prsrt7d4buleok34emv11qo5g1159j065o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

clean_body: As your Majority Leader, my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. I am genuinely sorry, Friend. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our MOST IMPORTANT deadline yet is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader * | | Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zek6sj70k0fipiscvsak560hmu13ejbgrji302h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsrl5qua4aq7ccebs5vjd5rueufei0sro3q9f8dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zov98gi6rfripg3hnafgcbq9afu31267dh14umao_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk6vsoc1fgnugaqm67nfcfkb6bbugpk8d97j6nt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z975pg8dspehm62uupbgr8rfvi21ufricukjbd80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zitgm9qdt8e86jaeqhnqe2d2l3rg4ujvh4s0scbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv31210l7c40269hdm63cr1ct59140pect06d8g8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0m8e35q9rv4c7j7qdf08pi7h9ur0bjmvfsmka78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z81f9bp89v16casg7nh707monb09vru53ooaeq30_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zflg7gu65a8o14951v974a2np5p1n4eemg6622l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zluujl45tp5rb57n35uhbvndlkcb9pq6p76qlsto_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4dr32oa3dsf11kni04t0reede48tutlqfeai4vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdajrrgbnv55r8vr7briv6n9q8sikado2udgdc4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcsjh04kaugi3p1vnmogflukbehds7e1ohdl5cp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7cdge0pj4clh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

name: Maria Tenenbaum
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
My name is Maria Tenenbaum, and I’m the new Deputy Finance Director at the Minnesota DFL. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107970092/546428156/-2085207983?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmFiM2ZlYy1jMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nw6MC4OP9Cg5AbZPxcA4rdNdjaSjy-II-p6GbZXSOFk=)**
---
Peter, My name is Maria Tenenbaum, and I’m the new Deputy Finance Director at the Minnesota DFL. We’ll be working together a lot, so I wanted to reach out and introduce myself. I was born and raised in Minnesota after my family immigrated to this incredible state from Ukraine. I’ve been interested in politics from a very early age, and I pursued that passion at the University of Minnesota, where I studied Political Science. I got my start in public service as an intern with the Minnesota DFL House Caucus. subject: Jim Schultz is plotting a comeback
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Jim Schultz—the Republican who came within one point of defeating Keith Ellison in 2022—is “seriously considering” running for Attorney General again in 2026.

Let’s be clear about who Jim Schultz is: He’s a hedge fund executive who helps make the richest people in the world even richer. He’s never stepped foot inside a courtroom, let alone tried a case. And he’s pledged to attack Minnesotans’ reproductive freedoms, back book bans, and support a dangerous right-wing agenda if he’s elected.

MAGA Republicans are determined to replace Keith Ellison, because they know he’ll never bow down to the Trump administration or corporate special interests. They spent millions trying to defeat Keith in 2022, and they’ll double down if Schultz runs again.

It’s going to take everything we have to keep Minnesota blue next year. We need to start laying the groundwork now.

Peter, will you pitch in today to show your support for Keith and send a message to the people plotting a MAGA takeover of Minnesota?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250519ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250519ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250519ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

name: Kate Beeken (via Democrats.org)
subject: Introducing myself:
body:
It’s Kate Beeken, the Grassroots Partnerships Director at the DNC.
---
Hi Derek, It’s Kate Beeken, the Grassroots Partnerships Director at the DNC. My job is to keep our grassroots supporters like yourself informed and ready to take action in their communities. This involves knocking on doors during special elections, calling your representatives to hold them accountable, and sharing Democratic wins with your network. DNC Chair Ken Martin recently launched a new _Organizing Everywhere_ strategy to get the DNC out of D.C. and into the backyards of Americans across the country. The goal is to elect Democrats to all levels of office, _everywhere._ My job is to execute that vision. We’re working day-in and day-out to keep our volunteers engaged through town halls, informed with online trainings, and ready to go out into their communities to help get Democrats elected. Organizing is — _and always has been_ — at the heart of the Democratic Party’s strength. It’s how we move progress forward, even in the face of deep challenges. To do this, we need the resources to organize early, organize always, and organize everywhere. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to meet this moment with new energy, a new strategy, and a renewed dedication to the people and communities who make up our coalition, meeting them on the ground. $3 to help support a level of aggressive investment in organizing from this DNC that’s unlike anything we’ve done before. $3 to recruit and train the next generation of organizers on how we build infrastructure, scale programs, and engage the voters whose trust we need to earn or re-earn. **That’s why we have to start laying the groundwork _now_ to elect Democrats in 2025, 2026, and beyond. Any amount will help us build the foundation we need. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. ** **[Can you please contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee to help us build the strongest organizing program? No donation is too small.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250519_3442_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3442_22930333_L63BFM&akid=3442%2E22930333%2EL63BFM)**

$1. That's the contribution Ilhan Omar is asking you to make today.
That's right — just $1.
$1 to keep Ilhan in the fight for issues most important to our movement in Washington right now, like blocking Trump’s extreme agenda, protecting our civil rights, and securing a lasting ceasefire for Gaza.
$1 to send a powerful message to the right-wing super PACs and their billionaire donors that Minnesota's 5th district can't be bought.
$1 because we’re getting closer to the end of the month, and we have some important fundraising goals to reach before then.
The truth is that if everyone reading this email chipped in just $1 today, we'd CRUSH those goals and be well on our way to funding an unstoppable grassroots movement.
But not everyone chips in. That's why Ilhan's counting on supporters like you — who understand best what's at stake in this race — to stand with us today.

name: Steve Roberts
subject: Tornado Response - May 19
body:
| | | | City Update
---
| |
# **Tornado Response - May 19**
---

---
| |
---
**City Update****:**** **
Yesterday, the search and rescue phase of the storm response
efforts were completed. We are grateful to our first responders for their
tireless work checking every single building in the affected area for loss of
life. As the effort shifts towards recovery, the city, community organizations,
and many other partners are beginning to scale up response efforts. More
shelter space is becoming available, more volunteers are mobilizing, and a new long-term post-storm fundraising effort has been launched.
While the devastation is almost impossible to fathom, the St. Louis community’s extraordinary response in this difficult moment is easy
to believe. These past few days, I have had the privilege of witnessing the
very best of our city, hundreds of times each day. I am so proud to be a St.
Louisan.
TORNADO RESPONSE
**TOP ITEMS**
Planned Weather Response
Financial Recovery Strategy
Public Safety and City Services Update
St. Louis Public Schools
Debris and Recovery Efforts
Court Appearances **Planned Weather Response**
On Monday, showers are likely, then showers and possibly a
thunderstorm after 7 a.m. The high will be near 78, with a 90% chance of
precipitation. Showers will continue, and a possible thunderstorm will continue through the night. Showers remain in the forecast through Wednesday evening.
NotifySTL will provide weather updates and updates regarding
any escalating damage around compromised structures. An assessor crew is evaluating sirens in affected areas. City crews are working to restore the sirens before the anticipated weather.
**Financial Recovery Strategy**
The City has started to build the core prongs of its
financial recovery strategy.
* Mobilize the **cash philanthropic community** to support short and long-term efforts
* Secure **significant pro-bono supplies** from corporate sponsors or NPOs
* Thoughtfully **review ARPA**
* Build a **path to FEMA** (Federal Emergency Management Agency) disaster funding

**Mobilize Philanthropic Community - New Recovery Fund**
The Mayor’s Office worked with the St. Louis Community
Foundation to create a new fund for donations, the [City of St. Louis Tornado Response Fund](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoXCLfGDIRk4vD9efepnMDwXiIQS-2Bg3Rf-2FqapxZZO2klzPGLhg9SfcdfNomvGUOspXIOBVt2HqY6DMe9WEX-2FgsCvIMdU8aYb-2Bv3ge35jPZHlOlON5bjLeD0A-2BVWGHc3zUybfvdnIXLFXRdePD9B055Jvv-2BkwCuGNgQ1tIbFq6YIXiSZwrVn9j4jiOSJZPjFI0NCWKmONKGXx6d8wqIyLxrlcKkjqhYf7z80M61iwdNIwMm77VmdpCG1U2jy4X1sBVMg-3D-3D6HNU_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw2cPiIwOku9xLi2ymff01UavKeOl0-2F-2BkWX2XceeiNQwarDWJMOOz06aarqPiyecXIzej06VCjUJty8ZTtqhELc4jDzXBguVXpwp8C7V3NEOiMYBmOLQoAjtCi-2Bgxv5v-2BZpVGWyBXG2TQR-2FH3uQhW7uAC6K2j-2FRljNbZpduZ-2Fu9YCbOxtlhMH3iXNaRhXumWhoSFevAZ6ooiEc2vOD7VMaO2-2BlUo-2FfaP0NwC4-2B9CFQFSE99TFeBSVBGeVAu2A1vk-2FCoRMBBWDwFmvNby58GZfMDP9v81XO-2BJOOBOYzK51k9l9KmKL97kRK9-2FqnfcvKBL2n2nw8ZXVSSA9u7AMNAF4kmdiz5lydxycCFEao13kgQJtPmn8zcavYPJtnkJtbgBFHgUfwMD6dQ-2BkVhPpVElTiNuO3LVr3vR1mFPim93MrKB6y-2F46UMlwg-2BzzKRMw-2BMgcrJC-2B3CX-2FV7sujWJbWAS914-2Fp6N43iOshQFVlyQnLJbMQbHJgeEASQ2edE3SDlAkxGFSQFy0lbB4WDAB6QOXzOcQop4Nr0crlAFFoKOMJ1SFLegNmA-2F-2F-2FiLFysrYUnCaLokabkPFPszAex-2Bp-2BaH27ZJXNN43w-2F8umuxvwnZS263uT3GXZUkLhdwQZ6UmzijGataChAyeEYILOe7IAgfFR3bvkyGgtnmYGnSZf-2BG-2BSve10IFTxRJN8mS8-2B4QnJL0Tzkqkfjqw2iWh8C-2FId4Q82X3KlSM6Z1nCflcD4acUHzb2ZDqgGLlTqC0VtxVYCsdaCdA-3D-3D "City of St. Louis Tornado Response Fund"). Its creation follows conversations convened by Greater St. Louis with state and federal electeds and the business community regarding the need for significant private sector philanthropic support of the City’s post-storm recovery.
The Foundation will work with the Mayor’s Office to seat an
Advisory Committee to oversee fund deployment. It will be composed of civic leaders, community representatives, experts in disaster relief, foundation partners, and corporate partners. Foundation staff will coordinate grantmaking operations and distribution of funds.
Priorities guiding how received funds will be deployed
include:
* Meet immediate needs of those particularly hard hit: children, the elderly, the disabled, others displaced by the storm, the unhoused, small businesses, and others;
* Quickly deliver assistance to address immediate needs;
* Simple grant process so that immediate relief may be disseminated quickly; Meet mid-range and long-term needs of neighborhoods impacted by the tornado.
* Flexibility for priorities and grant processes to evolve over time with City’s needs

These funds will be in addition to the [Severe Storm/Tornado Relief Fund](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoXCLfGDIRk4vD9efepnMDwXiIQS-2Bg3Rf-2FqapxZZO2klzdptcOWlEw-2FD6OG2ScHxR6RlTfJCp2MdFS9wk3LDUwDrK9My-2BRS0arJV-2B9MAJBnL9-2FLIThmjgAnnbBtubOHDmF-2BFbp23YsQZB9wx7UQFLvL67QZdE6pUeEP3Y3eKr8yo8oo2gjdBpf1u4f76Om5QxKcbScgbxVHgLkazGN-2FZu41kz0d9Zc-2FkZBTGVZW2mjuXVEqOohk58S-2FSTorPrQR3T5BeN-2F1GMku3T27eQLyb7NGEtKjfSAHQVRLJ9z8WQ5BZ-2BVI9I_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw2cPiIwOku9xLi2ymff01UavKeOl0-2F-2BkWX2XceeiNQwarDWJMOOz06aarqPiyecXIzej06VCjUJty8ZTtqhELc4jDzXBguVXpwp8C7V3NEOiMYBmOLQoAjtCi-2Bgxv5v-2BZpVGWyBXG2TQR-2FH3uQhW7uAC6K2j-2FRljNbZpduZ-2Fu9YCbOxtlhMH3iXNaRhXumWhoSFevAZ6ooiEc2vOD7VMaO2-2BlUo-2FfaP0NwC4-2B9CFQFSE99TFeBSVBGeVAu2A1vk-2FCoRMBBWDwFmvNby58GZfMDP9v81XO-2BJOOBOYzK51k9l9KmKL97kRK9-2FqnfcvKBL2n2nw8ZXVSSA9u7AMNAF4kmdiz5lydxycCFEao13kgQJtPmn8zcavYPJtnkJtbgBFHgUfwMD6dQ-2BkVhPpVElTiNuO3LVr3vR1mFPim93MrKB6y-2F46UMlwg-2BzzKRMw-2BMgcrJC-2B3CX-2FV7sujWJbWAS914-2Fp6N43iOshQFVlyQnLJbMQbHJgeEASQ2edE3SDlAkxGFSQFy0lbB4WDAB6QOXzOcQop4Nr0crlAFFoKOMJ1SFLegNmA-2F-2F-2FiLFysrYUnCaLotANfJmbzK-2Bzzyl9hxVN5WNTDsNe2OaenRJVH7qjTtH3mocSVtlOB4CX7x1wW46eWhrd5at6qVe7nsJsB-2FkwOD2iCp73P1a2-2B5C7XHtIt-2Fu158XsTvd5xgviRIERyJeololnLHOKrMKQ7iPaSt6vqF1mNiCqLDelYy4X1OUUwRbJc-2FrfOC0vZdZKwtjEnjOEXg-3D-3D "Severe Storm/Tornado Relief Fund") coordinated by the United Way for disaster recovery.
**Thoughtfully Review ARPA**
The City continues to explore limited opportunities to flex its ARPA funds for storm response in compliance with its obligation and U.S. Treasury requirements. All ARPA contractors are required to verify with the City any use of federal funds for disaster-related purposes. Other paths to be explored.
**Pro-Bono Supplies**
Centene and McCarthy have brought in over 10 truckloads of
tarps, 2x4 plywood, screws, gloves, vests, tape, and Schnucks with truckloads of food. Convoy of Hope is en route to provide similar resources. Many resources have been distributed, more will be distributed tomorrow, and more is on the way from these and other large organizations. This is in addition to the many supplies from local community members and nonprofit organizations.
**Path to FEMA**
The Mayor’s Office remains in contact with the state and
federal officials as they pursue much-needed Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) aid. A City of St. Louis and a Missouri State Emergency Declaration have already been issued.
Receiving a federal declaration could take weeks to months.
In 2022, a flash flooding disaster occurred in late July (July 25-28), and the
Federal Declaration was received on August 8, 2022. Changes have been discussed regarding eligibility for federal declarations. The current Administration has been discussing significantly increasing this rate to shift more of the burden to cities.
We are **well over historical federal disaster declaration damage levels with $450 M-$1 B in estimated assessed damage** (extrapolated from 10-15% of properties surveyed thus far). We are beginning to systematically develop and deploy ways to track philanthropic and volunteer time investments in recovery efforts across the City. This will be critical to maximizing potential funds if a federal disaster is declared.
**Public Safety and City Services Update**
**Public Safety (Fire/Police)**
The Fire and Police Departments have largely completed immediate response work with search and rescue operations. The Police Department is continuing to patrol the region for safety, especially in areas with no power and downed traffic lights. Fire remains on standby for the Building Division, tied to building safety. The curfew remains in effect in the [5th and 6th Precincts](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoXCLfGDIRk4vD9efepnMDwXiIQS-2Bg3Rf-2FqapxZZO2klzqBDEmZxQFqoZ-2BtoloUX61fJGJxvYaq3YafA3zu8VdAO4eXgD92GcI4k7ovG78C-2BVpLQl8VQ-2BYJw75UmODJC1g4PCLTQrnHShIaGwcIuDleJLGxvIx3GD7DRx5-2FlsM0T2eSMVvQQlwCpM5tcFjthGntWxTNB1GiHUFfk9NwBL2gSaZD4keUvaTlOzkJIzQtPF1rkR8jQw8M1K2qTfhZnNG-2BYhUfr4YP4ZYPDYeBr-2BeSg-3Dd4_o_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw2cPiIwOku9xLi2ymff01UavKeOl0-2F-2BkWX2XceeiNQwarDWJMOOz06aarqPiyecXIzej06VCjUJty8ZTtqhELc4jDzXBguVXpwp8C7V3NEOiMYBmOLQoAjtCi-2Bgxv5v-2BZpVGWyBXG2TQR-2FH3uQhW7uAC6K2j-2FRljNbZpduZ-2Fu9YCbOxtlhMH3iXNaRhXumWhoSFevAZ6ooiEc2vOD7VMaO2-2BlUo-2FfaP0NwC4-2B9CFQFSE99TFeBSVBGeVAu2A1vk-2FCoRMBBWDwFmvNby58GZfMDP9v81XO-2BJOOBOYzK51k9l9KmKL97kRK9-2FqnfcvKBL2n2nw8ZXVSSA9u7AMNAF4kmdiz5lydxycCFEao13kgQJtPmn8zcavYPJtnkJtbgBFHgUfwMD6dQ-2BkVhPpVElTiNuO3LVr3vR1mFPim93MrKB6y-2F46UMlwg-2BzzKRMw-2BMgcrJC-2B3CX-2FV7sujWJbWAS914-2Fp6N43iOshQFVlyQnLJbMQbHJgeEASQ2edE3SDlAkxGFSQFy0lbB4WDAB6QOXzOcQop4Nr0crlAFFoKOMJ1SFLegNmA-2F-2F-2FiLFysrYUnCaLooETWYOhFIctUVsDFHW-2FWfImM9axknsWMyTZ10p6FXS5hGS-2Fu5DXeaKpqQlNFnoSxeRAk42Lf0eWXVEyTYGN-2BeMi5wBoOXTbGPMUyFnHApn-2BiFhYsTJP-2BAlLfu76nKqn02Kkkt1JUkhY5L2J6j2rMs-2BmcXfdwnQWTPeUSXdPnjCAxcXao26rwHMej-2BPelUwhUw-3D-3D "5th and 6th Precincts") from 9 p.m. to 6 a.m.
**Public Safety (Ameren)**
The primary focus remains senior living facilities, schools, and daycares. Almost all senior living facilities and an additional main line at the Chain of Rocks water plant are back online. Approximately 33,000 residents are still without power. Currently, more than 1,000 linemen are deployed.
Ameren’s work is now shifting to the more complicated restoration efforts with the most extensive damage. Their challenges include large trees pulling poles down, at least 200 broken poles, heavy vegetation blocking alleys, and structural damage impeding structural connection restoration. Ameren has its vegetation crews deployed alongside electricians at sites.
**City Services: Parks, Recreation, Forestry / Street Department**
Most staff have continued to work 12-hour shifts from 7a to
7p.
* **Parks, Recreation, and Forestry:**
* Cleared almost all blocked right-of-ways (ROWs) of downed trees for safe access/passage.
* Working directly with Ameren on a handful of remaining ROW’s blocked with downed utility wires in the trees and vegetative material.
* Awaiting a follow-up before clearing work can be safely done.
* Started removing City trees off homes with Street Department crane truck assistance.
* Working to mobilize a tree contractor for Monday to provide additional support (up to 20 crews, 100 field staff, 20 lift trucks, and 10 loaders).
* **Street Department - Street Division:**
* Helped Parks, Recreation, and Forestry remove 143 loads of trees and debris.
* **Street Department—Traffic/Lighting:**
* Crews were out until midnight picking up downed poles and wires.
* Four signal intersections were restored on May 18 on Kingshighway.
* Two rotating shifts of electricians are deployed to ensure continued work.
* As Ameren restores power to various areas, crews can get more traffic lights back up and running.

**City Services: Building Division**
Building Division has had 6-10 inspectors working everyday throughout the weekend. Commissioner Ware has begun the process of submitting an application for additional manpower support through SEMA's Structural Assessment and Visual Evaluation (SAVE) Coalition.
Building Division staff completed 573 damage assessments on May 18, bringing the weekend total to nearly 1,100 damage assessments since Friday evening. Many buildings are structurally unstable, and some will need to be demolished.
**City Services: Water Division**
The Water Division reports a stable landscape with no
tornado-related issues in City water mains. Ameren has restored a second line of power to the Chain Rocks Plant, strengthening it ahead of the inclement weather. Some customers have reported customer-specific issues due to tree-fall damage. The Water Division is working to restore these via contractors through the service line insurance program.
**Human Services: Shelters**
Status of open shelters to direct individuals, in
partnership with the Red Cross:
* **[Full] Grace United Methodist Church** : 6199 Waterman Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63112
* **[Open] The Recreational Center** (12th and Park Recreation Center): 1410 S. Tucker Blvd, MO 63104
* **[Open] Friendly Temple Outreach Center** : 6356 Dr. Martin Luther King Drive, St. Louis, MO 63133
* **[Opening on 5/19] Refresh Community Church:** 929 North Hanley Road, St. Louis, MO 63130

Shelters provide breakfast, lunch, and dinner that are also
open to individuals not staying in the shelter.
Live updates to shelter capacity at [www.stlouis-mo.gov/tornado](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoXCLfGDIRk4vD9efepnMDwXiIQS-2Bg3Rf-2FqapxZZO2klzPDyBr-2BXKJcxekYEY84zAWKSy76vnl-2F9-2F6ULxFYHXBUPmCz4q-2BkpqJAEvGR2UM5OQW7DUsErDx6HUECpy2TMtBchaVqrexHtd3jR3C2P-2FeWHmmwgpLssXweUglKCrX5PGcSjSotHh98nECX1pXhHw628GTP1f2S13X406TpNHgKx4r4koHvgAtqNR9PvWvJhLDlxyqwHC62HKCznVUKBsDqTO5UU5vnmHapHS4N9Q9TA-3DTZHj_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw2cPiIwOku9xLi2ymff01UavKeOl0-2F-2BkWX2XceeiNQwarDWJMOOz06aarqPiyecXIzej06VCjUJty8ZTtqhELc4jDzXBguVXpwp8C7V3NEOiMYBmOLQoAjtCi-2Bgxv5v-2BZpVGWyBXG2TQR-2FH3uQhW7uAC6K2j-2FRljNbZpduZ-2Fu9YCbOxtlhMH3iXNaRhXumWhoSFevAZ6ooiEc2vOD7VMaO2-2BlUo-2FfaP0NwC4-2B9CFQFSE99TFeBSVBGeVAu2A1vk-2FCoRMBBWDwFmvNby58GZfMDP9v81XO-2BJOOBOYzK51k9l9KmKL97kRK9-2FqnfcvKBL2n2nw8ZXVSSA9u7AMNAF4kmdiz5lydxycCFEao13kgQJtPmn8zcavYPJtnkJtbgBFHgUfwMD6dQ-2BkVhPpVElTiNuO3LVr3vR1mFPim93MrKB6y-2F46UMlwg-2BzzKRMw-2BMgcrJC-2B3CX-2FV7sujWJbWAS914-2Fp6N43iOshQFVlyQnLJbMQbHJgeEASQ2edE3SDlAkxGFSQFy0lbB4WDAB6QOXzOcQop4Nr0crlAFFoKOMJ1SFLegNmA-2F-2F-2FiLFysrYUnCaLot4781PsXhYIj4qCqEcUQnbbhb1o8-2Fc6aguPats596LH-2Bu9vZLW3LpmAn-2FV-2FkrSJA3hH3dRia5PkDurtlN-2BfsvCRFhBvf1ztnKr8zlvO-2BFyKQu1egYfQKakBH4q65IBy4RNTisaN04OGVNSVsOfdBvkImPEwLi-2BKNFYUJjQgZXnmCV6PKFx5-2F7qPm8WU20pONg-3D-3D "www.stlouis-mo.gov/tornado").
**DHS - St. Louis Area Agency on Aging and Office on the Disabled**
The St. Louis Area Agency on Aging delivered 979 meals to 13
senior living communities yesterday with the support of volunteer organizations like the Urban League. Meal delivery will continue on May 19. The U.S. Department of Human Services approved 13 senior living communities to be designated as temporary “congregate meal sites,” allowing them to use federal Older Americans Act dollars to pay for meals delivered to those sites.
Collaborated with the Red Cross to chart a course for
additional shelters for seniors and people with disabilities. Initiated
preliminary conversations with a major food distributor to discuss longer-term support for home-delivered meals for homebound seniors.
**St. Louis Development Corporation**
SLDC began local business canvassing efforts to understand
the business impact and opened up a hotline to respond to requests for
assistance.
**St. Louis Public Schools** St. Louis Public Schools (SLPS) reports that the storm impacted 18 schools. There will be no bus service on Monday, May 19, as the SLPS bus depot was damaged. Students and staff from affected schools are being rerouted to unaffected schools, and the district is notifying them. The last day of school is Thursday.
**Debris and Recovery Efforts** Mayor Spencer convened the region's biggest contractors in
collaboration with Greater St. Louis, Inc., and the Regional Business Council
to discuss debris removal and long-term neighborhood restoration, including:
* Rusty Keely, Keely Companies
* Bob Clark, Clayco
* Christie Brinkmann, McCarthy
* Chris Koster, Centene
* Doug Weible, Fred Webber
* Mike Rallo Jr, PARIC

Immediately after, the City convened a clean-up project management team with reps from these company partners and Streets/Forestry to develop a 24-hour response plan.
On Monday, May 19th, volunteer contractors will begin debris removal along MLK, where Urban League and 4theVille are based. We ask that residents pile debris close to the streets but not block them. The City will haul piles as quickly as possible, but it will take a while.
The group will also begin meeting with Streets/Forestry to discuss the role of out-of-state contractors coming in to support tree removal.
The team will work on a 7-day action plan, which will be
followed by a 30- and 90-day debris plan.
**Court Appearances** Due to the recent tornado, and the large numbers of people
without power or with damaged homes, the City Court will not issue any warrants for failure to appear for court sessions during the week of Monday, May 19 to Friday, May 23. New court dates will be scheduled. The clerk's office will be open for customer service and payments during regular business hours on Monday through Thursday and until 12:00 noon on Friday.

**About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

clean_body: | | | | City Update | | Tornado Response - May 19 | | City Update: Yesterday, the search and rescue phase of the storm response efforts were completed. We are grateful to our first responders for their tireless work checking every single building in the affected area for loss of life. As the effort shifts towards recovery, the city, community organizations, and many other partners are beginning to scale up response efforts. More shelter space is becoming available, more volunteers are mobilizing, and a new long-term post-storm fundraising effort has been launched. While the devastation is almost impossible to fathom, the St. Louis community’s extraordinary response in this difficult moment is easy to believe. These past few days, I have had the privilege of witnessing the very best of our city, hundreds of times each day. I am so proud to be a St. Louisan. TORNADO RESPONSE TOP ITEMS Planned Weather Response Financial Recovery Strategy Public Safety and City Services Update St. Louis Public Schools Debris and Recovery Efforts Court Appearances Planned Weather Response On Monday, showers are likely, then showers and possibly a thunderstorm after 7 a.m. The high will be near 78, with a 90% chance of precipitation. Showers will continue, and a possible thunderstorm will continue through the night. Showers remain in the forecast through Wednesday evening. NotifySTL will provide weather updates and updates regarding any escalating damage around compromised structures. An assessor crew is evaluating sirens in affected areas. City crews are working to restore the sirens before the anticipated weather. Financial Recovery Strategy The City has started to build the core prongs of its financial recovery strategy. Mobilize the cash philanthropic community to support short and long-term efforts Secure significant pro-bono supplies from corporate sponsors or NPOs Thoughtfully review ARPA Build a path to FEMA (Federal Emergency Management Agency) disaster funding Mobilize Philanthropic Community - New Recovery Fund The Mayor’s Office worked with the St. Louis Community Foundation to create a new fund for donations, the "City of St. Louis Tornado Response Fund". Its creation follows conversations convened by Greater St. Louis with state and federal electeds and the business community regarding the need for significant private sector philanthropic support of the City’s post-storm recovery. The Foundation will work with the Mayor’s Office to seat an Advisory Committee to oversee fund deployment. It will be composed of civic leaders, community representatives, experts in disaster relief, foundation partners, and corporate partners. Foundation staff will coordinate grantmaking operations and distribution of funds. Priorities guiding how received funds will be deployed include: Meet immediate needs of those particularly hard hit: children, the elderly, the disabled, others displaced by the storm, the unhoused, small businesses, and others; Quickly deliver assistance to address immediate needs; Simple grant process so that immediate relief may be disseminated quickly; Meet mid-range and long-term needs of neighborhoods impacted by the tornado. Flexibility for priorities and grant processes to evolve over time with City’s needs These funds will be in addition to the "Severe Storm/Tornado Relief Fund" coordinated by the United Way for disaster recovery. Thoughtfully Review ARPA The City continues to explore limited opportunities to flex its ARPA funds for storm response in compliance with its obligation and U.S. Treasury requirements. All ARPA contractors are required to verify with the City any use of federal funds for disaster-related purposes. Other paths to be explored. Pro-Bono Supplies Centene and McCarthy have brought in over 10 truckloads of tarps, 2x4 plywood, screws, gloves, vests, tape, and Schnucks with truckloads of food. Convoy of Hope is en route to provide similar resources. Many resources have been distributed, more will be distributed tomorrow, and more is on the way from these and other large organizations. This is in addition to the many supplies from local community members and nonprofit organizations. Path to FEMA The Mayor’s Office remains in contact with the state and federal officials as they pursue much-needed Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) aid. A City of St. Louis and a Missouri State Emergency Declaration have already been issued. Receiving a federal declaration could take weeks to months. In 2022, a flash flooding disaster occurred in late July (July 25-28), and the Federal Declaration was received on August 8, 2022. Changes have been discussed regarding eligibility for federal declarations. The current Administration has been discussing significantly increasing this rate to shift more of the burden to cities. We are well over historical federal disaster declaration damage levels with $450 M-$1 B in estimated assessed damage (extrapolated from 10-15% of properties surveyed thus far). We are beginning to systematically develop and deploy ways to track philanthropic and volunteer time investments in recovery efforts across the City. This will be critical to maximizing potential funds if a federal disaster is declared. Public Safety and City Services Update Public Safety (Fire/Police) The Fire and Police Departments have largely completed immediate response work with search and rescue operations. The Police Department is continuing to patrol the region for safety, especially in areas with no power and downed traffic lights. Fire remains on standby for the Building Division, tied to building safety. The curfew remains in effect in the "5th and 6th Precincts" from 9 p.m. to 6 a.m. Public Safety (Ameren) The primary focus remains senior living facilities, schools, and daycares. Almost all senior living facilities and an additional main line at the Chain of Rocks water plant are back online. Approximately 33,000 residents are still without power. Currently, more than 1,000 linemen are deployed. Ameren’s work is now shifting to the more complicated restoration efforts with the most extensive damage. Their challenges include large trees pulling poles down, at least 200 broken poles, heavy vegetation blocking alleys, and structural damage impeding structural connection restoration. Ameren has its vegetation crews deployed alongside electricians at sites. City Services: Parks, Recreation, Forestry / Street Department Most staff have continued to work 12-hour shifts from 7a to 7p. Parks, Recreation, and Forestry: Cleared almost all blocked right-of-ways (ROWs) of downed trees for safe access/passage. Working directly with Ameren on a handful of remaining ROW’s blocked with downed utility wires in the trees and vegetative material. Awaiting a follow-up before clearing work can be safely done. Started removing City trees off homes with Street Department crane truck assistance. Working to mobilize a tree contractor for Monday to provide additional support (up to 20 crews, 100 field staff, 20 lift trucks, and 10 loaders). Street Department - Street Division: Helped Parks, Recreation, and Forestry remove 143 loads of trees and debris. Street Department—Traffic/Lighting: Crews were out until midnight picking up downed poles and wires. Four signal intersections were restored on May 18 on Kingshighway. Two rotating shifts of electricians are deployed to ensure continued work. As Ameren restores power to various areas, crews can get more traffic lights back up and running. City Services: Building Division Building Division has had 6-10 inspectors working everyday throughout the weekend. Commissioner Ware has begun the process of submitting an application for additional manpower support through SEMA's Structural Assessment and Visual Evaluation (SAVE) Coalition. Building Division staff completed 573 damage assessments on May 18, bringing the weekend total to nearly 1,100 damage assessments since Friday evening. Many buildings are structurally unstable, and some will need to be demolished. City Services: Water Division The Water Division reports a stable landscape with no tornado-related issues in City water mains. Ameren has restored a second line of power to the Chain Rocks Plant, strengthening it ahead of the inclement weather. Some customers have reported customer-specific issues due to tree-fall damage. The Water Division is working to restore these via contractors through the service line insurance program. Human Services: Shelters Status of open shelters to direct individuals, in partnership with the Red Cross: [Full] Grace United Methodist Church : 6199 Waterman Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63112 [Open] The Recreational Center (12th and Park Recreation Center): 1410 S. The City will haul piles as quickly as possible, but it will take a while. The group will also begin meeting with Streets/Forestry to discuss the role of out-of-state contractors coming in to support tree removal. The team will work on a 7-day action plan, which will be followed by a 30- and 90-day debris plan. Court Appearances Due to the recent tornado, and the large numbers of people without power or with damaged homes, the City Court will not issue any warrants for failure to appear for court sessions during the week of Monday, May 19 to Friday, May 23. body:
Paid leave. Child care. Health care. Not strollers. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107975662/546444404/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250519_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2JjODk3ZS1jYTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iy5lSB1w6TuuiAfEobv8O4nZluSol1o3YMyoSJyZtk=)
---
Peter, Trump thinks the problem is strollers. While he rambles about baby gear, working families are drowning from the costs of child care, paid leave, and health care. **He doesn’t get it — and frankly, he doesn’t care to.** And Republicans in Congress are no better. They’re blocking every attempt to make life easier for families and bending over backward to secure tax breaks for billionaires instead. Fair Shot PAC is working to change that. We’re dedicated to supporting Democrats in key Senate and House races who actually understand what’s at stake — and who are ready to deliver real relief. **But we can’t do that without your help.** **[Can you chip in $5 now? Your contribution will help us support candidates who are fighting for paid family leave, affordable child care, and the dignity every working family deserves.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107975667/546444407/-1036732795?amount=5&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250519_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2JjODk3ZS1jYTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iy5lSB1w6TuuiAfEobv8O4nZluSol1o3YMyoSJyZtk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [PITCH IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107975671/546444412/-549607442?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250519_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2JjODk3ZS1jYTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iy5lSB1w6TuuiAfEobv8O4nZluSol1o3YMyoSJyZtk=)

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump admin threatens to arrest former FBI director because of seashells?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Republicans to cut the fake "86 47" outrage, and recant their threat to arrest Comey](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43bc7664-d7a1-435f-bcb6-3842cd51f228/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T923c25d2-2213-4077-8806-c76dc78118e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | So the same Republicans who cheered when violent January 6th attackers were let loose, and who laughed out loud over the hammer attack that nearly killed Nancy Pelosi's husband, are now [demanding](https://default.salsalabs.org/T377673b2-a47d-4cfd-aa5b-5e0b3fd48729/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that former chief James Comey be arrested for plotting to assassinate Donald Trump because he forwarded a picture with "86 47" written in sea shells. [Which, according to these same Republicans, means "assassinate" Trump, even though nobody here on planet earth actually uses it that way.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T199e176f-f52e-488d-bb24-b149aa3c0e11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) (86 means to dump, vote out, get rid of, hide, etc.). And now the Secret Service is being forced to investigate this "threat" as if it were a real thing. And Tulsi Gabbard, director of national intelligence, even though she has none herself, it calling for Comey to be jailed. This what happens when you give horrible and horribly stupid people actual power. [**Add your name: Tell Republicans to drop the fake outrage, and end the threat to arrest Comey. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfc05911-4130-4e67-b6eb-c6456afef3cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

# ACTION ALERT: VOTE YES ON SB 269
|
---
SB 269 by Senator Charles Perry / Representative James Frank would require healthcare providers to report vaccine and drug-related adverse events.**

TAKE ACTION NOW BY URGING MEMBERS OF THE HOUSE CALENDARS COMMITTEE TO PLACE SB 269 ON THE GENERAL STATE CALENDAR FOR A FLOOR VOTE!**
**1- Email the Calendars Committee Members**

|
---
| | [ Click here to generate an email to all committee members! ](mailto:todd.hunter@house.texas.gov,toni.rose@house.texas.gov,terry.canales@house.texas.gov,stan.gerdes@house.texas.gov,cody.harris@house.texas.gov,ana.hernandez@house.texas.gov,ann.johnson@house.texas.gov,jeff.leach@house.texas.gov,janie.lopez@house.texas.gov,ramon.romero@house.texas.gov,carl.tepper@house.texas.gov?subject=Vote%20YES%20on%20SB%20269&body=Dear%20Representative%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20you%20to%20please%20place%20SB%20269%20on%20the%20General%20State%20Calendar%20immediately.%0A%0AThis%20bill%20would%20increase%20transparency%20and%20strengthen%20informed%20consent%20for%20pharmaceutical%20products.%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)

body:

# [#]
Peter, it’s official – Gov. Abbott signed his billionaire-backed school voucher scam into law over the weekend. It’s a disaster.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_051925_HEADLINES_ATO_D1_S1_RES1

It’s estimated that a billion tax dollars will be spent on Abbott’s voucher scam in the first two years. Reallocating money from Texas public schools will lead to closures in underserved areas and undermine protections for students of color and students with disabilities.

Evidence shows that vouchers overwhelmingly benefit the wealthy, and they don’t lead to better academic outcomes for our students.

We absolutely must mobilize supporters at every level to elect a new generation of progressive leadership in Texas who will help us fix this mess.

Can we count on you to support our efforts on the ground? Together, we can work to ensure our public schools are places where ALL students can learn and succeed – no matter their age, race, gender, or ZIP Code.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_051925_HEADLINES_ATO_D1_S1_RES1

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Democrats' answer to MAGA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
We’ve got to listen to voters and persuade them. Those are the two tenets of the rebirth of the modern Democratic Party.
That’s why I’ve been traveling to red districts all over the country – listening to voters and sharing my vision for a 21st-century economic patriotism.
https://www.vanityfair.com/news/ro-khanna-steve-bannon-blue-maga [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/ro-khanna-steve-bannon-blue-maga]
A reporter from Vanity Fair joined me on a recent trip to western Pennsylvania and Silicon Valley. Will you take a few minutes to read the article? [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/ro-khanna-steve-bannon-blue-maga] Text me at (650) 999-9610 to let me know what you think.
Thank you for your support, your activism, and everything you do.
Onward,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: circling back: (DOTL)
subject: Are you against a Trump impeachment?!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
we heard NOTHING from you, Peter!

|
---
Peter,

We reached out earlier about Jamie Raskin’s effort to impeach Donald Trump for executive overreach...**and we heard NOTHING from you!**

We’re hoping that this is a system error, so we’re nudging you again to sign the “Impeach Trump” petition before our extended deadline at 11:59pm tonight!

As Trump tries to throw democracy over the brink with his reckless executive orders, trade wars, and DOGE’s destructive policies – we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up!
