name: Giffords.org
subject: “By far the most dangerous thing this administration has done”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit idly by.
#

Team — we hate to come to you with bad news on a Monday. But we need to let you know about this dangerous development:
**The Trump administration just effectively legalized machine guns.** One person said this is “by far the most dangerous thing this administration has done” on gun policy. Let us explain.
Late Friday night, we learned that the Trump administration gave in to an extreme gun group and agreed to legalize forced reset triggers (FRT), devices that convert regular firearms to fire like machine guns — allowing guns to fire more shots and enabling shooters to inflict even more damage.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=1&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)_Picture of a forced reset trigger_
The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) classified the FRT as a machine gun. Under federal law you cannot buy a machine gun — new machine guns have been illegal for civilians to purchase since 1986 and should only be used by our military.
[**This is not a moment when we can sit idly by. We need you with us to fight back against this new dangerous action from the Trump administration. If you’re ready to join the fight, please rush a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC right now:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=2&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=3&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)**
It comes as no surprise that this news dropped on a Friday. Donald Trump knows that this is unpopular.
It is abhorrent that our president is choosing to prioritize gun lobby profits over gun safety when nearly 46,000 people die from gun violence every year in America, and when it is this country’s number one cause of death for children and teens.
[**We will be fighting with everything we’ve got to make sure that all of our hard-earned progress is not trampled on by the Trump administration. Please, chip in to GIFFORDS PAC right now to help us with this critical work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=4&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may25.u1Lybj&amount=3&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=23&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)**
---

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may25.6Aau9J&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=25&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may25.hX5Ig4&refcode=em250517-1-no&t=26&akid=10450%2E3935704%2EXCvtCr)**

Thank you,

body:
State-level races don’t always make headlines, but they shape everything.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107979525/546457548/1328794144?refcode=ea.660c5ea5-d034-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.660c5ea5-d034-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MGM1ZWE1LWQwMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sdQ6HzCcH-q9t5_Riju9vmL_pRgioGfwb5PVEs3VGAU=&emci=1dd96a0f-c334-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=660c5ea5-d034-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107979526/546457549/2105508926?refcode=ea.660c5ea5-d034-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.660c5ea5-d034-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MGM1ZWE1LWQwMzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sdQ6HzCcH-q9t5_Riju9vmL_pRgioGfwb5PVEs3VGAU=) Virginia is holding some of the most consequential elections of 2025. This November, every single seat in the Virginia House is on the ballot, and the outcome will determine whether we protect our progress on climate or lose it all. That’s why JanePAC is going all in. **We’re proudly endorsing 11 bold climate champions for the Virginia House of Delegates.[These critical races are often decided by just a handful of votes, so your donation right now could mean the difference between winning and losing. ### **Mike Lee 's Porn Crusade: The Latest from the Party of Projection!**

Incel-based organism Mike Lee's latest stunt, trying to ban pornography nationwide, [is less about "protecting morality"](https://substack.com/redirect/a193abbe-96ba-4a90-a1a7-a163b839991c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and more about flexing authoritarian control over what Americans can see, think or do in private. It's a free speech nightmare dressed in the lingerie of faux concern for public decency. Much as human oil-well Mike Lee hid his MAGA insurrection behind fake belief in the Constitution, his new Trojan Horse... going after Trojans, is to hide his party's total failure the past four months, the [mega-grifting from slightly-differently-hairstyled Kim-Jong Un](https://substack.com/redirect/5bd06527-27cb-4138-8a9e-309e456c6e38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and that under that lummox, Trump, [they have no idea who they even are](https://substack.com/redirect/40cecb84-1b63-4441-8dcf-8e06ec722091?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Here 's the kicker:** Porn is _hugely_ popular in red states. [Utah, Mike!](https://substack.com/redirect/c77013d6-6a9c-461f-871f-9af4f0014c44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Your own backyard has been topping Pornhub charts for years! In fact a study by Harvard (breathe, Mike, I know Harvard is one of your trigger words) Assistant Professor of Business Administration, Benjamin Edelman found...this!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/08a53d09-a993-4329-8949-6404438b59be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well, those are some mighty fine numbers they have there in Utah, Mike. You're #1! You're #1! I could include numerous studies showing what that third chart displays. Hawaii as the only outlier. Otherwise, red states are the most Pornorific places on our planet! And, c'mon, Hawaii gets a pass. It's all the way out in the middle of an ocean alone. Which probably reminds Lee of high school.
But facts have never stopped Republican hypocrites [like Lee](https://substack.com/redirect/caba234c-3ff2-45c3-8470-ee7d0ef9e381?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from typing with one hand, while, well, doing something else with the other. So, should we share the list?What the hell, let's do it: Donald Trump--a man whose body Mike Lee would seemingly lick clean if asked--was convicted of illegally paying off a porn star. The guy cheated on his pregnant wife, and became a GOP messiah.
Denny Hastert? The longest serving Republican House Speaker, who left office only a dozen years ago, went to prison for fondling underage boys while a wrestling coach. Speaking of wrestlers, Jim Jordan had his Beavis head looking in all directions but the one where a doctor was molesting college wrestlers in the showers near him. A number of those wrestlers have spoken before the Ohio State House saying Jim didn't just know, but called them, ["crying, begging" not to be exposed](https://substack.com/redirect/3f93a4c7-cbb8-4d58-bb32-a16f9612e6fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Matt Gaetz was set to Trump's Attorney General while being investigated for sex trafficking. As far as I know, that's still ongoing. Newt Gingrich? Three wives, and he served divorce papers to one while she was in the hospital with cancer. Ted Cruz got busted surfing porn on his congressional computer. But it was a staffer's fault! Ted was never on that browser, just like he was never in Cancun during a Texas ice storm.
Rudy Giuliani also went for the GOP special, three wives. Let's not even get into that Borat film. David Vitter? Prostitutes. Mark Foley? Congressional pages. Larry Craig? Married and sponsoring gay marriage bans while tap dancing in the Minneapolis airport bathroom, with other men, like he was Fred Astair. Corey Lewandowski, Trump campaign manager, accused of sexual harassment and assault (and there are fun rumors out there about him and costume-aficionado Kristi Noem, the dog killing, concentration-camp-pic-poser when not allegedly cheating on the hubs with Corey).
Marjorie Taylor Greene? Adultery. Lauren Boebert? Victim of the eternal hotness of Beetlejuice, which led her to star as Handsy McGee while in the audience of the last performance she attended. Pete Hegseth? Paid off a woman he allegedly assaulted. His own mom wrote him a letter excoriating him for his sick behavior (best to not sex Fox producers while married is an old saying, right?). While we're on Fox: Roger Ailes? Bill O'Reilly? Eric Bolling? How many Fox personalities haven't left that rathole of un-reason due to sexual harassment and/or assault?
In Elon Musk's case, no matter the size of his wallet, I'd start a GoFundMe to get him to stop having kids with random women. So, you see Mike Lee & Company, much like everything you do, this just pure horseshit to pander to religious nuts in your party who are doing all of this anyhow. Falwell Jr? Haggard? How they doing these days?
**Mike Lee and his ilk want to police your browser history while ignoring the predators walking their own hallways, the ones they call "leaders" and "friends." **Also, as long as it's just their white male voters logging on, no problem!
**Their moral panic is always about control, never accountability.** They'll scream about porn while passing laws that let child labor make a comeback, legalize child marriage or roll back women's rights so they can party like it's 1899. It's not just hypocrisy--it's projection wrapped in repression, served with a side of performative outrage. In other words, it's Mike Lee.

body:
This attack is not about saving money. It is about silencing independent, public-interest media.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107979783/546458100/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzMWViYS1kMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jkwQggEIh-3afJBY85OlnFxDqzi_-xycJauo3WMR0Y=&emci=0807a85b-162d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d8931eba-d134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Public broadcasting is under threat. The Trump administration has issued Executive Order 14290, which aims to eliminate federal funding for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS). **If successful, this move would devastate hundreds of local PBS stations — especially in rural, low-income, and underserved communities — and strip millions of Americans of free, trusted, and educational content.** PBS is not just television. It is a public service. [**Add your name and send a clear message: Public media belongs to the people — and we will fight to protect it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107979784/546458101/-141101102?contactdata=GE3nxrZCczAaWdhfRcGF/4L2nRgsqfDTzAI/XbTg1MpI0UTt5NhHyNEu+E1SgxwF7itPo4rK6zVwmNCtByJEE8Srpb+IJ4ezVkdnRTN5DEs4GYyXYGCjSu8+ZjqtGlnaK90RN4DdP9UGqWiTa7GbbQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzMWViYS1kMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jkwQggEIh-3afJBY85OlnFxDqzi_-xycJauo3WMR0Y=&emci=0807a85b-162d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d8931eba-d134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107979785/546458102/-141101102?contactdata=GE3nxrZCczAaWdhfRcGF/4L2nRgsqfDTzAI/XbTg1MpI0UTt5NhHyNEu+E1SgxwF7itPo4rK6zVwmNCtByJEE8Srpb+IJ4ezVkdnRTN5DEs4GYyXYGCjSu8+ZjqtGlnaK90RN4DdP9UGqWiTa7GbbQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzMWViYS1kMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jkwQggEIh-3afJBY85OlnFxDqzi_-xycJauo3WMR0Y=&emci=0807a85b-162d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d8931eba-d134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239) **For decades, PBS has offered fact-based journalism, lifelong learning, children's programming like Sesame Street, and award-winning documentaries that bring history, science, and culture into homes across America.** It reaches over 120 million people every month, and for many, it is their only source of non-commercial, accessible media. Defunding PBS would:
* Cut off educational programming for millions of children
* Undermine trusted journalism and local reporting
* Silence diverse and underrepresented voices
* Hit rural communities and small stations the hardest

[**This attack is not about saving money. It is about silencing independent, public-interest media. That is why I am asking you to sign my petition and demand that my colleagues in Congress:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107979786/546458103/-141101102?contactdata=GE3nxrZCczAaWdhfRcGF/4L2nRgsqfDTzAI/XbTg1MpI0UTt5NhHyNEu+E1SgxwF7itPo4rK6zVwmNCtByJEE8Srpb+IJ4ezVkdnRTN5DEs4GYyXYGCjSu8+ZjqtGlnaK90RN4DdP9UGqWiTa7GbbQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkzMWViYS1kMTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5jkwQggEIh-3afJBY85OlnFxDqzi_-xycJauo3WMR0Y=&emci=0807a85b-162d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d8931eba-d134-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9494239)
* Reject Trump's Executive Order
* Fully fund the Corporation for Public Broadcasting
* Protect local PBS stations from closure and cuts
* Defend the Public Broadcasting Act of 1967 and the democratic promise of free, accessible media

I have fond memories of watching Arthur with my sons on PBS. Whether it is quality time with Big Bird or winding down with Masterpiece Mysteries — PBS provides important educational, cultural, newsworthy, and public safety programming. I will continue to oppose any efforts to cut or eliminate their federal funding. clean_body: This attack is not about saving money. It is about silencing independent, public-interest media. | | | | Public broadcasting is under threat. The Trump administration has issued Executive Order 14290, which aims to eliminate federal funding for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS). If successful, this move would devastate hundreds of local PBS stations — especially in rural, low-income, and underserved communities — and strip millions of Americans of free, trusted, and educational content. PBS is not just television. It is a public service. For decades, PBS has offered fact-based journalism, lifelong learning, children's programming like Sesame Street, and award-winning documentaries that bring history, science, and culture into homes across America. It reaches over 120 million people every month, and for many, it is their only source of non-commercial, accessible media. Defunding PBS would: Cut off educational programming for millions of children Undermine trusted journalism and local reporting Silence diverse and underrepresented voices Hit rural communities and small stations the hardest Reject Trump's Executive Order Fully fund the Corporation for Public Broadcasting Protect local PBS stations from closure and cuts Defend the Public Broadcasting Act of 1967 and the democratic promise of free, accessible media I have fond memories of watching Arthur with my sons on PBS. Whether it is quality time with Big Bird or winding down with Masterpiece Mysteries — PBS provides important educational, cultural, newsworthy, and public safety programming. I will continue to oppose any efforts to cut or eliminate their federal funding. clean_body: The more you learn, the worse it gets. | If you want to know what kind of Governor Winsome Earle-Sears would be, Derek, just take a look at her report card. = As Lieutenant Governor, Sears has spent her time cozying up to far-right extremists, undermining reproductive freedom, and even dismissing attacks on Virginia jobs as if they were punchlines. No, really — it’s on tape. When she was faced with reports that thousands of Virginians’ jobs were at risk after Trump’s attacks on our economy, she literally laughed it off, saying she doesn’t understand “why the media is making it out to be a huge, huge thing.” To her, your livelihood isn’t as important as pushing her extreme political agenda. She’s making no effort to hide what she believes. Just weeks ago, she campaigned with the architect of Project 2025, for which she has proudly called herself a “cheerleader.” Sears even supports a near-total abortion ban here in Virginia, a long-standing theme in the Youngkin-Sears agenda. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Without a primary challenger, the general election has already started for Sears. The longer we wait, the more money the GOP pours into her campaign. It’s up to us to fight back. – Team DPVA [content goes here] Forwarded this email? Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/GnVNhtofnFbdPwhIHnXvkIhfC7q_66gSc0e4lP7LhY9kgBPa2brGLcuZEF3NbDrGvrYEHZdEYf4uMEf7oD7a86YA9HwgvmY6fI4VolNDWPxgUvNGuYjPl5yml5UMxUV6Z9kDFVf7NPSJdE4XtUINkGo4qOng_PR4W1MaA1dapnRHEfNQiygMqBnkERtemfadTrt59TWoMgyBYhw8bZEmenuM1jPbeXIfU2nNOHTQUqX8GO9VY9aAbngYVoAIR1IIxbOderkN_FIU0Vjqg8ZQytIaRYaBoE3Iwt4ZZRzoEcDWxA9A8qJ2CGDGHbQzuAfkJPC_vleTdS9TYfNDb96S6d1BmjHvS3sSjezY7ghTt7lKb6mBXieW6LnRkFYpK3ZGUjbz0AGGCD0HJtHQEDoEx2hhmqZz6KgFLUIbGQlyYxkv/Tn5vmthBSv1_qx4n3yjjqfzAFk3oEtvF/9 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/TQ_z8EaRd1OZUaf9TPFFzap5eMgErA6AhfGA-KsRbWfMK6xB0cI1kYbCBolvTUmiWy43J-UfCeNvNmf6wjF0zM9Led3Hg8GDbbM90FE42Gaf_VOPG3p8jd2Qn6m2ZOuXs1u5oWC26P7r2jrRmW34Ne7KDNzpTEJjfLKJmSiAruWEf6J-qAvX9aJ09pWed120ZuW7jFjQOekSD2atCiSPKGBGCUPrOxgelDlsGsQjamy6lTaz3Z8PBqbKXnHQ3wpamXwSgKpHBrukYKtwWBxQxzR476a7qqNf4doYgMPycTrnaJauFUJiX8Xi-VF3m_m9aq1VYNW4dn16fXyKXyErRfB5B-c8L22uGNONkQWB6Gnseu0OTYJkSpn_LPMYKwN0Ts90s0avdsCD8ykNFrSGx9BU3ZHP8Znz0KJYG9F4xMKN/t0ctaaVVzg3_ZrfvJBZOWWmcLGDwiCxS/9) [DISAGREE](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/LyLEJZiKLBvrK5qScPvCxA7ushMinf35SMbahZ896QtmRrvDHwbpfHFOwb1M_DQCH9svxKVK5QoYci9bm-LxHP0D5uT3qSK-HvxHzCnYtSVFCh3lGAg1mQvMO8T8dRAW686u_oagXeV0jULwgUrVP0JiES5ioqZs1hVSy5tavepXuv6Jb3958KWgoy_kqkuvTFowl5eeF7OuT9aUHUtGcOLYsYqkAma1ExGKSrCH1CHT1ji5HXzwTd57ENa196t8PimcGz3GnBEwMw4sZO9NUka5bbUxbR_WuLBhicvHdeFyrJrAVQoPGyFCLKn6uLCRD3XJYPRia0TeaP666f1rUKi1L7ht7n01anOqLLFXtO6VfsHkWYwrpqD_d9U6f4ALbnApU4-1TgRTgz4h7QrOyq7O62MyGwV-j-oYA2d0s5Jf/14KX_NGK_o5n6_FXXYpPwqjyIcLR4YEJ/9) [NOT SURE](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/Pq99YtDDmReadNi8QtgMc8ux3J85qRa4iU6kWpSo_wVke6XSu2ki1OYpjRV6U3yH6XpTYvyB2wIMphKaf60_I8q3i63bkr8679HnNFLqgygArEu5aW0VFNLsXPpjJNg5FX-0f3MDoBTYfjNkHHQFvKM_fdI54_W2jvYAHb6YYs_lY7awV9BMCAg25S4ThmK0bpW2c3ExjBUsvPALRLJOpdhW8TgG9JJZnpXR_XdLZssIQk9x69VPbFNOc1CMNgmOcMqygaYHAF2ndM2IH6ibe2NI9QxUJ3nGncro-_SfCbgSpL_oGU2VxsTZHWXkC612rqiO7j55Fqx8QDqfwfuzQO2gEbsKrTK6p0k-nrRzmZdGuz4CumbrgthWdh3iFtum4QPhP5BXMV5Q2fMPnEfitffAUEGE3GeK1n2nE3K--oWn/wbgoKcS99Fs0MrXRSJYUZt8-EPKx4302/9) Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today, our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/dD1z8dDAB45pj1h5iZHCopKim1QE-DLZJpN9ODcMtGfNgfI46BF-QnfpMmx63dQMhs-OaHlMWnDy4e88Von8Fqsapp-U25ug3Kj-pyABC8ekH9KfkQfKZAJr9fUYNDjwAV_VZAh3K6_13qSOdnrLCyMG4Fjx4xo8YZLk03hGIte28T00dxYtECA6BBDVMTL41Yy0Zt4I9T5mKV0aWaDrxScQM40b9t9OO50gDR5rjKsmzQpaY52qOgls2ylNY5pMQQcXpnq9SCZp3SFyBfOSw2YpvfqECaO9bHks-WDyNocdv_hPCGWZzCVk_iEnx4aQqsLSMNDQeqgL91-JFT0bNZtXcILlAJwliCsvmTL6u9FUPutj3e3xEveHkZNnNLXUbzZDuce-quX7zLUs4hjdjnbDQEaeX3cOpnraEY5F3uGT/YnL1D4309PvYbRdX3V6wvldg-J1hYPmM/9) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** The Second Amendment is under attack. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://info.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/P1bTU97DBUKKJbr9TQawebQ91vUu9t3t-vtrM4_F8ABnJ0bs7SFOyMl_yLeIgEC6SxLLeHBzmvjycV5-Y-O4CHa09piXMw2l78EZRstSjccDrFxv2_wYvbYGtu_MTFQ1U2X6DTQPlyF7wYlO2SJ7v0lTKRvfWNDV_x8ymfkJ-EAfuXU2mOxDEPMV3wqCpZl0yPfW3DJK69_3nEABahf9xbL7bvgzkzBjo3Bmv7z-2-4LBZ3wssWGpvUFwNDXosBWrp8Jma8WYA-Ncwhf232pPPfo9qzxB96cGQUtA6U5v5UxcRwzWas7kafOfNGyMMY5yY99pRXz5W18OmfeFXWu6GHZhwnqgS92twwg-HCloiuL9gMgtBJh_oiK_au2qTogsCK5opoCiODYMsY3PpQryuijrEyriOxaOGJFJzSsfsyV/k5iluPFuWtlyfib_ulqBUHSboefyjgdL/9)
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/JhsXC7TBevZFgHwf1LKlSgdjGGrxoZAgaLaQmJNGOAeM_jGIjoArl4moCUeo6S2xTX75OjLv3Sfly4zOFJ7JQo_q9g1n1SD7TrY4H21GhkzA1q8ozkq1EWj0b4JJzy3QCUOp5LcLztqLS_YavsJwQEuMdkUf8mEoKYokAfJl5Qa0LvZRd8jLAPj90TTnX-mlMh5pZYUqNoMTNLBxs62QUKoc79RMzg5xCQ/oiXjjMgUUxQ1GfXzZaoWGDTosASvW8op/9) [Unsubscribe from all communications.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/lbsntqBBI3MWnIDIW7pCyyGGT73i_jTKkeHQfrEzX7Yb9zOac8Keg5z_xt4Z4x8zU_AAiiq0vbVsbvLAj9OAdHwQu7Qu30OHaAuy48IVoJHUv_eWbY25Csonc51-ss5QASK8K6ipWsC1PX-mnNVQyQTWqnTUw-Un1HY2FMMf2Dyo6YI2MCsY-xBc/FGXVa0b4M9IKnlMcojPetZwC-oa0yEUI/9)

You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90211?t=6&akid=19889%2E878179%2EuxHFeu) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90211?t=7&akid=19889%2E878179%2EuxHFeu) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90211?t=8&akid=19889%2E878179%2EuxHFeu)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90211?t=9&akid=19889%2E878179%2EuxHFeu) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90211?t=10&akid=19889%2E878179%2EuxHFeu)

subject: Will you support Trump’s tax cuts and help protect American jobs? ANSWER:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The Left is panicking over Trump’s tax cuts—Here’s why:

| | | President Trump’s bold tax plan is ready to go–and it’s precisely what Americans need to take our country back. He’s locking in the 2017 tax cuts, cutting corporate taxes even more, and putting tariffs on foreign goods to protect American workers.

The radical left is terrified. They see this as a direct threat to their pocketbooks. **They’ll stop at nothing to undermine President Trump’s agenda and destroy the progress we’ve made.** But we can’t let that happen. The more we stand united behind this plan, the more power we give President Trump to fight for everyday Americans.

GOP leaders need to hear from YOU. Do you stand with President Trump’s tax plan? [**We need your answer NOW.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-vMVjA)

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ut9jWDmv3hTjIZyQ)

Thank you for standing with us.-GOP Alerts

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=566b5dd642894824bb27d808f785c2f8&_e=B6Rzo4Pr0gUfm-qTYOM-JdE_DjMo5ZxDcvxVRagDj9a5UUx-dFZQ_BDCQp6N8XDdmr1JVCgEhgbeuxaj6QCHScIc6k0CTnBRisqctxfmCPA2DSTZ3wHyCx_X8V9npiCJD5t-ogSgbG4LBWckX9MvqfnxQpVGseLWkGTefBEulMmEo2Xjm71K3LdqynSYsltCnVEjxXkl5jpQPmbPYeAxjtI-R-sMIHj1I7mnR3nohbCs8IsD8l-kYmK4aVVmIqemkKJdkDBfLM5p7oTFDCL8Idzux26zTXbxFXX2DhijRrkq2YcCeC79pEknZHaZgdU2qA-ZKmFc1TzAyEw7873AOv7uosoyRGPZsAwskEm3rbtc3HLLs42Ii3VJnOAAAPFxaZwXGlsWThLvGEhsHITAtarolueHp7F4Ykl7iiRzHNNTF9vHxozi_E1d4EtvK1mt)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $3 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. name: Monte Rio Redwoods local
subject: From my burrow to you, save these redwoods!
body:
Wildlife deserve a place to roam

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107981951/546465891/-1299648888?contactdata=Qxq4mJU+PT8CstFSBIZW7dpL0Ae2k5IXRlPQcgYCdkJFuLBpqJNK1EVIcCVtevFulok4tXKirhEtV60LnF4FvCTgpGkQok1DVMzVPBj7E2tnlwU/ecLhU+N9vPZ1b9FENIy7Q7vj7owx/wi+utMH8T+KECcmbigFNsojF+TolR4=&sourceid=1166308&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YmM0N2U5LWQ1MzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6gNYWrqme0LauVGHk5hWO4ZeD2iePvuTtzXN3Oedeik=&emci=5eaf1a4c-4620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=45bc47e9-d534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
---
Alright, listen up human!
I have a lot on my mind at the moment, and I don't have the time, or shall I say the _**room**_ for niceties.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107981953/546465893/2018652235?contactdata=Qxq4mJU+PT8CstFSBIZW7dpL0Ae2k5IXRlPQcgYCdkJFuLBpqJNK1EVIcCVtevFulok4tXKirhEtV60LnF4FvCTgpGkQok1DVMzVPBj7E2tnlwU/ecLhU+N9vPZ1b9FENIy7Q7vj7owx/wi+utMH8T+KECcmbigFNsojF+TolR4=&ms=MonteRio2_Image1&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YmM0N2U5LWQ1MzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6gNYWrqme0LauVGHk5hWO4ZeD2iePvuTtzXN3Oedeik=&emci=5eaf1a4c-4620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=45bc47e9-d534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
That’s me. Cute, ain’t I? I’ve been a little grumpy lately because my neighborhood has gotten a little...crowded. Don’t get me wrong, I love sharing my home with my community of critters, but I just wish I could nestle into a warm den and enjoy some peace and quiet. You know what I mean?
[**FYI, Monte Rio Redwoods is home to numerous species of wildlife, and we ALL deserve the space to roam comfortably.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107981954/546465895/2018652235?contactdata=Qxq4mJU+PT8CstFSBIZW7dpL0Ae2k5IXRlPQcgYCdkJFuLBpqJNK1EVIcCVtevFulok4tXKirhEtV60LnF4FvCTgpGkQok1DVMzVPBj7E2tnlwU/ecLhU+N9vPZ1b9FENIy7Q7vj7owx/wi+utMH8T+KECcmbigFNsojF+TolR4=&ms=MonteRio2_Link1&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YmM0N2U5LWQ1MzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6gNYWrqme0LauVGHk5hWO4ZeD2iePvuTtzXN3Oedeik=&emci=5eaf1a4c-4620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=45bc47e9-d534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551) Having more land would be a big deal for us badgers and certainly put me in a better mood.
Plus, you didn’t hear it from me, but those folks at Save The Redwoods League said they’re hoping to acquire and preserve Monte Rio Redwoods – that's over 1,500 acres of land that would unite over 22,000 acres of redwood forests. [**But they need your help.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107981955/546465897/2018652235?contactdata=Qxq4mJU+PT8CstFSBIZW7dpL0Ae2k5IXRlPQcgYCdkJFuLBpqJNK1EVIcCVtevFulok4tXKirhEtV60LnF4FvCTgpGkQok1DVMzVPBj7E2tnlwU/ecLhU+N9vPZ1b9FENIy7Q7vj7owx/wi+utMH8T+KECcmbigFNsojF+TolR4=&ms=MonteRio2_Link2&sourceid=1166308&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1YmM0N2U5LWQ1MzQtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6gNYWrqme0LauVGHk5hWO4ZeD2iePvuTtzXN3Oedeik=&emci=5eaf1a4c-4620-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=45bc47e9-d534-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
Could you imagine all the space we’d have?! Expanding this public land would connect all who use it to a larger connected landscape - which would be life changing for me and my wildlife neighbors. I’m grateful to know there are people out there who care about my home and all of its inhabitants.

clean_body: Wildlife deserve a place to roam Alright, listen up human! I have a lot on my mind at the moment, and I don't have the time, or shall I say the room for niceties. That’s me. Cute, ain’t I? I’ve been a little grumpy lately because my neighborhood has gotten a little...crowded. Don’t get me wrong, I love sharing my home with my community of critters, but I just wish I could nestle into a warm den and enjoy some peace and quiet. You know what I mean? Having more land would be a big deal for us badgers and certainly put me in a better mood. Plus, you didn’t hear it from me, but those folks at Save The Redwoods League said they’re hoping to acquire and preserve Monte Rio Redwoods – that's over 1,500 acres of land that would unite over 22,000 acres of redwood forests. Could you imagine all the space we’d have?! Expanding this public land would connect all who use it to a larger connected landscape - which would be life changing for me and my wildlife neighbors. I’m grateful to know there are people out there who care about my home and all of its inhabitants. Creating a livable, free-roaming environment for all creatures is top of my priority list. Thank you for making it top of your list today. Monte Rio Redwoods local | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: stepping up for this country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107982317/546467265/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTMxNDhlOS1kNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfIntN5LzFikggDz06hnFyz9DdeM7NfYDC_L7riQNCo=&emci=2e84e805-cb31-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=353148e9-d634-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894) Derek,

Growing up right here in Western PA, I learned the values we all know: hard work, service, love of country. Those values shaped who I am.

Stepping up after this country was attacked on 9/11 was an easy choice for me because of those values.

I went off to the Naval Academy at 17 years old to serve my country. I was commissioned as an active-duty naval officer, and led Americans at sea and in Iraq. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107982322/546467270/-1558066259?refcode=email_051925_RS&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTMxNDhlOS1kNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hfIntN5LzFikggDz06hnFyz9DdeM7NfYDC_L7riQNCo=) Two deployments at sea and a tour on the ground in Iraq shaped who I am and my worldview, and strengthened my love of country and my love of Western Pennsylvania.

I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: "Ship, Shipmate, Self." You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress.

But in Washington, I see politicians acting, instead, like a bunch of corrupt, corporate bootlickers.

You’ve got the VA Secretary saying the planned firing of 80,000 VA workers won’t hurt veteran care. You’ve got Elon Musk accessing *your* private data and calling Social Security benefits a “Ponzi scheme.” You’ve got the Trump administration pushing to slash Medicaid and hand more tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy.

**They’re gutting the programs hardworking families rely on, turning their backs on veterans, and raiding government resources—all to line the pockets of billionaires and corporate elites.**

Derek, I don’t know about you, but those aren’t the values I was raised with in Western PA.

I learned to fight for what matters, to stand by the people who have my back, and to never walk away from a fight that needs fighting. And I’m sure as hell not backing down now. [**I will always stand up for Western PA, but I need you with me. clean_body: Derek, Growing up right here in Western PA, I learned the values we all know: hard work, service, love of country. Those values shaped who I am. Stepping up after this country was attacked on 9/11 was an easy choice for me because of those values. I went off to the Naval Academy at 17 years old to serve my country. I was commissioned as an active-duty naval officer, and led Americans at sea and in Iraq. = Two deployments at sea and a tour on the ground in Iraq shaped who I am and my worldview, and strengthened my love of country and my love of Western Pennsylvania. I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: "Ship, Shipmate, Self." You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress. But in Washington, I see politicians acting, instead, like a bunch of corrupt, corporate bootlickers. You’ve got the VA Secretary saying the planned firing of 80,000 VA workers won’t hurt veteran care. You’ve got Elon Musk accessing your private data and calling Social Security benefits a “Ponzi scheme.” You’ve got the Trump administration pushing to slash Medicaid and hand more tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy. They’re gutting the programs hardworking families rely on, turning their backs on veterans, and raiding government resources—all to line the pockets of billionaires and corporate elites. Derek, I don’t know about you, but those aren’t the values I was raised with in Western PA. I learned to fight for what matters, to stand by the people who have my back, and to never walk away from a fight that needs fighting. And I’m sure as hell not backing down now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: MassDems
subject: Trump’s Qatari Jet & Growing Pattern of Corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter,
The recent revelations involving the acceptance of a $400 million luxury jet from Qatar are not only shocking, they’re dangerous.
This isn’t just about one plane. It is about a clear pattern of unethical and unconstitutional behavior. Here are the facts:
The “Gift” from Qatar
* The Qatari royal family has offered a Boeing 747-8 “Flying Palace” to the U.S. Air Force.

* Trump publicly called it a “free gift” and “a beautiful gift. Why wouldn’t I accept a gift?” (Fox News, Sean Hannity)

* The jet is reportedly intended to replace the current Air Force One, despite a separate $3.9 billion Air Force One contract signed in 2018, with delivery not expected until 2029.

* The current Air Force One is a Boeing 747-200B, in service since 1990. Trump described it as “smaller and less impressive.”

* Attorney General Pam Bondi (a former lobbyist for Qatar from 2020-2022) claimed the plane could be used legally and then transferred to Trump's presidential library. (Newsweek, 5/12)

* White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt insisted the gift was accepted “in full compliance with all applicable laws.”

* In reality, the plane will need full reconfiguration to meet Air Force One standards, likely costing U.S. taxpayers over $1 billion and taking at least two years. (NBC News 5/14)

* Once transferred to Trump’s library, he could use it personally and indefinitely.

Legal & Ethical Concerns
* The Constitution’s Emoluments Clause prohibits presidents from accepting gifts from foreign states without approval from Congress.

* Senator Lisa Murkowski and others raised serious constitutional concerns about this gift. (Boston Globe, 5/13)

* Rep. Hakeem Jeffries called it “unconstitutional” and said there’s no chance Congress would approve it. (AP, Hakeem Jeffries press conference, 5/13)

* The Senate Foreign Relations Committee flagged it as a national security threat and a clear example of foreign influence. (Boston Globe, 5/13)

Broader Pattern of Corruption and “Pay-to-Play”
* Three days before his inauguration, Trump launched the $TRUMP meme coin.

* Estimated profits: $350 million for Trump-owned companies (per Financial Times ).

* This week:

* Top 220 coin holders are invited to a gala dinner with Trump at his D.C. golf club.
* Top 25 holders will get access to a private reception with the President.
* The event is billed as “the most exclusive invitation in the world.”

* Eric and Don Jr. are leading a global blitz of profit-driven deals under the Trump name:

* A luxury hotel in Dubai
* A residential tower in Saudi Arabia
* A golf course and villa complex in Qatar - all announced before Trump’s Middle East trip

* Don Jr. and Trump allies are launching a private “Executive Branch” club:

* Membership fee: $500,000+
* Goal: Give business and tech elites access to Trump and his administration

Why This Matters
This is not normal. It is not acceptable. It is not legal without Congressional approval.
Millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, while Trump is normalizing the idea of taking luxury jets from foreign monarchies.
Accepting this plane from Qatar—a government with ties to Hamas and a record of human rights abuses—is not just unethical, it is a national security risk.
Silence from the Mass GOP
Massachusetts Republicans have remained silent in the face of these mounting scandals - a silence that amounts to complicity. At a moment when the ethical lines are being brazenly crossed, their refusal to speak out shows either cowardice or quiet endorsement.
The MassDems calls on the Mass GOP and every Republican candidate, especially those running for governor, to publicly reject this conduct.
The MassDems will keep exposing the Trump organization’s shameless efforts to profit off the presidency. This kind of behavior cannot be allowed to become the new normal in American politics.
Thank you for staying vigilant and standing up for democratic principles when others won’t.
Standing with you,
The MassDems Team
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Roy Beck
subject: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens
body:
I'm writing to you today because I believe you're an America First Patriot who's sick of the open borders madness.

| | |
#
---

---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)
---
My Fellow Fighter, I'm writing to you today because I believe you're an America First Patriot who's sick of the open borders madness.** ** **And that 's exactly who I'm hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_. ** **[**Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)** We're launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship... ...and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens. **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I'm asking you to complete today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution. Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln -- along with their children and their children's children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors... **And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.** In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to "persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof." But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States. Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand... **In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called "anchor babies" can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America. Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars? This is not by accident - it's by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015! Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts. **_But Trump can 't do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we've grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States. Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times "blamed" NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy's decades-long mass amnesty dream. It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington. The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that's not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It's because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken... ...and what it will take to fix it. We've never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent. **In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there's no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country. It proves that the immigration action we're calling for isn't just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA--**no, it 's the unmistakable _DEMAND_ of the American people.** And at that point, a politician doesn't need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a "one-way ticket to Palookaville." That's how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come. That's what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues. Since we don't take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[**So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)** **If you can 't make a larger donation at this time, I hope you'll just cover the cost to process your survey--$3.91.** We've run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials. And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. **[**Your completed survey and your donation will be an indisputable sign that the time for change has come.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)**
---
Thank you and God bless you today!
---
| | Roy Beck
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)
---
Founder and President
---
NumbersUSA
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)
---
| | **P.S.** I need to hear what you're seeing where you are -- and how you're thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. **[So please, don't delay -- click here or the button below to complete your Birthright Citizenship Survey and stand with us today!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1AXOkM_SE5LBHGzwOjWNxA~~/AARclBA~/GMz41M0Nl-0Dn28F15WuROg9rsNwnTB39iFxoWOD9kprh7cFoK2G4hIlJqmzt3cdoHZkRNrbWs07-BhZyOCnjyr_iHjhy-aMSs1DPydty2MeSGlMGnGNuhkB0KXo-3iFsdwh8dvulvuUrJ2H7ubora08u7uHznrY9fZRl6QGsc_AWnQRRpLDu1Mn7P4sToiDsjNp4zn7Ds9i60UQVm9UBtAa1ywTQlWjcqpIOMMTBH7gi35eVvplVWifFNL6J1j3uCI06dwWDtiX7UtJ4YK4Ow~~)**
---
**Take the Survey**
---
|

But Trump can 't do it alone. ~~ Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we've grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States. Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times "blamed" NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy's decades-long mass amnesty dream. It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington. The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country. To be clear, that's not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It's because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken... ...and what it will take to fix it. We've never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent. In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there's no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country. It proves that the immigration action we're calling for isn't just coming from me and the great folks at NumbersUSA--no, it 's the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people. And at that point, a politician doesn't need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a "one-way ticket to Palookaville." That's how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come. That's what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues. Since we don't take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. ~~ If you can 't make a larger donation at this time, I hope you'll just cover the cost to process your survey--$3.91. We've run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials. And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. ~~ Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck ~~ Founder and President NumbersUSA | ~~ | | P.S. I need to hear what you're seeing where you are -- and how you're thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. ~~ Take the Survey | | | ~~ NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America's largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. NumbersUSA.com | NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation 1201 Wilson Blvd 25th Floor Arlington, VA 22209 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: This officer deserves justice - not prison
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp_G2RFlxrdk4QUX5RwVCbVlUXXpOHZxFZPgBAfevoJStjPfzP_p12HovLsqIlcE8eDbkSASuiSIp885xPN32P5bvOzSanESu8BvW1w_0IRP-Gh0qcUePpbryxji5f_rW1MmeOLTdbBP-BGa26B9d5vKTdYq6tqCZVaBZFJICazIDkpzXTAuq8YyYUqoqgZQNhxM04KunMu8wgJ5waECyRF4LqhzTlDUjeZgLBJW3HNyHWz0RsM4zTrGvg-56UPWqcM0DeNdrCZYz7HPj2fT2fP4e2b6QLB-KBOsE8F6m2i53ezXLBJa30ujm5g07GdevmdRtcPsu86PQhJWfP29yZLCnwAAAP__YQ1uvQ)
| | Friend, It’s Sheriff Joe Arpaio here. You may know me from my time as "America’s Toughest Sheriff" in Arizona — but that nickname only tells part of the story. For over five decades, I’ve stood shoulder to shoulder with the brave men and women of law enforcement. I know firsthand the risks they take, the sacrifices they make, and the injustice they sometimes face for simply doing their jobs. Today, I'm writing to you about a young officer who urgently needs your help — Officer Salvatore Oldrati.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)
---
Officer Oldrati was doing exactly what he was trained to do: protecting his community, responding to danger, and making split-second decisions that could mean life or death. But instead of being supported, he's been targeted — charged with a crime for doing his job in a dangerous situation. You see, in the early morning hours of September 14, 2021, Corporal Salvatore Oldrati faced a life-or-death situation. Responding to a 911 call about an armed burglary in progress, Officer Oldrati and another officer encountered a man on the property brandishing a handgun. Despite repeated, loud commands to drop his weapon, the armed man refused — forcing Officer Oldrati to make a split-second decision to protect his own life and the life of his fellow officer. A .45 caliber handgun was later recovered next to the man, and Officer Oldrati immediately rendered life-saving aid before the suspect was transported to the hospital. After a full investigation by the New Jersey Attorney General’s Office, Officer Oldrati was cleared of any wrongdoing and honored for his service. But nearly _two years later_ — after being promoted and awarded Officer of the Year for the second time — radical prosecutors manipulated a grand jury, withheld key evidence, and indicted him on baseless charges. Officer Oldrati, a decorated 10-year veteran, husband, father, and third-generation law enforcement officer, is now fighting for his freedom against a politically motivated witch hunt.He urgently needs our help to cover legal expenses and support his family during this nightmare. Friend, the National Center for Police Defense (NCPD) is funded entirely by private contributions from patriotic Americans like you.******[**Will you chip in today with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or even more to help defend Officer Oldrati and others like him?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)**
---
[ **SUPPORT OFFICER OLDRATI NOW** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)
---
The truth is, Officer Oldrati doesn’t have a massive legal defense fund or a team of slick lawyers like the criminals prosecutors are letting back out on the streets.
---
---
He has _us._ He has the National Center for Police Defense — and he has you. Every dollar you give today goes directly toward helping officers like Salvatore Oldrati fight back against politically motivated prosecutions, keep their freedom, and get their lives back. Without your support, too many good officers are forced to plead guilty to crimes they didn’t commit — just to avoid bankrupting their families with legal fees they can’t afford. We must not let that happen.
---
[ **MAKE A GIFT NOW TO HELP OFFICER OLDRATI** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)
---
This isn’t just about one officer. It’s about sending a message that America will **stand with** those who stand between us and danger. Every day, officers put on their badges knowing they may not come home — and now, even if they make it home, some of them face being destroyed in the courtroom. Please, Friend, if you’ve been looking for a way to give back to those who serve and protect us every day — this is it. Stand with Officer Oldrati. Stand with all the brave men and women of law enforcement. **[Give whatever you can today — $35, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more — to help NCPD fight for justice.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)** Thank you for your support of our heroes. And please — never forget those who risk everything to keep our communities safe. Sincerely,
Sheriff Joe Arpaio (ret.)**
**
---
[ **DONATE TO DEFEND OUR OFFICERS** ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zs9uozAQx_GnMTeQZww2HHzIH7GrXSnaVQ9VT5Wxh8YVDsQmJHn7iijKdeYjfX8mTIPv75qpLUM8epcYIhMbhnj-uIZ4-Q5_f-V_Dss2P8tDqNYv7p50wRc-WVMb-Qbvm90thXj7_e9_Vy_w4vN9ohd-RgsKxg_rVe0zp0XveJmRBlUqqRSUPDtqEoCqNLUkohq6Bjgo2TRO1L3qXAeZ18ix4hU0oCqEqpCi73sp0HSmAkvISv7oFCZQ9NZAmq8mxnEMhR1DNujjPE_pMaxl2Cayl0iFOZEb51UwbE92cgxbciGnAFx1KxVtGi_R0qcdHTGxd12-uqfIOa-yqN109cPgk1Ss5F-PGWt00fgTAAD__-eFcLM)
---
| | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive Suite 200 Fairfax, VA 22030
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtOwzAQRb_G2TWyx3bsLrzoQwGBVAFdIJaTxKFGcZLaebR_j1pCt3fOzD0a9H3j6qshaksATq6KBIDwDQE4f80-jD_-9Wn1cpi2q3N28PI2hd2CTvCA2xI1Zkf2udldog-X57f3Qk_sgQ_X3j7gpTS1Hl1zS9U-qQyvKyoSa5gSKlOKCZqcDFYStKqF1GiRKSUqrUFTseYUOGZ14gxQkFSyNVMSmEwzXtd1xgELlKy0QAS996TobXAlsjjMGELX-bTsfNKY0zD08S6WE8jn0KXtWDZ2jH9rZecJ5IsygTyORSyD6wfXtZFAPrZLUljC8_sH-T5MyI6z1B9JMFU_u6ZxMVNE0O__m8lk4DcAAP__PB101g)

subject: God is using Camp Elah in AMAZING ways
body:
Keep the 🔥 Burning — Help Fund 2025 and Beyond!! | | |
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a15a3a8594a5408c8f3fc2efdffab0a9&_e=C25I1utGFXyWBhCOGG_HE6I3Ee0rqgBE935aQlHQzK6iIwTgNvdMerfqVikyKcTmkFN7wuekNfkaxMlh5xvXj-848w_OQCVAEa3kfDjj9C-oSdkFGf7JyT1Y3wTK9C1CnPYrTysSPBWfWuKQ4R6FHY3SZnRb7lhhpmO2cFlZXfRcGcKSmP8AngEc0bakFY5j4jmCxcnKCmN4qzULezYUyQPJfYmz_ANaPgVu2I98miiw-5NFHBNob1j9pGnG3rD90gdNs0rAr5GCchJVdx36aWyPWMxrTaBWFcsOZtG8oeQouPieGYfRPqPKDqYMeoOu)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Camp Elah is our D.C. headquarters, but it’s so much more than that. It’s a house of ministry—a place of worship, prayer, and revival right in the heart of Capitol Hill.

Just this year, Camp Elah has hosted nights of worship and times of prayer for our nation. It’s been a launching pad for worship in the Rotunda of the U.S. Capitol, on the Speaker of the House’s personal balcony, and inside the West Wing of the White House. Under the roof of Camp Elah, we’ve prayed with, and ministered to, members of the House and Senate, as well as their staff.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a15a3a8594a5408c8f3fc2efdffab0a9&_e=C25I1utGFXyWBhCOGG_HE6I3Ee0rqgBE935aQlHQzK6iIwTgNvdMerfqVikyKcTmkFN7wuekNfkaxMlh5xvXj-848w_OQCVAEa3kfDjj9C-oSdkFGf7JyT1Y3wTK9C1CnPYrTysSPBWfWuKQ4R6FHY3SZnRb7lhhpmO2cFlZXfQRt2iK0K3XQ5-HPm8JSIi5w6skD6PdZ9iWZjwOBNrxtgwf3UEsPkrIzLH9IhmAiIIiU0_BGlXXAtSfgZgWGgPtjRFHuba0XuJMMIJ-GxWTeVGuTU7TUQzBEKU109BG2Px-Syyyn3NpMyVAHpLgPhTz)
---
None of this would be possible without the faithful support of believers across the country—covering us in prayer and providing the critical financial support necessary to be a light in the darkness that is Washington, D.C.

Help keep the lights on, the fire burning, and the seeds of revival watered in the heart of our nation. God has already moved, but we believe the best is yet to come—and the Lord is just getting started!
---
[ **HELP KEEP THE**🔥****🔥****🔥** BURNING AT CAMP ELAH ** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=a15a3a8594a5408c8f3fc2efdffab0a9&_e=C25I1utGFXyWBhCOGG_HE6I3Ee0rqgBE935aQlHQzK6iIwTgNvdMerfqVikyKcTmkFN7wuekNfkaxMlh5xvXj-848w_OQCVAEa3kfDjj9C-oSdkFGf7JyT1Y3wTK9C1CnPYrTysSPBWfWuKQ4R6FHY3SZnRb7lhhpmO2cFlZXfSg6KvGoCrwoqQWNxwY5eTRUF0Mlkl9JHBq7qOWvKe-zHplKcpVUJ2N8SqnzD9CvqdS31V5O3HiQLcN0sLSVR5SbT7T7ZshsvQYHJwF3WkMLvEQdoUABlaBBN56p9bVudVIpELmIG-ivADIgDbK-jZu)

Till hear,
---

Sean

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107984147/546473579/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2M5MzA1Yi1kYjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCM77892k4Qp0krp2yHyFA2to1Kvh7hgr9lo7ejVK2w=)
---
Peter — House Republicans are once again targeting Planned Parenthood. They’re scheming to defund this critical organization that provides essential health services to millions of women in North Carolina and across the nation. body:
We’re celebrating an incredible achievement in Minnesota.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107984313/546474153/-112813052?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjAwMjc3Ni1kYjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUJL71q7bBM_tKCfQ6IJj5htxymyC1UPA5aZfoz5vZs=)

Peter,
As graduation season begins, we’re celebrating an incredible achievement in Minnesota: **a record-high 84.2% of high school seniors will graduate this year. **
This is the highest graduation rate in our state’s history. And there’s even more good news, as demographic gaps in graduation rates have narrowed.
We’re seeing this historic success because **under Governor Tim Walz’s leadership, Minnesota has made big investments in things like free school meals, teacher training, mental health resources, and technical training opportunities.** These policies are setting students up for success—not just in school, but in life after graduation.
But now, federal cuts could roll back our progress.
The Trump administration is actively working to dismantle the Department of Education and slash funding for programs that help students with disabilities, from low-income families, and in rural communities succeed.
As a former teacher, Governor Walz will never stop fighting for Minnesota students. But he can’t do it alone.
[**Peter, will you chip in to support Governor Walz and his ongoing work to support Minnesota students?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107984315/546474156/1419236610?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjAwMjc3Ni1kYjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUJL71q7bBM_tKCfQ6IJj5htxymyC1UPA5aZfoz5vZs=)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Dark money mass voter challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=H9AMYD6oPHLzBTWlU6JatHAO9f0Iu/nC1XDSlf498z/9pgQqcWWybSeCV1V2HEBl5coy0KYnuPCluJM1maW+2LbJXXTVs7qbSRr4s03jqGs=]
Wired: Inside the ‘Election Integrity’ App Built to Purge US Voter Rolls [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=H9AMYD6oPHLzBTWlU6JatHAO9f0Iu/nC1XDSlf498z/9pgQqcWWybSeCV1V2HEBl5coy0KYnuPCluJM1maW+2LbJXXTVs7qbSRr4s03jqGs=]
You've heard us talk about True the Vote (TTV) before, Folks, most notably for mass challenges to the registrations of voters in Georgia.
A little background: TTV is a Texas-based right-wing group whose self-described mission is “ to train citizens to protect election integrity at the polls .” Their founder is credited with “ becoming one of the earliest and most enthusiastic spreaders of ballot conspiracy theories .” Their “research” was the basis for the discredited election disinformation film “2000 Mules.”
Well, after taking a break in the wake of the 2024 election, they're back, and relaunched their voter suppression app -- called "IV3" -- to help their acolytes challenge legitimate voters across the country. This mass voter challenge platform -- which is riddled with errors and inaccurate data -- is up and running in 11 states : Colorado, Georgia, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Missouri, Nevada, Ohio, South Carolina, Montana and Connecticut, with plans to roll out the app in all 50 states.
With legislation like the SAVE Act -- which would disenfranchise millions of women who changed their name after marriage -- held up in the Senate, opponents of voting rights are clearly pivoting to other methods of voter suppression, and we've got to stop them.
Team, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help stop these purges of legitimate voters and protect our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

True The Vote (TTV) brought mass voter challenges against nearly half a million Georgians in 2022 -- all from their HQ in Texas. They've been sued in Georgia for voter intimidation, but it's clear they won't be deterred in their mission to reshape our elections and suppress the people they don't think should be voting. And they are not alone.
Just after TTV relaunched their inaccurate, suppressive app, the Cleta Mitchell-led Election Integrity Network (EIN) announced “ the next phase in its mission .” Cleta Mitchell is an election denier who was a key advisor to Donald Trump as he attempted to overturn the 2020 election and she's also been a party to numerous court cases around the country, attempting to disenfranchise young voters in states like North Carolina.
EIN is continuing those attacks by pushing for citizenship checks, eliminating certain types of voter ID -- especially for college students -- and spreading conspiracy theories about how our votes are counted. Basically, all the things the Senate-stalled SAVE Act wants to do federally.
These groups are waging their war on voting at the state and local level, funded by dark money millions, and we've got to try and keep up. Stand up for our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today to stop their suppressive efforts from succeeding >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] Wired: Inside the ‘Election Integrity’ App Built to Purge US Voter Rolls [=] You've heard us talk about True the Vote (TTV) before, Folks, most notably for mass challenges to the registrations of voters in Georgia. A little background: TTV is a Texas-based right-wing group whose self-described mission is “ to train citizens to protect election integrity at the polls .” Their founder is credited with “ becoming one of the earliest and most enthusiastic spreaders of ballot conspiracy theories .” Their “research” was the basis for the discredited election disinformation film “2000 Mules.” Well, after taking a break in the wake of the 2024 election, they're back, and relaunched their voter suppression app -- called "IV3" -- to help their acolytes challenge legitimate voters across the country. This mass voter challenge platform -- which is riddled with errors and inaccurate data -- is up and running in 11 states : Colorado, Georgia, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Missouri, Nevada, Ohio, South Carolina, Montana and Connecticut, with plans to roll out the app in all 50 states. With legislation like the SAVE Act -- which would disenfranchise millions of women who changed their name after marriage -- held up in the Senate, opponents of voting rights are clearly pivoting to other methods of voter suppression, and we've got to stop them.
