clean_body: I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left's lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. | Fellow American, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. Fellow American, I know by the end of this campaign, I’m going to be black and blue from all the Left’s attacks and the media’s brazen anti-Trump bias. For America, Steve Daines PS: The attacks from Democrats and the biased news media will be unrelenting and they have an endless stream of money. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I warned them about this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
For 50 years the NWS has provided forecasting and weather warnings 24 hours a day, seven days a week. That coverage has never stopped, until now. Thanks to Trump, Elon, and DOGE, countless NWS offices around the country no longer have the staff to cover overnight shifts.
#

Friends —
Within the first month of Trump’s presidency it became clear that Elon Musk intended to use DOGE to gut the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and within it the National Weather Service. And that Trump would let him do it.
For what possible reason, I don’t know.
For 50 years the NWS has provided forecasting and weather warnings 24 hours a day, seven days a week. That coverage has never stopped, until now. Thanks to Trump, Elon, and DOGE, countless NWS offices around the country no longer have the staff to cover overnight shifts.
So, what happens when a massive, dangerous weather system hits overnight? We learned last Friday.
Tornadoes hit Kentucky. At any other time the NWS office responsible would’ve been closed. Fortunately, the meteorologists at the NWS are more dedicated and professional than DOGE — they caught the weather in advance, stuck to their posts, and did their jobs.
That’s what public servants do, and hundreds of thousands of good people continue to serve even after all of the hurdles DOGE put in front of them. But what’s clear is that Trump and his Administration are making their jobs unnecessarily difficult, and they are putting American lives at unnecessary risk.
Too much damage has already been done, but it is not too late to reverse course.
[**Please, add your name and tell the Trump Administration to fire Elon Musk, stop this DOGE disaster, and restore the staff and services they are working so hard to destroy.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/nws_em_may25/?source=em250519-1-90&akid=6073%2E6688874%2E5KrAXj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/nws_em_may25/?source=em250519-1-90&akid=6073%2E6688874%2E5KrAXj)**
This has to happen before they put more lives at risk.
Thanks for your help,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6073%2E6688874%2E5KrAXj).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Darien Davis, LCV
subject: ACTION NEEDED TODAY: Stop Senate Republicans’ illegitimate attacks on states’ cleaner vehicle standards
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI1MDUyNzgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDI0MzI1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL SENATORS: STOP THE ILLEGITIMATE ATTACKS ON OUR CLEAN AIR

Republicans in Congress are attempting to grab power from states and gut vehicle
standards that keep our air clean and reduce our fuel costs.

Senate Republicans are planning to try to override the rules of the Senate to
push these states’ rights-trampling resolutions through — and they could vote
within just a few days. Senators need to hear from you TODAY: Tell them to stop the illegal overreach >> https://links.messages.lcv. TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, Cleaner vehicle standards save families money at the pump and reduce respiratory
illnesses, prevent heart disease, and safeguard against premature death. Yet,
the House voted to overturn existing clean air protections and block states from
setting stronger tailpipe pollution limits in the future for trucks and cars
that reduce the costs of owning and operating vehicles. And now Republican senators are signalling they’ll override the rules of the
Senate and defy the Clean Air Act to push these resolutions through. The Senate could vote on these illegitimate resolutions within just a few days.
If they succeed, it would be a catastrophe for clean transportation and clean
air protections. What’s more, it could open the floodgates to attack hundreds of
other state programs to provide Medicaid, SNAP, education, and more. We need your voice TODAY: Urge your senators to stop these illegitimate attacks on our air and public health. https://links.messages.lcv. If Congress overrides these state standards, people across the country will face
severe health, economic, and environmental consequences: Hurting Consumers at the Pump: Blocking standards that encourage fuel-efficient vehicles will cost consumers more than $89 billion in increased fuel costs through 2040. These standards are also key to accelerating the domestic supply chain for battery and electric vehicle manufacturing.
Harming Air Quality and Health: Cars, SUVs, and trucks are the single largest source of fine particulate pollution, which causes asthma attacks, heart attacks, strokes, premature births, lung cancer, and premature deaths. Preventing enforcement of states’ clean air standards would allow more than 1.6 billion metric tons of climate-harming emissions to be spewed into the air. More pollution means more children suffering asthma attacks and missing school, more grandparents dying prematurely, and more death and destruction from extreme weather.
Ceding Global Leadership to Other Countries: Businesses require certainty for investments in clean transportation. Overturning states’ clean air standards will kneecap companies that are investing billions of public and private sector dollars in new job-creating factories — primarily in areas like North Carolina, Tennessee, Kentucky, Georgia, Michigan, Ohio, and Arizona. U.S. companies led the world auto industry for a century, and they should be leading the global clean vehicle transition now underway. This will leave domestic manufacturing behind. Breaking these Senate rules and trying to cancel tailpipe pollution limits would affect all of us and make our planet less healthy. Tell your senators: Do NOT take away our right to clean air. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNcmwX_ Thank you for joining us in the fight, Peter. Darien Davis
Government Affairs Advocate, Climate Change & Clean Energy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12505278&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDI0MzI1NAS2&spReportId=MjIyMDI0MzI1NAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12505278&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDI0MzI1NAS2&spReportId=MjIyMDI0MzI1NAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MqKD9dT_

name: Katie Porter
subject: Not just a Zoom background
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)
Dear Derek,
You may have seen a colorful quilt hanging in the back of my videos or TV interviews.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250519_1_ak?refcode=em20250519-39736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39736_3422442_EuXNgG&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)
There’s a story behind that quilt.
It was made by my mom, Liz Porter, who started and grew her own small business and earned a spot in the Quilters Hall of Fame. She also wrote quilting books and hosted her own show on public television. I can still remember falling asleep to the sounds of my mom’s sewing machine.
One of the reasons my mom got into quilting is because she was tired of things getting undone. As a mom, you pick up your kids’ toys, but they are back on the floor a couple hours later. You make dinner for your family one day, and you have to do it all again tomorrow.
**Politics can be the same way.** We win seats in one election and lose them in the next. We move forward on health care and climate action, only for a new administration to threaten to undo that progress.
A lesson I learned from my mom’s journey as a quilter is to focus on what you can control, and if you start to get discouraged, focus your energy on areas where you’re already passionate. In this political moment, my advice to you is to volunteer for a cause you care about or to get involved in a political campaign that aligns with your values.
**[And if you’re in the market for a campaign to support, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to my campaign for governor.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250519_1_ak?refcode=em20250519-39736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39736_3422442_EuXNgG&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)** I’m running to bring down costs for families and to stand up to extremists who want to move us backwards.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250519_1_ak?refcode=em20250519-39736&refcode2=39736_3422442_EuXNgG&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)
Thanks for considering,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250519-39736&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39736_3422442_EuXNgG&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39736&t=4&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39736)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39736&t=5&akid=39736%2E3422442%2EEuXNgG)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Team DASS
subject: We know there’s a lot happening in the news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill [#]
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header]
Hello friend,
We know there’s a lot happening in the news. So let’s break this down, and explain why your $3 support [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q2-2025?refcode=em-5.19.25-all-rs] is so critical right now.

Donald Trump and his MAGA allies know exactly who stands between them and total control of our democracy: Democratic Secretaries of State.
These are the officials who oversee voter registration, ballot access, and vote counting. They upheld the law in 2020 -- and stopped Trump’s attempts to overturn the results. Now they’re under attack.

Right now, Trump is laying the groundwork for another run at power -- not just through the ballot box, but through the system itself. His allies are working to strip Secretaries of State of their authority, intimidate election officials, and even criminalize the work of ensuring fair elections.
Meanwhile, Democratic Secretaries of State are on the frontlines. They're working to protect voting rights, modernize election systems, push back against disinformation, and ensure every legal vote is counted -- no matter the pressure.

At DASS, we’re working to elect Democratic Secretaries of State, our last line of defense for free and fair elections. But we need your support.
Will you chip in $3 to help us fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous attacks on our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q2-2025?refcode=em-5.19.25-all-rs]

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

### Good evening PolitiBrawlers,
Charlie Kirk **[clashed with a confrontational woke student](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a Turning Point USA campus debate event, calling him out for disrespectful antics when he tried to run away mid-conversation.
**[Kirk didn't let him get away with it...](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The student started by asking Kirk what would constitute "a warning sign" that Donald Trump was becoming a dictator.
**["If Donald Trump did what Biden did,](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** which was trying to use the Justice Department to put someone in prison that he was running against, I would speak out against that," Kirk answered before asking, "Do you think it was wrong that Trump was hunted down by Biden's DOJ for 4 years, can you disavow that?!"
The student would not admit that the Biden administration's weaponization of the DOJ against Trump was wrong. Instead, he looked for an excuse. "Well, can you say that it was Joe Biden himself who ordered all of that?" the student clapped back.
"Yes! It was Merrick Garland! It was his Attorney General!" Kirk explained. "It wasn't like a separate branch of government. So can you say that that was wrong? That is dictator stuff, can you say that?!"
"Well, I hope you all have a goodnight..." the student said bizarrely, trying to back out of the standoff.
"You're a defender of authoritarian practices!" Kirk accused the student, who then shouted something as he began to walk away back into the crowd.
**["Yeah okay, say that into the mic coward,"](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kirk dared him.
"I think that political separation is because of your organization because you make your money off of 'Trump, Trump Trump!'" the student said mockingly.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9e42b2f6-8195-45b4-bbe9-9d265acb0034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Central banks across the globe are buying gold at the **fastest pace in modern history** - the highest annual totals ever recorded.
_Why the urgency?_ They recognize that the BRICS nations can do **incredible damage to the dollar**.
Hi, this is Donald Trump Jr., here with an urgent message.
BRICS has slowly created an **alternative global financial system** - designed to function entirely outside the dollar. Central banks understood this plan years ago, and the damage it could inflict on the dollar. Their solution? _**Convert their dollars to gold.**_
At a summit this July in Rio de Janeiro, BRICS is poised to announce their alternative to the dollar-based financial system. This "Rio Reset" represents the moment when their years of behind-the-scenes preparation becomes public. # _Resurfaced:_ Did Biden mistakenly admit he had cancer in 2022?
Amid unfortunate news of former President Joe Biden's **[prostate cancer diagnosis](https://substack.com/redirect/267c643d-571e-47a2-a1f5-ff40ede731f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , a clip has resurfaced from 2022 of Biden appearing to tell the press he has cancer.
Was this a slip of the tongue?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c68b90e2-0b10-4ccb-bc10-cb1f7fef3aa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In the clip, Biden appears to blame emissions from oil refineries near his hometown in Claymont, Delaware for himself and so many others he grew up with having "cancer."
"That's why I and so damn many other people I grew up with have cancer and why for the longest time Delaware had the highest cancer rate in the nation," Biden said during the 2022 press conference about global warming at Brayton Power Station in Somerset, Massachusetts.
Despite their intense political rivalry, President Trump responded to news of Biden's diagnosis over the weekend with **[a warm and supportive message](https://substack.com/redirect/9d3b14ea-8871-4bb8-a9be-f2021586a434?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Truth Social.
"Melania and I are saddened to hear about Joe Biden's recent medical diagnosis. We extend our warmest and best wishes to Jill and the family, and we wish Joe a fast and successful recovery," Trump wrote.
| | POLL
---
Do you think Biden knew he had prostate cancer in 2022?
| [Yes, he had to have known](https://substack..cvTl_W0ZfBsu8LGAQbeB_NLJ7i2EcvVXjvGujCwMbbE?)
---
[Not sure...](https://substack..mtZQ-7G0Ou11-F3P_dIE6d0ee0HF5g5UjrNWHy2xFDY?)
[No, this was just a mistake](https://substack..yD1X6NA-PG2I7tSk9cCMgcmb8JuSf-JtedeyHtSf090?)

# **All hell breaks loose when MTG clashes with Democrat for defending rights of illegal "gang member"**
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[battled Democrat Rep. Dan Goldman](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an explosive hearing, Wednesday, for claiming there was not sufficient evidence to identify deported illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Gacia as a member of MS-13.
This turned to pure chaos very quickly...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"She's not answering the question sir!" Goldman complained to the chairman, interrupting Greene's response explaining why Abrego Garcia is not just some innocent "Maryland man."
**["A Maryland county police gang unit agreed that he's MS-13,](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a reliable confidential informant agreed that he's MS-13, I.C.E officers agreed that he's MS-13, an immigration judge agreed that he's MS-13, an appellate board agreed that Kilmar Abrego Garcia, your 'Maryland man' is MS-13!" Greene sounded off.
"She is misstating the record and the facts... I object to that being introduced!" Goldman said. "There is no final court order establishing that he's a member. Maybe he is, so you should put all that evidence before a judge, and if he is a member of MS-13, then he should be deported."
Chairman Mark Green chimed in to set the record straight, "You basically just read what the Attorney General said, correct?" he asked Greene.
Goldman again objected to Greene's submission as Chairman Green was entering it into the record.
**["Do not interrupt me again!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Green snapped at Goldman.
Watch the chaotic hearing here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b58bb381-ed3e-4973-8680-cde8d8dd689e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | POLL

clean_body: "Say that into the mic, coward!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Say that into the mic, coward!" | | | May 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | Good evening PolitiBrawlers, Charlie Kirk during a Turning Point USA campus debate event, calling him out for disrespectful antics when he tried to run away mid-conversation. The student started by asking Kirk what would constitute "a warning sign" that Donald Trump was becoming a dictator. which was trying to use the Justice Department to put someone in prison that he was running against, I would speak out against that," Kirk answered before asking, "Do you think it was wrong that Trump was hunted down by Biden's DOJ for 4 years, can you disavow that?!" The student would not admit that the Biden administration's weaponization of the DOJ against Trump was wrong. Instead, he looked for an excuse. "Well, can you say that it was Joe Biden himself who ordered all of that?" the student clapped back. "Yes! It was Merrick Garland! It was his Attorney General!" Kirk explained. "It wasn't like a separate branch of government. So can you say that that was wrong? That is dictator stuff, can you say that?!" "Well, I hope you all have a goodnight..." the student said bizarrely, trying to back out of the standoff. "You're a defender of authoritarian practices!" Kirk accused the student, who then shouted something as he began to walk away back into the crowd. Kirk dared him. "I think that political separation is because of your organization because you make your money off of 'Trump, Trump Trump!'" the student said mockingly. A Message from Donald Trump Jr... Central Banks Are Hoarding Gold Before July (Here's Why) | | ---|---|--- Central banks across the globe are buying gold at the fastest pace in modern history - the highest annual totals ever recorded. Why the urgency? They recognize that the BRICS nations can do incredible damage to the dollar. Hi, this is Donald Trump Jr., here with an urgent message. BRICS has slowly created an alternative global financial system - designed to function entirely outside the dollar. Central banks understood this plan years ago, and the damage it could inflict on the dollar. Their solution? Convert their dollars to gold. At a summit this July in Rio de Janeiro, BRICS is poised to announce their alternative to the dollar-based financial system. This "Rio Reset" represents the moment when their years of behind-the-scenes preparation becomes public. And it's for this moment that central banks have spent years preparing for. Will Your IRA or 401(k) Follow Their Lead? As BRICS prepares their shot at the dollar, most Americans' retirement remain exposed. The good news? You can follow the central banks' strategy with a Gold IRA - before the Rio Reset this July. To learn how, Don't wait until after July and the Rio Reset, when everyone may be rushing to buy. Central banks are acting now - and so should you. Resurfaced: Did Biden mistakenly admit he had cancer in 2022? Amid unfortunate news of former President Joe Biden's , a clip has resurfaced from 2022 of Biden appearing to tell the press he has cancer. Was this a slip of the tongue? In the clip, Biden appears to blame emissions from oil refineries near his hometown in Claymont, Delaware for himself and so many others he grew up with having "cancer." "That's why I and so damn many other people I grew up with have cancer and why for the longest time Delaware had the highest cancer rate in the nation," Biden said during the 2022 press conference about global warming at Brayton Power Station in Somerset, Massachusetts. Despite their intense political rivalry, President Trump responded to news of Biden's diagnosis over the weekend with on Truth Social. "Melania and I are saddened to hear about Joe Biden's recent medical diagnosis. We extend our warmest and best wishes to Jill and the family, and we wish Joe a fast and successful recovery," Trump wrote. | | POLL Do you think Biden knew he had prostate cancer in 2022? | ? ? ? All hell breaks loose when MTG clashes with Democrat for defending rights of illegal "gang member" Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene during an explosive hearing, Wednesday, for claiming there was not sufficient evidence to identify deported illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Gacia as a member of MS-13. This turned to pure chaos very quickly... "She's not answering the question sir!" Goldman complained to the chairman, interrupting Greene's response explaining why Abrego Garcia is not just some innocent "Maryland man." a reliable confidential informant agreed that he's MS-13, I.C.E officers agreed that he's MS-13, an immigration judge agreed that he's MS-13, an appellate board agreed that Kilmar Abrego Garcia, your 'Maryland man' is MS-13!" Greene sounded off. "She is misstating the record and the facts... I object to that being introduced!" Goldman said. "There is no final court order establishing that he's a member. Maybe he is, so you should put all that evidence before a judge, and if he is a member of MS-13, then he should be deported." Chairman Mark Green chimed in to set the record straight, "You basically just read what the Attorney General said, correct?" he asked Greene. Goldman again objected to Greene's submission as Chairman Green was entering it into the record. Green snapped at Goldman. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Betrayal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
One in four Michiganders relies on Medicaid for health care coverage.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=321%2E181023%2ENrCivt)
**One in four Michiganders relies on Medicaid for health care coverage.**
Folks, that is why I’m _furious_ that Washington Republicans are toying with cuts to Medicaid.
The President and the people who are supposed to represent Michigan’s best interests are pushing cuts to Medicaid that would strip care from thousands of seniors, people with disabilities, and rural Michiganders.
All of this is just a part of their plan to hand out tax breaks to their wealthy friends and big corporations.
**This is a betrayal of the people who need help the most.**
Michigan deserves better from Republicans putting politics over people.
As governor, I’ll fight for resources to make sure Michiganders have affordable, accessible, and high-quality health care, no matter whether they live in our cities or our rural communities. And I’ll fight back against any attempts to cut coverage for Michiganders — even if it means standing up to bullies and billionaires.
[**Help me fight for Michiganders’ care as our next governor. Pitch in to my campaign today.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=321%2E181023%2ENrCivt)

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: This hasn’t happened since 2008
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqNqVWyJQqROo540iXtnwJekiV_PZp-SLyBOpPfnlLWTe_Ynw5JH0u8Ywj0BfIify9xp77n5Br73E7bf6aihXpV1YaaxfqNaXFvtZH-lp4Oq1cvfLoKUFt94EK6hauS6LNON0snDf1-VQXMeVsrrskM1)

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqO7P4YSHa_wAVrY1Ryd_ej1RrNKjYuwS9OajRZW9Sgu7q1EkfVRhaYjSP8KPP3a0VqkMc5NkkR7dbJjfzDxUx1mxHtplcf-N_dU7bc2pDgIyGlkPdtRrKV_BpNVP_zq75RVecR3DontWKaKdMMLbKnC)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqPhk6v05Sp2WjesZxqsdpnYdyQZ_v135zRpZSOn36lTd3yYPGL4uKwqdQk6Y3kHVXFG4Z454O8JjBseSNDSiBu1tTcb6FX-8whQ1rD6k-ve7nfaiHRqL8sAyBSebNQxuU0DqfoBkXe1NzWNtOgdmCmk)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqODAtTpHOn_K1fB66sjkWtU-yRhlWIx4m1NT-NcqQKLRpJiu1hK4LHCpkZ05KxrDhI5fPZq8QW_h7YhkArCOkuu1ThkYwaEUzG2b_OANhJVzr1rjCGoguY4Vdw0jM0-bkLRfM8cng1tjCElxjOz57Mn)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqPB64A-n1egwEjpnrDL6XmSWaGy4Wypyc972bEyN1hoDqyW38ddDuWU6y-1MgPGPJ5Wdjj2IAOpX2r8E7lH7tAKpoKVp-k9J9HqFWK0p9e3yHk24XzG-cMPsQNa4yebjeLRMXNQ9D_C0ABg1_Fq_xIL)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqPEsqgW2P2H-JcSab-8SemAq4rzXWVL4WDaSMTDGe5fVK4wnVtf9pBpMdiEcf6Y1kxmU-z1NmqGBZeBWXfZh1g7siL2lICdNr4Xd0S-7IViwUSOqgeult4BXoG_V6X6yi1rYdWwnj9B5BHPPvf7lDT1)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and _**[I’m hopeful that if you don’t donate today, you’ll allow me to earn your support in the coming months.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e9d6dea4177941628e9fbd643778e67d&_e=25zTVlGhdOuYAEjyc1qmbD9md6XMRzLxfbu3slIehO9V_RpDEauWs_SQjoGLsikMC28taBC8Ykz_0CqzWOqFQvdRAz5gfqC39ltoHGws4jS1aBDN-pPXgZ8u0bBLf-niIHkRBD0AxeOvWVpd1f0-MvbT8PGhqP0hUhR48ggiT1kk11k-z1VY6kHgO_inoqe4d3vNvH199V-by90YfG5nRewnlmlCXWsnM6XXi_qHHwm_CL6v9jkEpfMx2zwxBvQcxIRlCdW5eKhQInHCQipixlq6QJplnjWL_lo7UPSwSqPH9n0I0_9GSkNNcPHlVioFVhfxkn2i7TCiZBaD_bHMKINFKUaPE2G3KWp0wFHJhlSkZakH5kksRCaqNtQ6CtCN0XxPTa7uVfIIBItwdzq8k5A2NSu2PWIaYGYADnAJa1eJk5fnQFmJGvBRDiPiV5YW) **_

name: Deb
subject: Not your typical pantsuit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Wearing our moccasins helps us honor our ancestors, whose shoulders we stand on.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [**make your first-ever $5 contribution to our grassroots campaign for New Mexico.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)
First, I hope you’ll let me show you some of the places where I’ve **rocked my mocs.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)_My child Somáh was my biggest cheerleader on the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior._
On the day I was sworn in as Secretary of the Interior, I decided to wear my white moccasins and a handmade ribbon skirt adorned with butterflies, stars, and corn. No matter where I go, I am a proud Pueblo woman first – including at the Department of the Interior.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)_My moccasins and yellow ribbon skirt stood out in the sea of black suits at Pres. Biden’s inauguration in 2021._
When I wear my mocs, I'm reminded of how powerful our traditional clothing is to our shared heritage. On the first day of the White House Tribal Nations Summit in 2021, I wore my beaded moccasins in solidarity with our Indigenous people across the country. I am incredibly grateful that together, our Administration made extraordinary accomplishments for Indian Country – enduring progress that would make our ancestors proud.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)_I even rocked my mocs at the White House Tribal Nations Summit._
From my ancestral homelands here in New Mexico to the halls of Congress and everywhere in between, I rock my mocs to honor the people whose shoulders I stand on. History has shown us there’s nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together, which is why I’m counting on the support of people like you as we fight for a New Mexico that works for everyone.
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor.[Will you chip in $5 so we can build a strong campaign capable of winning this race and making history again?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250519_1_mocs?amount=5&refcode=em20250519-2049&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)**
I am so grateful for your support. Thank you for being by my side,
Deb 💙
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250519-1&t=2&refcode2=2049_400544_TruYOc&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2049%2E400544%2ETruYOc)

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: Congress considers a ten-year ban on AI laws
body:
Last week, negotiations over the budget and reconciliation bill in Congress took an unusual turn

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3fe4bd25de&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | |
# **Congress Considers a Ten-Year Ban on AI Laws**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Last week, negotiations over the budget reconciliation bill in Congress took an unusual turn when a provision was introduced that would preempt state AI regulation for the next decade.
In today’s ARI update, we’ll share the latest on that provision, news on our efforts to secure NIST funding, and more.
But first, Donald Trump just signed the TAKE IT DOWN Act into law, and ARI’s leadership was in the Oval Office to witness the occasion. Here’s the full story:
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
### **President Trump signs the TAKE IT DOWN Act into law.**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Just a few moments ago, President Trump officially signed the TAKE IT DOWN Act into law. The Act protects vulnerable communities online from non-consensual intimate images, including deepfakes, and holds perpetrators accountable. This is a major victory for children, victims of harassment, and the public, and it marks the first bill on online content signed into law since 2018.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=280434cc78&e=a07d75591f)
| Read Brad Carson’s op-ed on how the TAKE IT DOWN Act victory paves the way for more proactive tech policymaking in Congress.

---
| [Read the Newsweek Op-Ed](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=953030dc30&e=a07d75591f)
---
| ARI is proud to have worked alongside organizations like RAINN, Encode, and SVPA to build grassroots coalition support for the bill. From [live virtual events](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=7dd7db3143&e=a07d75591f) to [coalition letters](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=b91ce9ce8f&e=a07d75591f) to Congress, ARI is proud of our role in advancing the bill’s passage. Today’s signing reflects the growing need for safeguards to protect the public and the growing willingness in Congress to act as these AI systems become more advanced.
---
|
---
|
### **ARI launches campaign to stop preemption of state AI laws**
---
| This month, legislation was tucked into a federal budget bill that would erase AI laws that any state has passed and ban states from passing any laws regulating artificial intelligence for 10 years.ARI responded quickly with a statement from President Brad Carson urging lawmakers to oppose the effort, highlighting its overbroad impact on a wide range of state AI laws. Read our [statement here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=27ec139027&e=a07d75591f) and check out coverage of Brad’s remarks in [Politico](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4d0f2f4ccb&e=a07d75591f).To stop the preemption effort, ARI has launched a petition drive mobilizing grassroots opposition to the erasure of state AI laws. The petition highlights how the reconciliation provision would leave lawmakers unable to address the future issues that new generations of AI systems could present.
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=7b6d6e2b41&e=a07d75591f)If this preemption legislation passes, it means no laws to stop the spread of political deepfakes, no laws guaranteeing transparency when AI makes a decision about your employment or housing, no laws on AI whatsoever. Ultimately, it’s a gift to Big Tech that will come back to bite us.For more updates on our work to stop the preemption measure, be sure to [follow us on X](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=fdbb842fd4&e=a07d75591f).
---
|
---
|
### **NIST Funding is Critical to AI Security**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
The National Institute of Standards and Technology can test and identify faults in emerging technologies, like AI systems, and work to create national standards that keep these technologies secure.
This week, ARI, the Federation of American Scientists, and Public Knowledge organized a coalition letter from a broad range of AI policy leaders, from Anthropic to the Center for AI Policy. The letter urges Congress to fully fund NIST’s AI work for the 2025 Fiscal Year Budget, highlighting the Institute's security, evaluation, and standardization benefits.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=dc960dde08&e=a07d75591f)
| NIST can not only continue to make AI more secure, but it will also help build public trust in AI systems as they continue to advance.
---
| [Read the Coalition Letter Here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=dad4653afd&e=a07d75591f)
---
| Sincerely,Americans for Responsible Innovation
---
|
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: How To CATCH The Wind... Plus TEBOW/TULSA!
body:
As you know, my first book, "Chasing After The Wind" was recently released. Yesterday, I preached a sermon at Sheridan.ChurchTulsa + OKC about HOW TO
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11571.1.97a0ebe4b1786c1df0ad10160e3f1721) |
---
As you know, my first book, "[Chasing After The Wind](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11572.1.3ec7dec90a9037c54404064f3084ba47)" was recently released. Yesterday, I preached a sermon at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11573.1.7c5fee8a60c7f4ecbe6f654de8f89042)Tulsa + OKC about [HOW TO CATCH THE WIND](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11574.1.603c6242fb4b5e380f7af6fd7a714e08)... This message _encompasses_ the nearly 200 pages from the book and I believe will be a **blessing to you!** Watch **How To Catch The Wind** here: [https://youtube.com/live/JxFm7csgpO8](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11575.1.a2e272974c9e71fe9f8b17f6435ade91)
**Upcoming Events At Sheridan:** **Upcoming Events At[Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11576.1.cb48b5ea110d19382273e0423cc42d79):** -Sunday, May 25 @10am: Tulsa - **Sunday Funday** (Games, Food + more after service) -Sunday, May 25: **NO Service In OKC** -Thursday, June 5 @6pm: **Night of Blessing w/Tim Tebow** and others | Invite Pastors/Ministry Leaders to RSVP w/this link: [https://clr.cm/ffsq ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11577.1.4ca1055ff646b5d49db229bf01853664) -Tuesday, June 24 @6:30pm: **Theology At The Pub** | Kilkenny's Irish Pub Please consider partnering w/[Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11578.1.4e9b9a3818b405ffba34767e5e7ac679) by visiting [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11579.1.f29857b6735874f075df5aac48b5a6e0) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11580.1.c4ac7f557b2a59ef145fbb0e642a6eb5)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11581.1.f06c4d862e47cbd17ce159498daa5615)
---
Check out this **2 minute video** real quick of what is coming to Tulsa: [https://youtube.com/live/AVu-bsalsbE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11582.1.b24b9f9c857520805269966cbae36138) One thing _I can verify_ is that being in ministry is sometimes difficult. In fact, the **New York Times** produced a survey about Pastors that indicate somewhere around **1500 leave the ministry** each month in America and _"57% of Pastors would leave ministry if they thought there was somewhere else to go."_ Pastors and Ministry Leaders are always being a blessing to their congregations and communities but sometimes they themsleves are _under appreciated_. Therefore, on June 5 at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11583.1.65a6d6f8523fb6755927294d46b4c9a0) we will be holding **A NIGHT OF BLESSING** specifically for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **Tim Tebow** will encourage, **Colton Dixon** will sing, the **food** will be good and **gifts** will be given away. **Dinner is at the Mar-a-lago of Tulsa!** This is a **PRIVATE + FREE** event for Pastors and Ministry Leaders. **However, I have 3 asks:** _First_ , **Share this with your Pastor**! Pastors and Ministry Leaders can RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1665203](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11584.1.9e6cd121a1fd4fc6c03b16fa1e345bb9) _Second_ , If you are a business owner **consider sponsoring the event**. Sponsors will help cover the costs to be a blessing to the Pastors that will be in attendance. Or if you would like to bless these pastors you can do so by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11585.1.6cb564f7776c568b9c1a48345d8e0efd) To sponsor this event visit [BUSINESS SPONSOR](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11586.1.b26485103110bf32e4f7e78e13e4bbf3) or email me at **jlahmeyer@sheridan.church** _Third_ , **Pray for this night**. There might be a Pastor on the verge of calling it quits that just needs a nudge of encouragement to stay in the game. Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: NIGHT OF BLESSING ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11587.1.8d1c3a09c38eb88890e4b5d30e4cb3ed)
---
---
## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11588.1.3003d9f1d97d5252e367b72d1d4d005f)
---
Last week was interesting... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11589.1.f633b8cf1d2624d6a81d3d41059dc7eb) was released for pre-orders. **I have been blown away by the response!** Many have actually started reading the [eBook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11590.1.df908366d9d4ba692107ec7400064f47) before the hard copy arrives in the mail and the reviews have been _INCREDIBLE_! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11591.1.d64b33196ead00eaee7b04aab0d48a96)_ A **BIG** shipment of books arrive this week for me to sign and then they will be sent out. I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11592.1.d7e159d085ba24bc5ef41be805ac08b9) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11593.1.3c9c76beb2e70d3809ef502197a809ea)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11594.1.734a997ef88ded7bb7d0fc96252ec8b8) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11595.1.8333a9a9f29fc52355369cc253055bde) Thank you,
---
| | [ Read: Chasing After The Wind ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=21452291.11596.1.66dced995531a68de81b5c31f61f0121)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: My op-ed in Fox News →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Remember when Donald Trump called himself the “fertilization president”?
Well, today is the deadline for policy recommendations on how he can expand access to IVF like he promised to do in an executive order earlier this year — and I have a suggestion for him:
Support military families who desperately want to grow their families!
About a quarter of active duty service members and military spouses report infertility — double the national average of the general population. And their struggles make sense.
Just think about the sacrifices we ask of these families. Physically intensive training, long deployments, demanding schedules, frequent relocations — often during prime reproductive years. Not to mention hazardous environments that can negatively impact fertility and the emotional toll of it all.
Despite all of this, our country’s military health insurance plan doesn’t cover fertility services across the board.
I’m proud to represent the biggest military community in the country, and I hear all the time about the challenges service members and their families are experiencing, including infertility.
That’s why I published an op-ed in Fox News today strongly urging President Trump to throw his support behind my bill — the IVF for Military Families Act — which would require military health insurance to cover infertility diagnosis and treatment, including IVF.
Supporting this legislation is the least he could do after calling himself the “father of IVF”!
Starting this year, Members of Congress (and our staff) have access to comprehensive infertility treatment, including IVF coverage — just like many other civilian and private sector employees. Why should we have access to benefits our military families don’t have?
Even so, my Republican colleagues *still* refuse to support my bill!
Bottom line: We ask so much from our service members. To risk their safety, to be apart from their families, and to give up certain freedoms. But we shouldn’t ask them to give up their opportunity to build a family.
You can read my full op-ed here. [https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/rep-sara-jacobs-military-families-deserve-ivf-coverage-trumps-support.amp]
And if you agree that military families deserve access to infertility coverage just like Members of Congress and civilians, I hope you’ll sign my petition saying so:
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ESU6hK9xg0ebLnvpqa82MA2]
Thanks for your support!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Well, today is the deadline for policy recommendations on how he can expand access to IVF like he promised to do in an executive order earlier this year — and I have a suggestion for him: Support military families who desperately want to grow their families! About a quarter of active duty service members and military spouses report infertility — double the national average of the general population. And their struggles make sense. Just think about the sacrifices we ask of these families. Physically intensive training, long deployments, demanding schedules, frequent relocations — often during prime reproductive years. Not to mention hazardous environments that can negatively impact fertility and the emotional toll of it all. Despite all of this, our country’s military health insurance plan doesn’t cover fertility services across the board. I’m proud to represent the biggest military community in the country, and I hear all the time about the challenges service members and their families are experiencing, including infertility. That’s why I published an op-ed in Fox News today strongly urging President Trump to throw his support behind my bill — the IVF for Military Families Act — which would require military health insurance to cover infertility diagnosis and treatment, including IVF. Supporting this legislation is the least he could do after calling himself the “father of IVF”! Starting this year, Members of Congress (and our staff) have access to comprehensive infertility treatment, including IVF coverage — just like many other civilian and private sector employees. Why should we have access to benefits our military families don’t have? Even so, my Republican colleagues still refuse to support my bill! Bottom line: We ask so much from our service members. To risk their safety, to be apart from their families, and to give up certain freedoms. But we shouldn’t ask them to give up their opportunity to build a family. You can read my full op-ed here. [] And if you agree that military families deserve access to infertility coverage just like Members of Congress and civilians, I hope you’ll sign my petition saying so: SIGN THE PETITION [] Thanks for your support! -Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. name: Lee Johnson
subject: I'm running to retire Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107993182/546505631/2109746102?refcode=250519_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYxMmIzMi1mNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7aHy3gpKIoIUJrr8UM56gK3A10XdnXO5CQItOt7Oz4=) Friends, **My name is Lee Johnson, and I’m running for the United States Senate to retire Lindsey Graham in South Carolina.** I wasn’t born into politics—I was born in a construction family—operating heavy equipment before I could drive. My family taught me how to build things - like roads and bridges - and I’ve carried that with me everywhere: from construction sites and factory floors to boardrooms. I’m running because Lindsey Graham has forgotten about the people back home. He’s leading the charge to gut Social Security and Medicaid, and now, he backs the chaotic tariffs that are raising prices and cutting paychecks across South Carolina. We need honest leadership in Washington. I’ll fight to ban members of Congress from profiting off of public service. And I pledge to serve no more than two terms as your Senator, to ensure that our state has fresh, accountable leadership in Congress. This is a fight we can win, but we need your support. [**Can you split a donation between our campaign, and Seth Moulton today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107993183/546505632/2109746102?refcode=250519_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYxMmIzMi1mNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7aHy3gpKIoIUJrr8UM56gK3A10XdnXO5CQItOt7Oz4=) I believe that Washington needs more builders - not dividers. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - to build an economy that works for everybody, not just the elite few. Lindsey Graham hasn’t held a town hall in 8 years. He stopped listening, and we’re paying the price. **That’s why I’m hitting the road to listen to voters across South Carolina and make their voices heard.[If you can, split a donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton to help us reach voters across South Carolina and build a movement to beat the Washington establishment and fire Lindsey Graham.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107993184/546505633/2109746102?refcode=250519_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYxMmIzMi1mNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7aHy3gpKIoIUJrr8UM56gK3A10XdnXO5CQItOt7Oz4=)** From building infrastructure, to working on major water and energy projects, to leading major companies - I’ve spent my entire life building things from the ground up and fixing them when they break. I know how tough it is just to get by right now. Prices are rising. Wages aren’t moving. The gap between the haves and have nots is widening. And politicians in Washington - like Lindsey Graham - have left us behind. That’s why I’m running for the US Senate. [**Split a donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton today to join our fight and together, we will fire Lindsey Graham.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107993185/546505634/2109746102?refcode=250519_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYxMmIzMi1mNjM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X7aHy3gpKIoIUJrr8UM56gK3A10XdnXO5CQItOt7Oz4=) Thank you, Lee

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Taking health care from the poor to give the rich a tax cut
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Republicans in the House spent the whole weekend in secret meetings putting together a budget that would amount to one of the largest transfers of wealth from the poor to the rich in our lifetime.
#

Here’s what’s happening on Capitol Hill, Peter:
Republicans in the House spent the whole weekend in secret meetings putting together a budget that would amount to one of the largest transfers of wealth from the poor to the rich in our lifetime.
They’re getting ready to take health care away from 14 million people to give a few thousand billionaires and millionaires a tax break.
14 million people — that’s folks of every age, from children to seniors — are going to have to give up their doctor, their medication, their care, so guys like Elon Musk get richer. So they can afford another yacht, another jet, another house.
People who have next to nothing are going to lose what very little they have to enrich the most wealthy people on earth.
I bet most of the MAGA fanatics lining up to vote for this budget don’t know what it was like to go hungry as a kid. To sleep on the floor because you couldn’t afford a bed. To watch your mom work night and day trying to make ends meet. To take a job, as a kid, to help put food on the table.
**_I do._**
And I am NEVER going to support a budget that puts the kids growing up like I did last, and guys like Elon Musk first. No chance.
I’m going to fight this with everything I’ve got.
That’s a promise.
-Ruben
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25-r%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.F7Uztv&refcode=em250519-1-b&refcode2=3870.734936.RAOrCR&t=7&akid=3870%2E734936%2ERAOrCR)
---

_👋 Before you go, let us make a quick request on Ruben’s behalf:_
Ruben’s largest source of donations is committed supporters making monthly, recurring donations.
These donations help us sustain programs and plan for the future. They make a huge impact. **And today, we’re hoping you’ll add one.**
[**Please, make a recurring donation of any amount to Ruben Gallego.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25-r%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.F7Uztv&refcode=em250519-1-b&t=8&akid=3870%2E734936%2ERAOrCR)
[CHIP IN MONTHLY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25-r%3Frecurring%3Dtrue.F7Uztv&refcode=em250519-1-b&t=9&akid=3870%2E734936%2ERAOrCR)

name: John Fetterman
subject: PA keeps Washington honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Big week, Derek.

The House is supposed to vote on the budget bill, so I have some good news and bad news.
I'll start with the **bad news** : Republicans are charging ahead with their plan to gut Medicaid – all to fund tax breaks for Trump and his rich buddies. 🤬

Republicans in Washington _love_ to talk out of both sides of their mouths. They'll _claim_ they’re not stealing from the American people to pad the pockets of the rich. They'll sidestep questions and dance around the truth.

The **good news**? Here in PA, we keep them honest. We see right through them. And there is still time to show Republicans that we're not putting up with this.

Their Medicaid cuts were never about government efficiency or the national debt. That's why I voted a hard NO on their budget bill last month, and I’m raising hell to stop the one coming down the pike now.

You know exactly where I stand: I will NEVER support any bill that strips Medicaid benefits from Americans to bankroll tax cuts for their rich friends.
**Derek, in addition to calling your representatives to let 'em know how bad this budget would be for PA + the country, hitting our fundraising goals is one of the best ways to show them how fired up we are. That we will NOT back down. So I have to ask:[Will you pitch in $5 right now to build the momentum we need to STOP these Medicaid cuts?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk110-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10102%2E434096%2EERUTyp)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk110-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10102%2E434096%2EERUTyp)
---
Thanks, Derek,

John ❤️

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/gLpeFyCz3BB7wsOKyEB4UrKxyDH23K1Hz-08m3TcePxNkHW4MLoKufvP8U6yqsqr1w389Jon62o3_KxgLRZePdRjuX-yFAHKmxRYTjmC8AGFwiechKam6qzhEHZkntIqMIPa-jVnDM2mhxuPkl9OKm8ek0QBmLfU486KI_LKlfVe_CmirpruY_j7S3fqHlqwUZEoVmiwF5JIvixLadkzC7odMb2ErZHhwYPJevS_QfooAl-9bumvVjNEKY70K79iqHBLLyAtSvddrskJfCcO8HwqFxunVcfX58tKOGvdbJ42LQq11j-iZMLmjrdwdIXYzF6LVcrUG55zMGqLBX8HkaDZXBoOHr3ecSR089QrXmUfrx0igxEw64ZuMHrHqAF-01QpBTuep1EW7aImQ7qYEC13HRf8gb2EBgot2ZH0v7dlgEaLRC7Hc1VkyAV7Cmuwwr2ewpGFMXqWgOi24ccquNfQ60E/1j7skhlQKF4WMk4uOVuKfErpD0rKCDeH/9)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/R0A3kEanpWzuxtbZyMdQ2gafRC-zugpAFuibjer1KOH0gpQitfk68eD09RP4i9857Czn8xg64BXXJDwJK2Punh4nui_WFxRq2ZJlbgeKsV18ywEzInGQ23PxGKJ0NKB-QNipyFuhTbf0qia9yQkUTs09azMhVzdc-9wxftPndVQ4iryhM1lLt71T1kCeR-VmEhGTNEAXaL1uYz_yvXiaiCVjnTaycEeCd0_-FY2JE6Vy06YjE9WhVTIPg30MgkECJnvCaTeTYozlObQBqVxFGoHB-WgRrQqxd564cTs7EhFFWP7S3SxfN3gqystQvEIEIZp9IGemGPnElvkEHK_A8P2qE-DOkcOFrwk8vpP0vxNPaQOwL2DNUL1yEMYYBijq_JOx1pvN_9h_aBh_30I4YAgTNDdRD_sxVi_DUfOenCqQFelP3WD6j4Ehi6m4Qrjs5hLIgUKEwjMg5Q5hrIa00QtUDFY/KfjchOA2ecb_0DQ1vmcde9PYh8Ggv_Oq/9)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/AmlriB80Fq6I0KAh219yaZCZOlitqyWVUoYoXEe91KX491jurrCO_g8M6le-DeaeWdYGNTaDAFy0xK4X1TzYEPfLrGJLxl6JZK0nT-9Rzb1lkP6S4QkOYlj-_xqjuLahDjp9_a5LxlYmGV5YqUrXU464N98E80mO-bOO3giLdQPzjnapf7DhJl16J7mMsm9aPxR9Ofk5rjZAD2WyugX3HccP18QsGZet0QDWX2FMVnb3huax_GMTYmXr6mOlkoZULpH9DPXUkdenNh6jcMeqvSOCiWhNLk-WyRT4af3oedG3truF7e76pu4QMVGQSRkDf8ZBCOdW-paRYrVF0wc-OOP8nLgWXFL4DU3Z7aKPYfRlUHCyaC2Ks5V-k2s0rkY1EZl-WtNJSz4JIOArmbtZC7BJ-URF2QlKYC3PXvYiHHrRqd8qZSGvi9W0vISkfSHbCHQLeC8sqn8TF9eEpi9OiDX8kmA/YHe1aP0mnI4vD87tMUWbBGUZAkZkspD7/9)
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/rGB6dQ9oFuB2ctarps4aIXqRwJ51XGhwMmczT4VqX0K_LDLPL7BrdXY-C68-lqtWA6F00Ws_HTvaBF4V2OYIG47bnpdJDYjGoEZLbFPnQpm8dRwMUvjhP3Q96VnjCjybbqkOSThLLtfWisN7jnVBBluOxECVTwgXIfPmqY1T0yjxm3t89LOizfRbDcWRNiPJkUTbx0z8GyGM2_sLSweDVCPkhjRPr_7fMJ4PTvJzIEMMaO5jBECr-six9cmdHEEYcCf-hQj1ywWLDA5f5yG0qTAkmGuIRchYAVBmegf8IvMFfipwFWVG5HZWf8SeE8RDT7Pdj_x2-R7BrJYoB0VNITrhzmA25VeZ2bypqD6_59iQJM-245eg8p8mhTXHWoHg6CxSzHM-2DdCVcY9qixOid1kv22IIAIpbziQTtyTfuUXMNmQpb_km54J8qasJnrpG4pkFSZy7yscfAc9cFO-wR56OS4/RAZIkIcyw78UlX6TVskiFa6mbO1CaaUu/9)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/pJGVLLjMJJVEaearVSWzhPeh0LOAaWA0S-pb8K64PvrwakbFVz41YaVtBG1RDN6IOff5ScvQp6w0H29-NcyLtjvjf-z6BQC939xHJr6Vh6ShhP5JHWpDEg4R0JOjSYgL73Aapxnp_8kRaepRoyYNxGIoussj2jGtKcjVlMtetepEUYm_bHU3Pz2QejlmVfCXnEKCuZAzn6eYjgmBQm6cwGEJzunAVeWRO5fSKwCobKQsb1qeDwqXq7ntQiNU1nJjAwO4GcyqWxqze94eQXwd1fitL94Jya72f09rsFV-ciGI8ckqqz9s4q4TFwjJVU-LZ1XZ1pILdcPK-JUZ56xtclLynbIW4c5q/GmOeBclCnjJL9TA2KOnQ4I11ov9CE0s7/9)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/6bZXj92NgPilPJ-wwQAK_azTV7AaU5BhVHLRdX2jjN2GH9moCGd-ur_B8gba-cZHnhbQXSxk4jhEyybdB_IRfumANsYiZs3gJ5TZ2iMmXWw7jAI3G22zMSFXrYfq_P04BIEnHFImgH5loiyrn7jE1OBsdhFk09gVtr9peSx-kid_Ky_oWjUfpWiKsRRgSo4DOWXhbedXsPlkc1jLSe02Sl0w-18k2xIbYsuJR_CACD-eN6CvnvmaPowCymkAl1JUbV9v3-FnarR_ou5OaD7y7R9mwKF0vIm0oJg1jpt6fma6caSbFHGQFBHGWIEgokX_VroBUFjUg2aW4QD1t4bZP2iPtjSxgCKTI7sbTfLh65j0lPS1-UZIkB1A7BnKqHOeAt1tx91654gPEo9npY_NkCKcyQv75ATulkyB27j7dDZMb0p6nDqxugqnVzoyuXG3xra_f-Pa9fq2SqKOEALbsaGtq_o/BSIJjNikW7nIBze6Fh0HbJr_XMnJZjv5/9) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/JacbD9QIM3OvRDDw3aCigVmMhz78TtEeFcO2i7iBhlwh-PaWsoYm2Z-uAXpz7JZWdrEsogvvcJ4daCqxNRZ_Y8ewIVfmcEjjPgVen1R_cCfAfv1GW8ZtZ2Uxe6J3OFUH70eCYRZKF6KJq2il5U65deRgAIp3VaWOc_hba94as27HnZv2wAyuu_iM1TC1AghMYCd3RJi-U9TyiYzgao1MUSQjZe8sENbD0wb3KcSjXMPR3xBzez1nCl7ofSx8MirstYH10UQVTa_FuTc3To-mcZWFqp66ytdwFDr2clOfF5RyJAnUNsbESFC3dCLkRLJWs6wrGlNDlR1HnnbnFw2yZR67xiNzcHfgcGkCFHeMxA5TBjl665VCnIyHVGGxWIsZRZ9e9wIbIItqMz6OOqjG-F-sPKhyc60ns2IdbiKtb28evpyzFrhed0p1tRvHSMSxJs6aoLO9ECFPXO0DM9U6uPXeu8M/sbxio1MFuXpzJgKH3UtKs1Wj2iWgnWuM/9)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/d588G_mjBmTalyr8VbI_o1sqQM8e1WjX0MbWVec6gfOSr20o5TzlyOEEJQjg9pEmSilHk4SGJJR3YKE9-ye2-aPa1OYh36wtJTrGpclvILo1LjypesEj30yhyUba2SpP7SvL8ihUq88TNtdjSp_TXNiJTDpL7BNj8SfiACeaypM4y2Nw11yqmV9AoaAlTBOia0hkcgydyOEi731FFQYAYbenpqn2SnsW2R8BZZDl-HnMWmBnB9ZpLEVbkOyZJ_C9zE31rdBGt01TiJyj1whA7susHSLA-gR7LeNdbLYxEjjYWMjdSMzmD5w00zAGyD1xUTDjPuKUt1JKIYdSK17yr1UAZpKzVDogHoZkuzGESx4-UXIjfulGAUPdBIS-LWb5sPTCBTbb05qOWLJilBZFQU_QjnDMWfgfJEv3hNzcdYj4AJMSnDMdkMJ_cFI2mA5hkiV_LjsNxYHzVkQ-ABgRj4korug/DDuPUvTiSQdkn10USK_6tq-zBuHPdDXu/9)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

clean_body: It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 |
