Team, Let's call these tariffs what they are: **a Trump tax on small businesses and working families. ** Trump’s tariffs will cost New Mexicans up to $1,200 a year per household. This means you're going to be paying higher prices for groceries, cars, and everyday goods. Small businesses just trying to stay afloat have been forced to make difficult decisions due to these tariffs, like reducing their workforce and raising their prices. With so much uncertainty, folks are understandably less likely to make purchases, which could drag down New Mexico’s local economy and spark a nationwide recession. **We need to elect leaders across our government who actually care about lowering prices for hardworking Americans, not starting useless trade wars and stoking their own egos.** **[My team and I are laying the groundwork to hold Republicans accountable at the polls and support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot in New Mexico and beyond. clean_body: Team, Let's call these tariffs what they are: a Trump tax on small businesses and working families. Trump’s tariffs will cost New Mexicans up to $1,200 a year per household. This means you're going to be paying higher prices for groceries, cars, and everyday goods. Small businesses just trying to stay afloat have been forced to make difficult decisions due to these tariffs, like reducing their workforce and raising their prices. With so much uncertainty, folks are understandably less likely to make purchases, which could drag down New Mexico’s local economy and spark a nationwide recession. We need to elect leaders across our government who actually care about lowering prices for hardworking Americans, not starting useless trade wars and stoking their own egos. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump is treating this country as his personal piggy bank.

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8592%2E5257348%2E6I_XJg ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Before he was president and leader of one of the most extreme political
movements in the history of our country, Donald Trump purported himself to
be a very successful businessman, known for perfecting the “art of the
deal.”

These days, he’s certainly executing on the art of the deal. But the only
beneficiaries of that deal are himself, his family, and his ultra-wealthy
MAGA donors.

That’s the "art of the deal" with this president.

He gets rich. You and your family get nothing.

Over and over and over again. With shady deals, quid pro quos, massive
gifts, you name it.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8592%2E5257348%2E6I_XJg ]I recently took to the Senate floor to speak about Trump’s most
egregious, selfish acts in the first few months of his presidency — and I
will continue to speak out about how this president is treating this
country as his piggy bank. Chip in to amplify my message and help me stand
up to the attacks that come in response to my work to hold Trump
accountable.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8592%2E5257348%2E6I_XJg ]EXPRESS DONATE

$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8592%2E5257348%2E6I_XJg ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

In just 4 months, here are just some of the ways Trump has corrupted the
Oval Office to his own benefit:

* Letting Elon Musk turn the White House South Lawn into a Tesla
showroom. We know how close Trump and Musk are, and they both benefit
from Musk getting free publicity.
* Encouraging his sons, Donald Jr. and Eric, to open a private club in
Washington, D.C. It’s called “The Executive Branch,” promises close
access to top-ranking Trump officials, and costs just half a million
dollars to join.
* Accepting a $400 million plane from the Qatari government as a “gift.”
* Sharing his “meme coin” on social media, giving the ultra-wealthy an
easy way to literally buy influence in the administration.

Derek, I could
go on and on.

But the bottom line is this:

Trump cares about one thing, and one thing only: Deals to make himself
richer.

Make his family richer. Make his billionaire friends richer. And he is
succeeding — big time.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250519_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8592%2E5257348%2E6I_XJg ]It is up to us to call out his corruption, demand accountability, and
fight to restore some semblance of integrity in the Oval Office. Help me
do just that — pitch in.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

I can’t promise luxury golf trips, memberships to exclusive clubs, or
unfettered access to the administration in exchange for your

But I promise that I will keep up my work to hold this corrupt president
accountable.

Thank you,

Adam

name: General John King
subject: I'm running for Georgia's Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awuzbRRf0Zy3FjczwBOj8s9B9fyH2ZFtZOuijb4Ul-IZ_pTGuBd7yQUaK0vriI2j9_lFDKzjwGnSLTd7QpyWS2DsBgDPnZANl8WsPZji4gvnQr1z5h-knPwCRR4seVUmb6ndhw4T5P9Y5DCotbkfyreXRM31g0Xqyjsa1LdBGhC9TE%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awuNzp22vExYvtPy254T9OAUTc7ecP8HzgtlK_5yVNFgDCydh8LfL1fQ14yJY_b_MU61ldguEZck5lvJ3b-K5bMpbHCQn10BP1k-n1SxcWrKXAw_x0p2B92BgZxtmj5FGaf9SmfeSkfTSIJovNFDkb0ciO1h9kvPOkGyoOszec3ILE%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awuec1TDH_JgZSCASUEase0NMclMEUfUJjUBH4JCvnac3sB80uDSeAithCMo9MD5IOVZ304bScCmyL4KRUxzP-tnrYLtyDmaZbXvPq_VVXFwogAy1T33C7vLD4-y3yKC5bBO_W4yb_2fcysuDI0W5HJ2xY2mXY5DC7MoTqFljnx_bs%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awuruUsDOMDZhcx-pUyO-r-zNevtXRH4P_rL4g1YoNjPcWrfv_CyOmu6M0rpjb5SUipSjdpAUGZU58QrsNHIpXz_cnb98Y3aU838fmwQTMb88hbzn8XSi1sKoO5RC2-ah5LdiuTwjgULezSQHKK3FerWAOwVQwLD7wSqqz6f0XEgbk%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awu-DIBmQWFNTmkKBZNR3iuebkeUAVltO6ztRttCZ2KHi-eI7DHo2DmHHg5RHMtsW7AModOrHefi1eGe49GQpXjeJuNG0maOXgFp9R5ENBHT1lZ16xZORYspdXvVQTvKCdSIt9mjooLrKUdRTmANrHuYmSpC2tBEHjA7zJaB4HzixA%3D)

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. Can you pitch in any amount?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=3df1f052cb2a4c68b8d4585deeacabdf&_e=mIDI7MNJpoiZ1FAJWQyxzwlQU9zNnRZsFi4u_W6mWhdkHdXvofRX9j75eHQ4M4VazYNHj4UU_y4a_yPjZVuVlQ9GsYwSlr3WwJzO5xf1rTKaGozx747vv4xO0yATw9N3kXBfoZ8p8e2_nh59y5DNgQfr5p09wXFcaOApEyp61utZ-YYFpBucnx_72NNTgguKTUflf4lHeKRluSZ8goBLFMRym5TyTx44lcUtiCwfaLdkc18Cr-Ew99Rqmr2j-awuETcOUEks7eTh6qxPAGycz728M1Y0_DcVzxcGxELQwGAjXU9AaKz_GGUka2LM_VKg21GL4TVWVOoNJdMOhxgGLhEp_uXQg9FLiViQ7bfOKuulf7fk7mUJfMHX6UWQJeyiOrkG7p2cmqr8wjQtW2JfhHFF6vkJsrqJG6x0KqtJT5Y%3D)

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Fellow Conservative, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. | Let’s not sugarcoat it: our border is open because of Biden, and _**Washington insiders**_ are doing nothing while our jobs, neighborhoods, and futures are threatened.
[Click here to fight back against DO NOTHING WASHINGTON INSIDERS!](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f4317f0c7c&e=273c9a71fb)
**Hard-working legal immigrants** play by the rules, wait their turn, and still get left behind—while those who __break the law__ get **HANDOUTS**. That’s not America, that’s not freedom, that’s not justice.
But **YOU** have a chance to __**change the game**__. David Flippo isn’t another politician—he is battle tested and Nevada strong. He’s standing up for _legal immigration, asylum,**secure borders** , and real opportunity for America’s legal immigrants who are proud to earn their way. _

And with **YOUR help** , Dave will **support President Donald J. Trump while we finish what we started!**

name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: Join our Monthly call Tonight!

body:
Will these be the last closed primaries in PA?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=1)
---
|
### **Our Monthly Call is just in time**
Join us Tonight, May 19th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uwl9pDp8g-rX1WnI3QBeNAyiZA3e9JmFtj4slpppItIV_3m0ilCPMsUjst4lUmcTHw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=2) Tomorrow is the Primary Election Day. Let us know if there's a race in your area that we should be aware of. Once again, the major parties will benefit from tax payer funded elections to choose their nominees. Once again voters not registered with one of these two parties will be blocked from voting in these tax payer funded elections. And once again, Pennsylvania will be one of the worst states in the country for independent voters. All this as we're celebrated as the swingiest of the swing states cycle after cycle. There is [real momentum behind repealing closed primaries](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=b6GkgcRzF2USU66qy28VruAZ-_WhBVa-bJDeohOXJ1_eIhj8N4EuY0wO7iqDEPhIVmoUm3_JFTRW3RIzL9O17_5Poe3OsbxvG5ZAKvYM3MjNuQduf-oBq4KzqdRwyzzpoOfjCFVHZsQEgTU2_0A7v-MqVI8PDA8IUieURi2b9hjWcjH4NDiVj3hCsK40KSpOGhcmNFsq4LXAFxxGKoRMXKhWBV0SmzEvHAmKiXRp63I&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=3) and the details of what system we adopt matters. Make sure you're paying attention and letting your voice be heard on this issue.
* * *
### **Support your Pennsylvania Forward Party!**
Our system is designed to keep the major parties alive and fighting forever. We're trying to change that and we need your help. You can support us in many ways.
* Attending a call or event and sharing your perspective.
* Voting for a Forward Candidate.
* Telling your friends about what we're doing.
* Running for local office yourself.

All of which you should do. But if you have the means, you can also support us financially. We don't need a lot, we are a volunteer organization and we keep costs to a minimum. But more people giving a few dollars a month creates a base of funds that we can rely on for things we want to do. Renting a table at a fair, printing materials, legal and bank services, all these things add up and we appreciate the people who contribute. We have big plans for this year and next, your contribution can help us make them happen. Any donation made on our website gets spend in our state and helps directly. Please consider contributing today. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=4 "Become a PA Forward Donor") [Become a PA Forward Donor](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u-umgjlfzqeAM_zj2h1YgEQ8LiKSs_WIlu6d10HpikhG&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=4)
---
**Click below to see more**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=c1vIqT8LaeJ1yAWpG61iLuD6nCj8LLLuZmznytaTdJHDkYQLHi7RjccfaCr5k4_xgGPkpvY9vVSbwVuGVG6wrw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=5)
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/2nd_fwdwc_priorities_forum?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250519_may_call_reminder&n=6)

clean_body: Will these be the last closed primaries in PA? | | | Our Monthly Call is just in time Join us Tonight, May 19th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. Tomorrow is the Primary Election Day. Let us know if there's a race in your area that we should be aware of. Once again, the major parties will benefit from tax payer funded elections to choose their nominees. Once again voters not registered with one of these two parties will be blocked from voting in these tax payer funded elections. And once again, Pennsylvania will be one of the worst states in the country for independent voters. All this as we're celebrated as the swingiest of the swing states cycle after cycle. There is and the details of what system we adopt matters. Make sure you're paying attention and letting your voice be heard on this issue. Support your Pennsylvania Forward Party! Our system is designed to keep the major parties alive and fighting forever. We're trying to change that and we need your help. You can support us in many ways. Attending a call or event and sharing your perspective. Voting for a Forward Candidate. Telling your friends about what we're doing. Running for local office yourself. All of which you should do. But if you have the means, you can also support us financially. We don't need a lot, we are a volunteer organization and we keep costs to a minimum. But more people giving a few dollars a month creates a base of funds that we can rely on for things we want to do. Renting a table at a fair, printing materials, legal and bank services, all these things add up and we appreciate the people who contribute. We have big plans for this year and next, your contribution can help us make them happen. Any donation made on our website gets spend in our state and helps directly. Please consider contributing today. | "Become a PA Forward Donor" Click below to see more** And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Justice Dept. Records Detail Biden White House Pressure on Special Counsel Hur
body:
Judicial Watch announced it received from the U.S. Department of Justice in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit 49 pages of records detailing pressure asserted by Biden White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding the October 2023 interviews of then-President Biden in the criminal investigation into his theft, retention, and disclosure of classified records. Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers are also included in the records.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | May 19, 2025

Managers](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74076&L=35198&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtZ292dC1tYWtlcy1sZ2J0cWlhLXF1ZWVyLWxpZmUtdHJhaW5pbmctbWFuZGF0b3J5LWZvci1hbGwtZGVwdC1tYW5hZ2Vycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7d4a72aabcea90c543c041f9ec07ddb811134da6843264cf8932d759a13d26e5)** In the latest move to advance leftist policies in local government adjacent to the nation’s capital, the District of Columbia is forcing every department manager—and highly encouraging all employees—to undergo a special training on Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Queer (or Questioning), Intersex, Asexual, and more (LGBTQIA+). The course is titled “LGBTQIA+ Cultural Humility: A Space for Queer Life Training,” according to a memorandum distributed to “all District Government Personnel” by Charles Hall Jr., the director of the DC Department of Human Resources. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it received from the U.S. Department of Justice in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit 49 pages of records detailing pressure asserted by Biden White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding the October 2023 interviews of then-President Biden in the criminal investigation into his theft, retention, and disclosure of classified records. Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers are also included in the records. | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 19, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced it received from the U.S. Department of Justice in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit 49 pages of records detailing pressure asserted by Biden White House and Joe Biden’s personal lawyers on Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding the October 2023 interviews of then-President Biden in the criminal investigation into his theft, retention, and disclosure of classified records. Non-disclosure agreements signed by the president’s lawyers are also included in the records. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it has filed an ethics complaint to the U.S. House of Representatives Office of Congressional Conduct against Representatives LaMonica McIver (D-NJ), Rob Menendez (D-NJ), and Bonnie Watson Coleman (D-NJ). The complaint stems from misconduct during an altercation at the Delaney Hall Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention facility in Newark, NJ, on May 9, 2025. ---|--- | | | | | In the latest move to advance leftist policies in local government adjacent to the nation’s capital, the District of Columbia is forcing every department manager—and highly encouraging all employees—to undergo a special training on Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, Queer (or Questioning), Intersex, Asexual, and more (LGBTQIA+). The course is titled “LGBTQIA+ Cultural Humility: A Space for Queer Life Training,” according to a memorandum distributed to “all District Government Personnel” by Charles Hall Jr., the director of the DC Department of Human Resources. ---|--- | | | | | A decade after a Homeland Security Advisory Council determined that “true levels of corruption within CBP [Customs and Border Protection] are not known,” a myriad of cases, including several in the last few weeks alone, indicates the problem is as serious as it was ten years ago at the nation’s biggest law enforcement agency. ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "Kash Patel is the perfect choice to reform the FBI. Kash will bring transparency and accountability back to an agency that became irredeemably corrupt and the tip of the spear in unfettered lawfare against any American seen as a threat to the ruling class. " Judicial Watch Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "Comey is a dirty cop, and his threatening Trump's life is perfectly consistent with his behavior." Fox News Patel pointed to the FBI's handling of the Hillary Clinton email investigation as an example of political bias and institutional failure. "The FBI hijacked the constitutional responsibility of the Department of Justice and the Attorney General, and James Comey and others specifically decided what cases to prosecute and not prosecute." | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Lizzie pulled an all-nighter to protect our health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
While the country slept, Lizzie was fighting through the night to protect our health care.
For more than 26 hours, Lizzie fought back against the Republican budget that would gut Medicaid, eliminate federal funding for Planned Parenthood, and put health care out of reach for millions—all so the GOP can give billionaires like Elon Musk the biggest tax cut in American history.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe2505budgetreconciliation?refcode=lpfe2505budgetreconciliation]
Republicans are not just proposing harmful cuts to Medicaid and reproductive care—they’re bypassing the normal Congressional funding process to do it. This isn’t about fiscal responsibility. It’s about giving tax breaks to the billionaires.
Here’s what’s at stake:
❌ Medicaid coverage for children.
❌ Support for seniors in nursing homes.
❌ Access to maternal health care and to essential reproductive health care at Planned Parenthood centers nationwide, including annual exams, cancer screenings, pap smears, STI testing, and family planning.
That’s not an exaggeration. Republicans keep saying that they aren’t cutting Medicaid. But they are implementing programs that are designed to kick people off the Medicaid rolls—even people who qualify. In reviewing this budget bill, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office found that it will take away health care for nearly 14 million Americans through a combination of new requirements and failure to extend tax subsidies for the ACA marketplace.
Bottom line: This bill will make things harder, more expensive, and riskier for everyone. And it’s not just people who rely on Medicaid who are at risk. Emergency rooms will be overwhelmed, chronic illnesses will go untreated, and states and hospitals will be forced to shoulder more financial burden.
As Lizzie pointed out, across Texas, people rely on Medicaid for the care they need to live lives of meaning with dignity. In TX-07, 32% of children depend on Medicaid. And across the state, Medicaid covers half of all births.
If Republicans get their way, Medicaid funding will be cut—not to balance the budget, not to reduce the national debt, not to improve care for people in the program. The funding cut to Medicaid (and also to food stamps) is going to pay for tax cuts for Elon Musk and his billionaire buddies.
Lizzie is fighting to stop these cruel cuts. She’s standing up for children, seniors, people with disabilities, and hardworking families—and she needs us with her.
Will you chip in today to help Lizzie keep raising the alarm and keep up the public pressure to make sure Texans and all Americans can get the health care they need and deserve? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe2505budgetreconciliation?refcode=lpfe2505budgetreconciliation]
We’re seeing what happens when extremists are in charge. This budget bill shows it. But the midterm elections will be here before we know it. Let’s make sure we take back the House so that bills like this one never make it to the House floor.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe2505budgetreconciliation?refcode=lpfe2505budgetreconciliation]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: The Big Money Playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Just look at what Republicans have been doing in Congress.
They have been voting to advance cuts on hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid, veterans benefits, and Social Security **so that they can give it to the billionaires who elected them** , in the form of tax cuts and sweetheart government contracts to companies like SpaceX.
They know that it is deeply unpopular. They know that it hurts you.
But they are not here to serve us. They are here to serve themselves and the billionaires who have paid them. **Oligarchy**.
They know that the only chance they have to get away with such an unpopular agenda — to get away with stealing in plain view — is to stoke deep divisions among us along lines of race, identity, and culture to keep us distracted.
This has been the Big Money Playbook — not just now, but for generations.
And that is why **Donald Trump is not an aberration**.
He is the logical and inevitable conclusion to an American political system that has been dominated by corporate and dark money.
And if we are here to defeat him, **we must defeat the system that created him**.
**That means that we choose to out-organize the oligarchy**. We will, and we must, do away with the power of big money in our politics.
[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? Every dollar helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250519.jlKa6T&refcode=em20250519-8891-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250519.jlKa6T&refcode=em20250519-8891-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250519?refcode=em20250519-8891-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8891_2526796_3EpfuS&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250519-8891-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8891%2E2526796%2E3EpfuS)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Loving your country doesn’t require believing it’s perfect
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=68%2E1086043%2EBLbTda ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=68%2E1086043%2EBLbTda ]Wes Moore for Governor

Let me tell
you about my grandfather.

He was born in South Carolina, the child of Jamaican immigrants. When he
was just six years old they were chased back to Jamaica by the Ku Klux
Klan. But my
grandfather returned — and he’s one of the most patriotic men I have ever
met in my life.

I often find myself asking: what would make him come back to America?

His journey from American exile to American patriot has lessons for all of
us who have complex feelings about this country.

First, he taught me that patriotism is not and cannot be a passive
activity. The love of your country will be tested in big and small ways.

Second, he taught me that patriotism is not the belief that your country
is perfect nor is it the understanding that your country has ever been
perfect. Because loving your country is loving its history. That being an
American is about struggle and sacrifice, but it’s worth fighting for.

Third, he taught me that skepticism about your country is justified. You
should always let skepticism be your companion, but never be your captor.
Let the hard truths you’ve learned about America be guides towards a
better future, not grudges that will keep you in the past.

These lessons guide me through every day. I know this country is not
perfect, but I know we can strive to make it better. That’s what this
movement is about.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250519-1?refcode=em-20250519-1&refcode2=68_1086043_BLbTda&akid=68%2E1086043%2EBLbTda ]Will
you join me in this mission to build a better future by chipping in
$5 or whatever you can today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250519-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250519-1&refcode2=68_1086043_BLbTda&akid=68%2E1086043%2EBLbTda ]Donate $5 ››

Wes Moore

clean_body: [ ]Wes Moore for Governor[ ]Wes Moore for Governor Let me tell you about my grandfather. He was born in South Carolina, the child of Jamaican immigrants. When he was just six years old they were chased back to Jamaica by the Ku Klux Klan. But my grandfather returned — and he’s one of the most patriotic men I have ever met in my life. I often find myself asking: what would make him come back to America? His journey from American exile to American patriot has lessons for all of us who have complex feelings about this country. First, he taught me that patriotism is not and cannot be a passive activity. The love of your country will be tested in big and small ways. Second, he taught me that patriotism is not the belief that your country is perfect nor is it the understanding that your country has ever been perfect. Because loving your country is loving its history. That being an American is about struggle and sacrifice, but it’s worth fighting for. Third, he taught me that skepticism about your country is justified. You should always let skepticism be your companion, but never be your captor. Let the hard truths you’ve learned about America be guides towards a better future, not grudges that will keep you in the past. These lessons guide me through every day. I know this country is not perfect, but I know we can strive to make it better. That’s what this movement is about. [ ]Will you join me in this mission to build a better future by chipping in $5 or whatever you can today? [ ]Donate $5 ›› Elevate, Wes Moore You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

It's a special Monday panel show here on the Sean Spicer Show. After lying to our faces for years about Joe Biden's mental decline, CNN's greatest grifter Jake Tapper is now trying to profit off the lie he told on air night after night. From an open border, fake jobs reports and an economy on the brink of collapse, according to the Democrats, Joe Biden's greatest sin was not recognizing George Clooney at a fundraising event. RFK Jr. was on a tear on Capitol Hill. From fluoride to petroleum dyes to Alzheimer's, RFK put the smack down on Democratic congress members. His most impactful plee was about our children, the future of the country, asking Democrats to work together. David Hogg is one step closer to getting red pilled after getting removed as DNC Vice Chair because of gender equality. Pete Buttigieg has no answer for his absolute failure as Secretary of Transportation, including his $800 Billion plan that failed to connect rural areas to high speed internet. Our all star panel is here to unpack it all.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Listen first, act second
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4721%2E35263%2Eoj5AG4)
Peter, Unlike Donald Trump and Elon Musk, first, I listen — then I act. I heard directly from Wisconsin’s veterans about how difficult it’s become to access essential services at their local VA after Trump’s federal budget cuts and recent DOGE layoffs went into effect. Many veterans have had to schedule appointments weeks in advance to receive care and worry about disruptions in VA services — these are the benefits they’ve _earned_ through their brave service. **There’s _nothing_ “efficient” about Donald Trump and Elon Musk creating havoc and uncertainty for our veterans.** We must honor the promises we made to those who donned the uniform and went into harm’s way on behalf of all our freedoms. I will stand up to anyone, no matter their title or wealth, to ensure we uphold our promises to these vets. **[If you stand with me, please sign on to tell Donald Trump and Elon Musk hands off the VA and our veterans’ benefits:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/hands-off-va-funding/?t=4&akid=4721%2E35263%2Eoj5AG4)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/hands-off-va-funding/?t=5&akid=4721%2E35263%2Eoj5AG4)

Join Democrats in rejecting Trump’s agenda! >>

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995066/546512421/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjI5ZmIwNC1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0EaO8mE_ItAqQ_TEhCNaIicEyWUq5Z_Aq2JkFlhQ9s=)
---
**Last month marked President Trump’s 100 first days in Congress and he rang it in with an dismal approval rating of 41%** – _one of the lowest in modern history._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995067/546512422/305557911?refcode=NDCAF_20250519_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjI5ZmIwNC1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0EaO8mE_ItAqQ_TEhCNaIicEyWUq5Z_Aq2JkFlhQ9s=&emci=f30737ad-d334-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b29fb04-fe34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)****The numbers say it all: The American people are rejecting his MAGA agenda** – slashing Social Security, hollowing out vital federal agencies, and trampling the Constitution with reckless executive orders.

Instead of lowering costs for working families, he’s driven up prices with costly trade wars and wants to waste $90 million on a self-glorifying military parade.

**Trump isn’t governing for us, he’s governing for himself and his billionaire buddies like Elon Musk.**

Now is the time to channel this momentum into action. That’s why we’re turning to top Democrats like you for your input: | [**How would you grade Trump’s first 100 days in office?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995068/546512423/305557911?refcode=NDCAF_20250519_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjI5ZmIwNC1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0EaO8mE_ItAqQ_TEhCNaIicEyWUq5Z_Aq2JkFlhQ9s=&emci=f30737ad-d334-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b29fb04-fe34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995069/546512424/305557911?refcode=NDCAF_20250519_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjI5ZmIwNC1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0EaO8mE_ItAqQ_TEhCNaIicEyWUq5Z_Aq2JkFlhQ9s=&emci=f30737ad-d334-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b29fb04-fe34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [A: Good »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995070/546512425/305557911?refcode=NDCAF_20250519_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjI5ZmIwNC1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0EaO8mE_ItAqQ_TEhCNaIicEyWUq5Z_Aq2JkFlhQ9s=&emci=f30737ad-d334-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4b29fb04-fe34-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

clean_body: Join Democrats in rejecting Trump’s agenda! >> | = Last month marked President Trump’s 100 first days in Congress and he rang it in with an dismal approval rating of 41% – one of the lowest in modern history. numbers say it all: The American people are rejecting his MAGA agenda – slashing Social Security, hollowing out vital federal agencies, and trampling the Constitution with reckless executive orders. Instead of lowering costs for working families, he’s driven up prices with costly trade wars and wants to waste $90 million on a self-glorifying military parade. Trump isn’t governing for us, he’s governing for himself and his billionaire buddies like Elon Musk. Now is the time to channel this momentum into action. name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Unbearable loss, unimaginable cruelty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107995205/546512877/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE548_20250519_GALifeSupport_PL_FOTL_v1s1&sourceid=1056190&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGRlMWQ0OS1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=899gb9URoV44r-WaI1s9N5P09fa6_9K-97yJd_qiodQ=) **Content warning:** _This message mentions forced pregnancy, death, and medical cruelty. While stories like this are important in understanding the true impact of abortion bans, if you need to avoid reading details, please take care of yourself._ I wake up every morning motivated and determined to lead EMILYs List in our mission to elect more women and fight for fundamental freedoms nationwide. But there are moments when I find it very, very difficult to be civil to our opponents. This is one of those moments.

_NPR_ just published a story about Adriana Smith, a 30-year-old nurse and mother who was declared brain-dead in February following a medical emergency. At the time, she was about two months pregnant — and because she lived in Georgia, where abortion is banned after six weeks, she has been kept on life support ever since. Under Georgia law, brain death is considered legal death, but because of the state's draconian abortion law, doctors have been required to keep her body functioning for the sole purpose of continuing the pregnancy. Adriana has now been on life support for over three months, and is 21 weeks pregnant. Her five-year-old son still visits her at the hospital. Her mother describes it as "torture."

**Georgia's abortion ban is keeping a brain-dead woman on life support to carry a pregnancy because her doctors are afraid that taking her off life support could lead to their arrest.**

I will have this story in my heart the next time I hear a Republican falsely claim to be "pro-life" or "pro-family," or describe their abortion bans as "common sense" legislation. I will think about Adriana, and I'll think of her five-year-old son, sitting at her bedside, watching machines keep his mother's body alive months after her heart stopped beating. How will this be explained to him one day? Will it feel like "common sense" or "family values" to him then?

This is not a fringe case or a theoretical debate. It's a devastating reality made possible by laws written by politicians who do not care about women — not their lives, not their dignity, and not their deaths.

This story is an unmitigated tragedy. Adriana and her family deserve so much better. This is not about gestational weeks or legal exceptions. It's about control. It's about who has the power to make choices about our bodies, our futures, and our families. In Georgia right now, that power belongs to lawmakers who treat women like incubators.

It's as simple as this, Peter: **For Republicans, the cruelty is the point.** The _only_ way to end this cruelty and restore the rights that will protect women is to get the GOP out of power.

I hope you are as determined as I am to elect women and _take back power_ from the extremists who caused this tragedy. May Adriana Smith rest in peace, and may her story galvanize us to fight harder. Thank you for taking a stand,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
President, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107995207/546512879/1604663249?refcode=WUENE548_20250519_GALifeSupport_PL_FOTL_v1s1&sourceid=1056190&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGRlMWQ0OS1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=899gb9URoV44r-WaI1s9N5P09fa6_9K-97yJd_qiodQ=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995336/546513325/-577349673?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Emma_250519_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxMTJjOS1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnNfl28zq49Fe1Wfhrnp0f5VlcOBMzJgS7YR5efYVWs=) Hi there, Derek. I’m Emma, Digital Finance Director for Mark Warner.

I’m thrilled to be joining Senator Warner’s campaign – and for the opportunity to get to know grassroots supporters like you.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**chip in to support Mark’s reelection campaign,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107995337/546513326/-577349673?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Emma_250519_T1_1_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTMxMTJjOS1mZTM0LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bnNfl28zq49Fe1Wfhrnp0f5VlcOBMzJgS7YR5efYVWs=) but first, I want to take a minute to tell you why your donation _today_ will help us win _next year._

It might seem like the election is far away, but after working on campaigns for years, I can confidently tell you that the best way to secure a path to victory is by **working hard early to raise money.** Early donations allow us to grow our staff and plan for more critical investments down the line – we’re talking voter mobilization, launching television ads, and supporting volunteers.

But that’s not all. The more Senator Warner leads the fight in Washington to curb the chaos of the Trump administration, the more we need to be prepared for Republican super PACs to target this seat. And they’ve got Elon Musk on their side, Derek. He’s someone who, _in a matter of minutes_ , can drop MILLIONS of dollars into a super PAC that’s targeting Mark. And he can do it without even blinking an eye.

**Meanwhile, our campaign relies on support from grassroots donors like you.** I know your $5 or $50 donation might feel like a drop in the bucket up against Elon’s millions. But the truth is, when every person on this team steps up and gives, it adds up.

_Your support can fend off attacks from the most powerful, wealthy special interests in the country – believe me, I’ve seen it before._

name: Team Emerge
subject: We know what works
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
After 20 years of Emerge, we know what works, and we have the results to prove it.

Here are five reasons why you should make an investment in Emerge today:

1️⃣ Emerge continues to be one of the most successful organizations in Democratic politics, with an average 70% electoral win rate over the past five years.

2️⃣ The national average win rate for first-time candidates is between 10% and 15%. For first-time candidates who go through the Emerge program, the rate soars to 50%!

3️⃣ In 2024, Emerge alums helped secure women-majority state legislatures in New Mexico and Nevada. California, Colorado, Arizona, and Oregon also have women-majority state legislatures thanks to Emerge alums.

4️⃣ Emerge’s award-winning Gavel In training is specifically designed to train more women jurists to win judgeships. As of today, 100+ Emerge alums currently serve in judgeships.

5️⃣In less than a decade, Emerge’s Congressional Caucus has grown to 13 members strong. Each cohort of Seated Together, our training program focused on Black women seeking higher office, has produced a member of Congress!

Together, we’ve built an incredible network of support and helped transform the face of government one candidate, one race, and one victory at a time.

Will you make an investment in Emerge today to help us train the next generation of women leaders to join our alums and build an even stronger firewall against the Trump Administration’s extreme agenda?

DONATE NOW (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-emrg-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-05-19_1&amount=25)

Team, **Roger Stone recently said Senator Mark Kelly should be charged with treason and _executed_ for calling out Trump’s corruption.** This isn’t just outrageous. It’s a clear warning shot from Trump’s inner circle. And it proves something we already knew: These Republican extremists aren’t just trying to win elections. They’re trying to silence and intimidate anyone who stands in their way. That’s why electing _more_ Democrats here in Arizona — up and down the ballot — has never been more important. **Because this isn’t just about Mark Kelly.**
It’s about the school board member who speaks up for inclusive classrooms.
The county recorder who defends free and fair elections.
The state legislator who refuses to bend to MAGA extremism. **They’re all targets. And they _all_ need our support.** The far-right is pouring money into Arizona because they know we’re THE battleground state of 2026. If they can bully and buy their way back into power here, they’ll use Arizona as a launchpad to sow even more chaos. **[We have to stop them. But we need your help. clean_body: | = Team, Roger Stone recently said Senator Mark Kelly should be charged with treason and executed for calling out Trump’s corruption. This isn’t just outrageous. It’s a clear warning shot from Trump’s inner circle. And it proves something we already knew: These Republican extremists aren’t just trying to win elections. They’re trying to silence and intimidate anyone who stands in their way. That’s why electing more Democrats here in Arizona — up and down the ballot — has never been more important. Because this isn’t just about Mark Kelly. It’s about the school board member who speaks up for inclusive classrooms. The county recorder who defends free and fair elections. The state legislator who refuses to bend to MAGA extremism. They’re all targets. And they all need our support. The far-right is pouring money into Arizona because they know we’re THE battleground state of 2026. If they can bully and buy their way back into power here, they’ll use Arizona as a launchpad to sow even more chaos. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** = | = = | = = Thank you, Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. body:
#
Beto just joined Brian Tyler Cohen on his podcast:
**[Watch Now](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250519.RWfzP8&refcode=ema20250519-240118&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=240118%2E444211%2EEG6pdF)**
Here’s just a snippet of what Beto had to say:
> There's a lot of power in bringing people together and it does feel a lot like 2017 when I first got out there on the road.
> You know, people understand clearly what is happening to this country: undermining the Constitution, the rule of law, the attacks on our fellow Americans, especially the most vulnerable, and they want to see us fight, all of us.
> And I think this false choice being offered to Democrats, you know, are, are you gonna be more moderate, more centrist, are you gonna be more progressive? It's the wrong question.
> It’s ‘are you gonna surrender or are you gonna fight?’ People want us to fight.
[**Please take a moment to watch Beto’s interview with Brian Tyler Cohen and then donate to Powered by People to help us organize across Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250519.RWfzP8&refcode=ema20250519-240118&t=2&akid=240118%2E444211%2EEG6pdF)
Thank you,

name: General John King
subject: Send a General to Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL |
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f3d0969194ca49d285bb24624fc69082&_e=1Mq8Wb3fKBC7Hsz_7ZYM-jHnnoKzTBfG5M3G3MItI0QWOQY6WCJZHpHKpb5Sy2Ng_oa57nmdRnc3q0TWq4hUjYi5SN-skkALP0CWPRf2VMSWPE2IxeisWBL32aBv8b_G8X2nWgDxLzq21liJ4unNf4JJXMRUt0PnFpD7XlltHevz19cSbkpSPEob8ilbNVUbr8iBng-I_2MXrxjwd_5pIDO7d88QTVDc3VJc9pd2aFQogrfM2cwtw7iJRkDAoCcaCGgbmhU9F-ZZusOzeoSiCQ7VFgSyDVnpS2W6t85rQJW1WegS2hA66sBWHXpcj_7_7ebgtyJuudcPXcoKixqA_c8GRMtLFzxmeqnxy-O9_wNJNd1bR4kxBsO0aLNW81w1l6rQWmWvP-4URWiEnfbh9uCtQOC40tI-c4ikWDLYcOA%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, my name is John King.

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL - I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f3d0969194ca49d285bb24624fc69082&_e=1Mq8Wb3fKBC7Hsz_7ZYM-jHnnoKzTBfG5M3G3MItI0QWOQY6WCJZHpHKpb5Sy2Ng_oa57nmdRnc3q0TWq4hUjYi5SN-skkALP0CWPRf2VMSWPE2IxeisWBL32aBv8b_G8X2nWgDxLzq21liJ4unNf4JJXMRUt0PnFpD7XlltHevz19cSbkpSPEob8ilbNVUbr8iBng-I_2MXrxjwd_5pIDO7d88QTVDc3VJc9pd2aFQogrfM2cwtw7iJRkDAoCcaCGgbmhU9F-ZZusOzeoSiCXd5vU0_NxsxsXfcK6C8K8-l3N70j4DBfz5Yzr-aVbibXEgLQI0A9asweU0vgJLgih5twaffZh7sHxtiDxJERUFuGpsadCsIG4q3Vqvh2O0M5Di5w5REvMoYA8Isa6wO6Q0xH4lkn0MwD1rkq9Ncd_M%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f3d0969194ca49d285bb24624fc69082&_e=1Mq8Wb3fKBC7Hsz_7ZYM-jHnnoKzTBfG5M3G3MItI0QWOQY6WCJZHpHKpb5Sy2Ng_oa57nmdRnc3q0TWq4hUjYi5SN-skkALP0CWPRf2VMSWPE2IxeisWBL32aBv8b_G8X2nWgDxLzq21liJ4unNf4JJXMRUt0PnFpD7XlltHevz19cSbkpSPEob8ilbNVUbr8iBng-I_2MXrxjwd_5pIDO7d88QTVDc3VJc9pd2aFQogrfM2cwtw7iJRkDAoCcaCGgbmhU9F-ZZusOzeoSiCX70CX7Xtq3F9zFF6ddt56F9DDsZQQlWcTzE17lTvt94C6rq6449bq0X87dyWEaw8ePJ3H8CZiXmOmC8vcL0SdWWzUDYF4qRj5X-Ofg8vIU7kNZPSics95k2ZJHix8ege7x6a3jbLHUwBAq6smrGE5g%3D)

**I'm proud to support President Trump.** I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state.

[**President Trump is putting America First, but for his agenda to succeed he needs a four-year majority - and that road runs straight through Georgia.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f3d0969194ca49d285bb24624fc69082&_e=1Mq8Wb3fKBC7Hsz_7ZYM-jHnnoKzTBfG5M3G3MItI0QWOQY6WCJZHpHKpb5Sy2Ng_oa57nmdRnc3q0TWq4hUjYi5SN-skkALP0CWPRf2VMSWPE2IxeisWBL32aBv8b_G8X2nWgDxLzq21liJ4unNf4JJXMRUt0PnFpD7XlltHevz19cSbkpSPEob8ilbNVUbr8iBng-I_2MXrxjwd_5pIDO7d88QTVDc3VJc9pd2aFQogrfM2cwtw7iJRkDAoCcaCGgbmhU9F-ZZusOzeoSiCev7rX8lA2NTtBweQ1x7qc4wSfNCeYn1bkjvOfCwS6GMBIvvqPKjdelD1pNGCmmJ7vTx-Wh0T8CdFRQ4Spqaa30hjvTMiIuCjfWr-aRf_gDW2vQIz_xswYz9fckwrPcpDiAs420X5JvAc1M7mroEj6s%3D)

Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. name: Wesley Bell
subject: In times of crisis, St. Louis County shows up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

In the wake of the severe storms and tornadoes that have impacted St. Louis, **I want to take a moment to tell you – my prayers are with you.**

Over the weekend, I traveled the region listening to your stories and working alongside the amazing first responders and volunteers.

Time and again, when faced with adversity, _the people of St. Louis show what it means to look out for one another._ First responders, utility crews, neighbors, and volunteers have been working around the clock to clear debris, restore power, and check on those in need.

**If you are in need of assistance, or are interested in volunteering or donating, please reach out to my team at info@bell4mo.com.**

Thank you to every member of this community who continues to show what it means to stand together.

Stay safe and take care,

Wesley

| PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI

PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Team DNC
subject: A note about the importance of a strong Democratic Party:
body:
---
Derek, If the first few months of Trump’s administration have shown us anything, it’s that this moment demands a strong Democratic Party. **We’re asking for a chance to earn your trust and support as we keep building it.** But before we do, we want to take a minute to explain how we’ve put thousands of grassroots contributions to work so far this year, and why your support makes a difference — especially right now. This year alone, we’ve:
* Invested heavily in elections across the country, which led to huge wins in places like Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
* Taken Trump and DOGE to court over their illegal power grabs.
* Held town halls across the country, giving thousands of Americans a chance to make their voices heard — even if their Republican representatives refuse to meet with them.
* Announced a historic $1 million monthly investment in Democratic state parties across the country, ensuring Democrats in red, blue, and purple have states the resources they need to compete — and win — up and down the ballot.

And this is just the beginning. That’s why, as a key member of this grassroots team, your support right now could not be more important. We are committed to continuing our work to organize and mobilize against Trump while electing Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. **That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say?** **[Can you pitch in to support the Democratic National Committee today? We’ll put your contribution directly to work electing Democrats.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250519_3471_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3471_22930333_MHzTgS&akid=3471%2E22930333%2EMHzTgS)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250519_3471_fr&refcode2=3471_22930333_MHzTgS&akid=3471%2E22930333%2EMHzTgS)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250519_3471_fr&refcode2=3471_22930333_MHzTgS&akid=3471%2E22930333%2EMHzTgS)**
---
****
Thank you for everything,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Mitch Kates
subject: PBS is a backbone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to Julia Child and more, PBS has long been a cultural backbone of our society.

**Now, Trump is trying to make them the enemy.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107996330/546516375/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250519_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_Mitch_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I4ZDdjOS0wMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nX2GQXex2LR8DhNUzGF1gn_vX1LvHcqiURiL8r_Qjg=&emci=b9b8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bcb8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296) **More than that, he’s making empathy and education the enemy.**

If we’re not careful, a whole generation will be raised without these values.

[**Here at PA Dems, we’re working hard to keep PBS, education, and empathy afloat. So, we want to know: What was your favorite PBS show? What did you learn from PBS?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107996331/546516376/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250519_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_Mitch_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I4ZDdjOS0wMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nX2GQXex2LR8DhNUzGF1gn_vX1LvHcqiURiL8r_Qjg=&emci=b9b8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bcb8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296) | [SHARE YOUR PBS STORY >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107996332/546516377/-1705150723?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250519_ENG_PBS_0_3MO_Mitch_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I4ZDdjOS0wMjM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9nX2GQXex2LR8DhNUzGF1gn_vX1LvHcqiURiL8r_Qjg=&emci=b9b8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bcb8d7c9-0235-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=25616296)

name: This is Steve Scalise
subject: I'm sorry. Really:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am genuinely sorry, Peter.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._
**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. [You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement - and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/6Ack9RcIGsB5vkRIqhNdXBKL15pRz08DJuYNz5Gu4Rs3sBY8eVklcOgt2aFXi3o-sOO0OTuouW0FYD1ZU_EAYtys9Td7OIIdBj9vENrTWK-wltGBY9ULxbIdaHVGksXa-bNpzV2diymJ0543jy_JCkV5oi19lLsjDoEzvIlgoqr84qSJLvBelfWZ99AuwxBTrGd7IUtWNveXl3zC8slgTodbvRJ3s_LRoMRGOozgmhtAfgM35HfImG9gTdYQrk4ogOf4qJfZ07RbdYVcbRAkB0zyIL-Jxb6qvqRLHS5onYEsIe8QOx2L4CLMPKP2R4FonYwELXK7z0jbNI9KWIlsOX8i_A58myw0T3x1jq7OovxiVbiUz6Iu0Fm2w7FaxLb2nLS7h9EWNqUBGkz34JHRN7DXEDsO1GQzL1dkviigW0gL_7j7BgqSbf0G4nwWBgv0uaagZjUYe_rfLfmyFRhyRLtgOt7JznfCuT2hUB1Egd4hs22di9U/01JQoJ4-Vy0_uLpFQp9k-icVipx2ZMpi/9)**
Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.
They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.
[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/FblnfBITOEsh9arjDSP1kzvp60a51oTB42nsnNyEMsqwFCJE3G7m-2IFj2luFlELRn633g-4iJHTXmWM4I4a4uCrcrWJMdzDMD8YAdN5n6r68r_16ltQGWcnBgqDXNNWLtdKvYwrVp1fzAonVeqY1DyTJJ06Naz8rNxNAUhGDujqvSpxSj8lY5DZXeO8Q3ohdn4wY9FIeXaeFrZfMYgiwSEJ75L8tDqhbmqstui81iNB_9b2yh6Wb7dw-XgUjjG3rrTAnjVe1_w4_NPB2NX4io2k3r2CbRRGgt7baJKKADN2EQmSy0R94rIkT323-1RR0RAU064ZrokBhjKJpLH5I8--H8WGJ7FHhQ_3EMNa4XZKI7hbatLtVSEJMlPvWnZzzs7vxQrhSmr6ZF4XE-9MpmMNKeEl2e4dGwHi5Q_jg9ncMVxZkvHUDbAkmwIsGagFmDosbOgnsFX25zmhQyMxEjvxwzWCqbKn4fHPzxf5Fjd07yL4czA/2tKoBg93DoBAnQDJSN3Q4Potwp2tROK9/9)
_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _
BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.
Our MOST IMPORTANT deadline yet is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.
[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final May deadline?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ewpIEk2_ZgUXiWopHMUbAAzlb-IhYCwUmKRrykGy0l6-IPUln7QEBdaIkjleWrvrQ-1mF-wyIem0qFih5bANAG7nv3Y5NEevGrXUNiAU_y69aqJlWT0-yVGImiB7-rXUNzHWujB_NgT5wZQEldSkVRsSvX7txA232DY00R-Eq3ay2TxFqRK88pcVjR6czq7zKWrouoDvAmpgzn8fe8kKw1nFKsILsyFkhRHD2IWHJO35XHDFpYX1kuTLrb2ntz_ASU9fD9h9eFVcflHDFoXDRJ6w_mK4YHVD8g2S7v7P38iCQlZRZV_RDluEtNziCI-CbnyL0ZHCWMFUNOXQHk41vV7oS-lDRKyT85LdP-TEP6VgeCNa9IIc7mbOxAQlY1aIq339L07FRopKP670-ZbHm7LuWuRydAe5V9WLWVxv4Gx-GAZe4KD_XMGKPZBLsJ9fTLJkkLnyLuOuK_X9juqTpW6Fwiru3bW349TN_7dcmuyJbYVRh90/iycgJG2A-FA13DjXyGuCfJJWdDwmsqxN/9)
It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE
](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1HKrKRnPP3CgPluQPKd92nzM4Nzqa2hrGZwBR0OnJw9BzhPcRg8CLzXQouULbe7OWpa3BIXjWXWDpR5z3i8AoMBL6nidN_MXvvcPsv9dWS_kHdB7dUuXLko8dYcCSBcibq4X_Pbciv8yAVXbagQK4qU-gPpF8BKMzSn4FNU75A3lhPcPFDz7hNkqPgDip-1kwSzqiupnn7JNN83UpKRepIj-G-_CXdNxJHuB2kkWbZ2n7Hi5UcQNp4BR9VBE_TbL4JE_e4qEsoRWEPicVBzk7cS3iSHPpkFCNfGM-p6i01eP-pfYXygbsI5EA6iawcAdlVBzolpawdwri577Yv6m0iuE7-W3K24LRz9qBSPViX4O3aQnX8UlWkcJjLrKr-GA1rJlJAV_bkz0T7L9QIC4hjGMMPJ4OuCCkJjxlPtvXRyTluNzxtcsTATjIp-KFQ3cj63QdUN7vuKX33RA9qUDHLfeI_-8BN7VETH3Jd9IMTM2TdsSJrs/m0dDiKeHCPrgHiligYOKxOKJCL35Lvzz/9)Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.
God bless you, _- Steve_
**STEVE SCALISE** House Majority Leader

* * *
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/HtH4Njl2_qxS4S53S0kCaFFMVjIrftpH70SXdysWt4jXUbV4TY2FgH9jwa6KffYV29o1NZVdrt2Wm0nKaNDMZGHxR9y3lfrbMRYZADPYW_OUWyi9dN5N9JULk5p57GkylmuvOmHfL91uFGQNPf1B331si3OomLKx9yjKo3hp0CpuIunfO-DEYtlZtw8iPJTAk2r6tOnGpRixYE7td8mTR_fhm5YLu-f00BsxoMXavxuk6UmKYg2bdK6-zJkIUIVeqnw6Uh7PSIMY8y3VNWRbPp66w9PIN7WwwPWYQeYGpuswWMcssSw57esBJPJUzr6wRHuhe3iEHsWQqfqVs6MZ_R2EDLyAhbCCcPbgeDeuwKNbELqnjzoR_3hj6cnxQQYS3c-bDnbi9obgy92wKq_Kd6X7QJoTqrLI0-NQ33azCGGeTQgM-4Bem8aRHSkXHbVq52EbG6zZ1RBl87PbUyuMQiNdUmdGbIcyZj7MR2xDk7PBVg/enhZed7bGpzUlu8OgCrFkEn3cR3dNGXo/9)
As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/dr2yjo9ZPb4YhD-vNCE-YL5PN3fJK8sgjbErl8H0jgyUW7TfioSFxbzGNxA56ba0GVeHRd2yZ-qR64wkw9aQu7X-26MszlcJ_tDFbPxmvqAgTenuHkNeP_6sJWzp_4qbkSwKxXBgmcg3TiLYUWGOqXDikd-mvFZEWuowuy62OpI3Ej3GH_JnLJiiJSJgFuthVItAPtjWxZH71hoHEB2Mrv0P5c0_iHShctOUygiQ4i5GxRiboqCJ6gGgCad_l5SymJOyBqwScqOItFqbJ1QJ6O05FXGlCAnC-ZkQPJ2xqnDN7oIXl0mcvZXYUsFEjynrD5yR3J0WcOqq_27ki-SKmZCqwFmMOGnGNbaA2b9KyRhbJDYVRg6tpDWzcg2PCLpslQ4G6Sf_YS-SW-g9xgC4F5HAYuKlcsxrG9eY7XXFsqQTkseDCOG2iOBJ2gwdMLQsHia5cbJFE6dMFL-UmcHc4i2HuKr0lusDix2u0MENp1HoTg/T18dZPu8JhI_6h4OHwISuObXAXLcVDCN/9 "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**

clean_body: I am genuinely sorry, Peter. Really, I am. I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate. I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you. I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating. It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power. Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible. They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court. If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now. Our MOST IMPORTANT deadline yet is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda. It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help. way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart. God bless you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. " Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.** | | Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 | To unsubscribe from Team Scalise

name: John James
subject: My faith protected me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | [](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=fb89e393c0594e238f405719d0e34041&_e=pWS5pF_mdzSQqWpCffBurX1vO91p9GpIffkDabRnG3B3Xld6eVOK7rJ2z19OXkspDCqZeftKfItDA-AayJ3LsOuXZd5036XnnSUG-H3k6uFUQ3ekuptHa8FQxForlextIa-fMFJyJwDIxXaViWZ7Ijpi0tDKgjAGBvJEQe0JXwBRSA3QO63WJqCUzD_d6CPodMMBxNca8jbQPET_danMXmreQllMFsCmbUu7sLyE2K9o_408o3ZeRZuE4xZCUdUcWO_y7BP0nI-gLvzcoOMvgQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Growing up, my family were people of faith. We had faith in God, faith in our country, and faith that the best days were yet to come.

I learned that as long as I kept that faith close to my heart, I could achieve anything.

**_And when I flew as an Apache Helicopter Pilot in the U.S. Army, I leaned on my faith more than ever._** **My faith helped me remain strong in combat. It gave me the courage to lead two platoons during Operation Iraqi Freedom. **
The U.S. Army showed me the best of America - and unfortunately right now, that’s the America the Left wants to destroy.

My name is John James, and I’m running for Governor to save my state from the Democrats who are so desperate to divide us.

[**If we are going to unite our state and our nation under faith, patriotism, and American values, I need you to join me on this mission.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=fb89e393c0594e238f405719d0e34041&_e=pWS5pF_mdzSQqWpCffBurX1vO91p9GpIffkDabRnG3B3Xld6eVOK7rJ2z19OXkspDCqZeftKfItDA-AayJ3LsKSODE8AU_bgYq4p4PbzvJH2eXbyfaE2mfLNHk7Q3VhR1v_4XSC0Kv6YrkLFPr7OtDsgTAfSSMxrZYuTikQSdjNLEAw-T37VtgG85NavW1FFBhkT6gfeq_BMb9ffY7Xrg4tFTxgrvwVdIMBQkbaksuz68-EtxyZXROHK0a6vJVZB7vfx53361QdqQKdmsPGWBw%3D%3D)
---
[ **STAND WITH ME** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=fb89e393c0594e238f405719d0e34041&_e=pWS5pF_mdzSQqWpCffBurX1vO91p9GpIffkDabRnG3B3Xld6eVOK7rJ2z19OXkspDCqZeftKfItDA-AayJ3LsFeMcfR2VKf5q83T6FcjwnVzGTbikwrCCcKYjyUuiNN3us7bJBmarjSboGXiqDcX0wUDgzhNXO-8W2Y5Cg_P6BDGmNmqo3fkRremEy-IScRcS0Ww90smFsdpVcvvBrzE-KLfUq2Ny47RSI0cC12neVC4xE5MKdsSMB0VRd8XG9y2a7JpPg7XEyrfuVayLlvWyw%3D%3D)
---
It’s no secret to anyone who is paying attention. The radical Left has launched an all-out war on the values my fellow servicemembers and I put our lives on the line fighting for. **You see it with the support of terrorism on college campuses and the Democrats cheering it on.**
The irony is, the more Democrats claim they’re fighting these evils, the closer they are to bringing them right here to our community.

I may have hung up my flight suit, but I’m not done fighting for America, and I’m going to need a co-pilot by my side if we’re going to finish this mission.

[**Join our team today to DEFEND American values from the Left and get our country back on track.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=fb89e393c0594e238f405719d0e34041&_e=pWS5pF_mdzSQqWpCffBurX1vO91p9GpIffkDabRnG3B3Xld6eVOK7rJ2z19OXkspDCqZeftKfItDA-AayJ3LsA4Cl4_vLoEG4vyCrsXBw_6ZvIY1wdeCgGK2QueFJqoGyC99PsMiWq0bWG9pJvYoSeo54Dol-OE_rcs3lok4sa0bRwjOQLN6gZZzRJd5MgNmeu4hAKFVupWmp-6BwivCnHqtFuob4ey_dZE8wkFcm7TT7ifTuh2VIkAcsOD6dZ3pA5Gc9cljh9u5rtJgsr2-1g%3D%3D)
---
[ **DEFEND AMERICAN VALUES** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=fb89e393c0594e238f405719d0e34041&_e=pWS5pF_mdzSQqWpCffBurX1vO91p9GpIffkDabRnG3B3Xld6eVOK7rJ2z19OXkspDCqZeftKfItDA-AayJ3LsC_N7VxP377wYjUPxSReUB6TQHtRhQKf38UQYbLxZ3foZWbJf32pAUb9xMK-z2ZETQnaMD2X_BzG1YZ0N4x9_N13RRUxkTnOY1TgCpAGxRVP8Fa_uf_VHWfBHM3fZRUw3f6XNuatBtN9HPMYOOBj40sAI0tqCQLIkxeUYphiuf9pc4ItNNRFz426WOZeTsVHYA%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,John James Former Apache Helicopter Pilot

## **[Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter Schools](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=67867851faaf4e098cd82fcd699887dd&_e=r-P8wbtgxDdpvxaBmRH_A_UUd9a_9Y1EIwRNQQd2wouZjLJE7O9eFUnAqHThon5S-xTs6jgj-VWfklgZz0Cw-5izSUWHNvBVV_8vtAIabJ87hOv-9rFusVcocdZJmqhOsxS-2jMObPOxsRp5qhpy4F3THzobUu2f4bAst60cy1gu9r19Rn7O6m8oRlLf5i-r8z_bOlJanh80ObjSdXrq5NrJdz1tgzQP8c8llqvTrjUYRY5gYYR8xYQZaMtL2Goqop7gTnayel-qEkXiDvY2BZWcTQXW_dcVyX1i8SCPuUqxdxEf9hVvbvYvF-nCZKhAkC-5jKMS-JOWsGqTRpUrY7OSsXhBCFLbGHG4radParxPXdpIenFePxcijdM1jlcu)**
Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma's charter-school program, and they're just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma's Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore's contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

That's why we're proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.

We'll argue _Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond_ this spring.

We're standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And we'd love for you to join us.
[ Give Now](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=67867851faaf4e098cd82fcd699887dd&_e=r-P8wbtgxDdpvxaBmRH_A_UUd9a_9Y1EIwRNQQd2wouZjLJE7O9eFUnAqHThon5S-xTs6jgj-VWfklgZz0Cw-5izSUWHNvBVV_8vtAIabJ87hOv-9rFusVcocdZJmqhOsxS-2jMObPOxsRp5qhpy4F3THzobUu2f4bAst60cy1gu9r19Rn7O6m8oRlLf5i-r8z_bOlJanh80ObjSdXrq5NrJdz1tgzQP8c8llqvTrjVRUxwxhzZQ4OIbnQgO9jZA4Y1F3yPFvoMR1kxYtSH0Zik1b5Fr2OCSjoRByFfCBQyx1T4kQIDqsOkzxwqqXLihEFx6mdgiS2SDIxwrezN0-qQjbCOZgjOWVLNKXeUx4Ob0NRlDHtwnwD_8ymb_SJD4)
