But I’ve never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option.
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6f3abbd7e4534b26b4bafcacfa1ddff3&_e=3PZV7r2HRpkY-IcTeGJY5V4DhmyKgzXAjAR1s6PDUJ1cskGoUB45HC6L3OmraJguelzTNaesyVz6BOxx0fXUa3Gr2a9_SRJxk-1F9xcVx3uzYoLo3-6rfQLUaW9E7thtxFQwBWwDre0ZA_26sX1Y19PRjdb9_ghJUZh1UP_heh5UvtEIO_IzrZzO2f9uZwLa7Hk9KDfuWhX_UBej8Fs3vJkQCVqdfuByExXHySoxuopjebLBmlQ2hOSca0SnwEVthS37Fg2poh_5aiwzOWeOIZAPGmecRXpGXXarCzK-TNJgvajWMenfWmfxJEIy2mMFwD-u-iKUiSIxvNMpH9pzk7wUHto02nFtxPgKBjUtl6eGA3gZ-iOPNv9sh5sRKq1N)
---
Peter,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the “safe” thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that’s not who I am._
---
**Throughout my life, I’ve never gone with the “safe” option. I do what’s _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I’m speaking out and I’ve prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling._
---
[**Please read it here: secure.rudygiulianifreedomfund.com/memo-access-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6f3abbd7e4534b26b4bafcacfa1ddff3&_e=3PZV7r2HRpkY-IcTeGJY5V4DhmyKgzXAjAR1s6PDUJ1cskGoUB45HC6L3OmraJguelzTNaesyVz6BOxx0fXUa3Gr2a9_SRJxk-1F9xcVx3uzYoLo3-6rfQLUaW9E7thtxFQwBWwDre0ZA_26sX1Y19PRjdb9_ghJUZh1UP_heh5UvtEIO_IzrZzO2f9uZwLa7Hk9KDfuWhX_UBej8Fs3vBcJkrAACmz6arhA1vWF7ATRQn7R8V7KPByv2OEVUES5ZwT1JEdU-Omfol374w3N4oqhFfZ1uMtmidLTB-_kvX5ZcpCA3TkEIw8YBlLFMV3UhQG3lAWbRMREu8NON_u18a-mWQBFjAK3ionZ9MtX7S3QBLu4AZdFN1DqgsNAa0v6)

subject: re: the “Gulf of America”
body:
Seriously? This is what they’re focused on.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107997156/546519424/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5MjM3NTQ2LTA1MzUtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=don4KEDh7gaUuo49jAm2hbqApXrYKFf978jJ6PhmK5s=) | Peter, Instead of focusing on anything of importance like jobs, healthcare, the economy, or keeping our communities safe, Republicans in Congress are instead focused on renaming the Gulf of Mexico as the “Gulf of America.” **Apparently, House GOP leadership thought some Democrats might go along with it. But lol, no. Every single Blue Dog voted NO!** This is the level of nonsense that we’re up against. Americans want to see Congress solve real problems, but... this is what the far-right cares about most. [_**Enough with the distractions! It’s time to get back to governing like real adults. Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sh*t done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. name: Team Bonta
subject: All Californians deserve equal opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250519&t=1&akid=1794%2E1088799%2EH4rYLA)
Since his inauguration, President Trump has issued multiple executive orders targeting programs in California and across the nation that incorporate or promote diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility.
Rob already filed one lawsuit against the administration for threatening to withhold billions from California schools over programs that ensure students from lower income families have access to the same high-quality education as their peers, support special education services, teach English to non-native speakers, and support children in foster care and housing.
Rob also filed a lawsuit against the administration when it unlawfully cut off more than $140 million in education grants meant to train and prepare qualified teachers. These programs get teachers into rural and urban schools; into hard-to-fill positions teaching math, science, and special education; and support aspiring teachers.
**Now, he’s also co-leading a coalition of attorneys general in filing an amicus brief in support of a challenge to Trump’s attack on programs and practices designed to ensure equal opportunity for all.**
Not only do these programs drive access to education, innovation, and economic growth — they also provide essential benefits to ensure a safe and welcoming environment for all.
As the Attorney General stated, _“the Trump administration’s attempt to remove programs and policies that combat discrimination and promote economic and social benefits is frankly un-American.”_
**In California we recognize the importance of diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility.[If you support Rob’s work to defend these values and programs that support so many, please consider donating $5 or more today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250519?refcode=em20250519-1794&amount=5&refcode2=1794_1088799_H4rYLA&akid=1794%2E1088799%2EH4rYLA)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250519?refcode=em20250519-1794&amount=5&refcode2=1794_1088799_H4rYLA&akid=1794%2E1088799%2EH4rYLA)**
— Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250519&t=3&refcode2=1794_1088799_H4rYLA&akid=1794%2E1088799%2EH4rYLA)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1794%2E1088799%2EH4rYLA)

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Congressman Pat Harrigan
subject: Message to Shady Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
He's trying to take away our Second Amendment

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOjJu40-Vu--244W_xLUi03yvAhcyhLJD_tYwHWL24OA9bPcBzWul4AIGNvlCbz_QzuNujC-kXOkIjCXrfBiFWaX13Abm8sy3x2lyDUQ6EOvjAlgUmaKqqoG9fIPAYCP_BTMHqSNaNs42iKJgQ-BGM6oQH2cV41mpYkzF02gFUmDxIXMBPq4W337799wP1z22hJPQQKQWd8kY7yqCl643tKI%3D)
---
Patriot,

As a veteran and a red-blooded American, it should be no surprise that I like things with a little extra... _firepower._

As a gun-owner, patriot, and staunch advocate for the Second Amendment, I understand what the Founding Fathers gave us when they afforded us the right to bear arms.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOjJu40-Vu--244W_xLUi03yvAhcyhLJD_tYwHWL24OA9AUbFAuBC7wZI-z-OPKCQxxBFcVtR5f9tP4mqrVxnXXcM9BoAw2e3W0f8F_Vifb1zTOCXrAFjTXHRWuKLrnWi_y-r7dhz8MniSvUzn6ewv6gmwLzYYj4snp5dsVDoMfch3M1i_FVuQYmXyBBBYT5c5N3gQQgkYDNfkNRtPlnxjoI%3D)
And despite what the Democrats may say, our rights are as uncompromisable as the word of God.

That's why, when I see people like Adam Schiff get up to a podium and say they're going to take away our guns because that's what his dark-money donors want to hear, **I can 't stand it.**

**I will never surrender when it comes to protecting our 2A rights; I didn 't serve this country just to go home and give up fighting for what I believe in. **

**When I was in Afghanistan, I commanded men and had to make some hard asks of people. I 'm about to do the same for you right now. **

[**I 'm asking you to make a $10 sacrifice for the fight to protect our Second Amendment.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOjJu40-Vu--244W_xLUi03yvAhcyhLJD_tYwHWL24OA9UTXFrsWwb0v6yYEZFiEFvsePmjEJBizq2CIoclaGe-HQl8DAXfpzSEYRYV1UyXUGNZY2tBNKrf3tgE106rI4W0divhM9_a4Oc9h8tYV6AHXtsXOCtuQi8XDHhzxCJ0snOpBg1rCKNF_HGzc2I3pqRWp_W3aeEk0WSGuFkZCy5iE%3D)

| [**MAKE A $10 SACRIFICE FOR THE 2A**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOuJONwqoHylQJW7j08LqRegv0ju8RuwITFpIkW93CJhSMTKTZhBo5q-0xeG4lxD-I_s6aSMbFg8cB8IFCcH8-M-sTC2jQ7kxTi1SMTmot2ctQIqTYR5UnjQjYsw_WpQeaaOZI3bCLLlQ7zqsVP31oYfGuF2evllY8P7mpkH_L6Nxg69QwTn0MHCntF2t3pzpcActKGypkAEnDLQ4kZcps3o%3D)
---

Our rights are like a house of cards; **if we let the Democrats take one away, the entire house could fall.** We can NOT compromise on what hundreds of thousands of Americans died for.

If you can spare the $10 I'm asking, or even just a few dollars, I would be eternally grateful. I will never stop fighting for our Second Amendment, I just need some reinforcements to stand with me.

[**If there 's anything you can sacrifice, click HERE or the button below. **](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOjJu40-Vu--244W_xLUi03yvAhcyhLJD_tYwHWL24OA9upLHnfwGuLdAP1MAOcjgw5xIMD2BdPycb2_a7v6muxXSW-TJfYtLrvGzH9-zBEMPyMkDLRK1bsZ9Phd5y0NihJc1CKI2LdaE2aEIudUAvzwbzGMMMAVbyad3nURjaoxWzVMWwrida9QCI41nG0L7q6wv6yCMczFqkroepero3t8%3D)

[**MAKE A SMALL-DOLLAR SACRIFICE FOR THE 2A**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOuJONwqoHylQJW7j08LqRegv0ju8RuwITFpIkW93CJhSSz5m512kXUc1uA4WJS_OB82ayAh0AmPlLpYG0uA93Xfyd4sncCuWuerk_YKsU2HSg964gkzBmHq5qJxWx3PSQjPNHN5rpmfAt7-FxlolFI0Pwx0PMBLJvJlHvc5bjMB4YypUP_Ma-63tXQDZSnlF-fHgxCjgUyWg9kBAL7gE35E%3D)
---

Thank you,

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=f1bd09b943914909821bb8b7cf5ba38b&_e=-JYumLzK5QrWvwyeWxT8LA8NDPb0Twal_TTsEXFN_zPN5HY7o4955W7SnJ7FDXrIXCNRIqc0fyvSHUR3ZzaVjEuBeAHJOZbhT69ekqQwjPSNI4Pm0zdeccHDgYbfLwyEVAKxstqfLHwU7wYMeVWGOjJu40-Vu--244W_xLUi03yvAhcyhLJD_tYwHWL24OA9KTSG45QCEwVXSmk4NDx6_frwNvjYGdbWIlUWWLD8RvYGlvq4GpukKqU_V2OEZwRddLp5UeLZA_1RckqTT7CVpcNcSlEB3JgDVKHA_VQe8I174T_ZVARIiHyjAEm4VqhZ7UUcyZouoMq1MtSPglMEuiSrpKxGjsZcW43Q7hqlY0s%3D)

Congressman Pat Harrigan, NC-10

_Christian, Husband, Father, Green Beret, West Point Grad, Business Owner_

That's why, when I see people like Adam Schiff get up to a podium and say they're going to take away our guns because that's what his dark-money donors want to hear, I can 't stand it. When I was in Afghanistan, I commanded men and had to make some hard asks of people. I 'm about to do the same for you right now. | Our rights are like a house of cards; if we let the Democrats take one away, the entire house could fall. We can NOT compromise on what hundreds of thousands of Americans died for. If you can spare the $10 I'm asking, or even just a few dollars, I would be eternally grateful. I will never stop fighting for our Second Amendment, I just need some reinforcements to stand with me. Thank you, Congressman Pat Harrigan, NC-10 Christian, Husband, Father, Green Beret, West Point Grad, Business Owner Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3ea84d768f6b43eb9109d569f19cde5c&_e=x4-f-V4DvxbA33HBHIXhct9qChan-g03sriFROu60Gg_TgxBF7IoUQZProNc9SQg8Whu0X8dJY87RXRrGDAjBXzey10A0I1sUzAWwR7zHLO38xLLRA6D3dAEH4tT0opZE5avgOfW51jOJsnHhPv0Mjvh84_ed5pRjMV97MTDfgu4BbZHRNRh9nr7KqYsMd0p5iprmF3YfIW9wvyV__0KWJIWOReWqzTUw3OSs1IvJTMW3ECtlsg_eJSNYwqQE9H4YzH36Y6nohAo5WrWYdXQsjCqwphP-chbNm0Z29VuqZIXFKnXIPdlUu9g3-WTui6nzZbry0qD9ssnLTdNLp2DoA%3D%3D)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Project 2025 is real, and it’s happening.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Trump administration isn’t even trying to hide their extreme intentions anymore.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250519-5063-footer&t=1&akid=5063%2E420207%2Ej2rOKf)
Peter, the Trump administration isn’t even trying to hide their extreme intentions anymore. They’re carrying out their agenda one executive order, one agency takeover, and one extremist nomination at a time.
**Despite the fact that Trump claimed he had never even heard of Project 2025, they’re implementing the exact policies that were laid out in it:**
* **The Department of Education is under siege** with efforts to erase history, attack LGBTQ+ youth, and roll back vital protections and services for disabled and other marginalized students.

* **Deportation raids are escalating** , with masked agents targeting peaceful immigrant communities, separating families, and even deporting children who are U.S. citizens.

* **The Department of Justice is being hollowed out** , and the ranks are being filled with Trump loyalists who view their job as serving Trump, not the American people.

If we’re going to stop this, **we need a massive people-powered movement** to stand up, fight back, and make sure Republican representatives know there will be a political price to pay if they allow this to continue.
That’s exactly why Pramila has been organizing inside _and_ outside of Congress to mobilize working people and defend our democracy. But since Pramila doesn’t take any corporate PAC money, she needs your support in this fight.
[**Peter, will you chip in $3 or more right now to help Pramila take on Trump’s extreme agenda and fight to stop Project 2025?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250519-1?refcode=em20250519-5063&amount=3&refcode2=5063_420207_j2rOKf&akid=5063%2E420207%2Ej2rOKf)

Thank you for standing with us in this fight,
Team Jayapal

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: People are concerned about our democracy, and they should be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I want you to understand what my colleagues and I mean when we say our democracy is in danger under the Trump administration. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107997845/546521766/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGNjMmY4MC0wODM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZAbgZQ4Zt9phU74FLqtygCuATMX2pIJtiTcV9AVYMM=&emci=e1f062c3-d634-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=90cc2f80-0835-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

I want you to understand why my colleagues and I say our democracy is at risk in the Trump era. This note is longer than our usual updates, but the topic is very important.

Our country was founded on the rejection of a tyrannical monarchy. Our Founding Fathers fought tooth and nail to build a republic where power rests with the people, not the rulers. **I’m grateful every day that we can choose our leaders, speak our minds, and raise our voices when the government loses its way, and hold officials accountable when they betray our values. And I’m very aware that this freedom of expression is not allowed in many parts of the world.**

Democracy, though, doesn’t run on autopilot. It relies on people who are engaged, voters who show up, leaders who honor election results, and citizens who refuse to stay silent when our institutions are threatened.

**What we’ve seen in just the first hundred days should rattle anyone who cares about the Constitution.**

Donald Trump accepted a luxury jet from Qatar as a “gift” while his family business angled for new deals in the Middle East. (That’s called self-dealing and profiting off the presidency.) He has frozen congressionally approved money for vital programs. (That’s called impoundment, and it is illegal.) He has slapped steep tariffs on close allies like Canada and Mexico, which hit Washington workers right in the wallet. (Tariffs are supposed to be determined by Congress except in emergencies, and there’s no emergency.)

He also put his unelected billionaire friend Elon Musk in charge of “trimming” the federal budget—a move that has already shuttered clinics and Head Start programs, kneecapped NIH research, left our forests unprotected, compromised the government’s ability to make sure our food and medications are safe, and cost thousands of jobs. And he’s undermined American leadership in the world, alienating our allies and cozying up to authoritarian adversaries like Vladimir Putin.

But most egregious of all: **the President released January 6 insurrectionists from prison on Day 1, and now these most loyal and sometimes violent supporters are in every community ready to carry out his wishes. Now President Trump casually muses about seeking a third term which, of course, is unconstitutional. He called it a joke. I call it a warning.**

Some shrug off his boasts as bluster, but the last hundred days prove he does not feel at all constrained by the rule of law. I won’t wait for someone else to step in. Our democracy is too hard-won, and I intend to defend it with the urgency our founders expected of us. Benjamin Franklin knew it would take work to protect this democracy, and that would-be monarchs would threaten it. “A republic, if you can keep it.”

**That’s why, in Congress, I have voted against bills that would restrict voting rights and hurt families in the 8th District. It is why I’ve vociferously challenged Cabinet nominees whose agendas run counter to the public interest. And I continue to hold community town halls in every part of this 10,000 square mile district because people are worried and deserve to share their concerns and hear directly from me. We have had record attendance.**

I promise to keep doing what’s right for our district and for our country. I will keep fighting to safeguard our elections, our economy, and the checks and balances that protect every American’s freedom. And I will always stand up to anyone who puts our democracy in jeopardy.

But democracy is a team effort. If you believe, as I do, that the stakes could not be higher, I hope you’ll stand with me today, Peter.

Thank you,

Kim

name: Team Bennet
subject: Holding the stable genius accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250519_stablegenius_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250519_stablegenius_act]
Hi folks,
President Trump has been leveraging his office's power and influence to pocket millions.
Last month, he auctioned off a private dinner to the top buyers of his memecoin, $TRUMP. This week, the winners will dine with the president at his golf club, and the top 25 buyers will get a tour of the White House .
Folks, we cannot normalize nor tolerate this level of blatant abuse of power and corruption.
That’s why Michael just introduced new legislation—the STABLE GENIUS Act—that would ban politicians from issuing or endorsing digital assets like cryptocurrencies and memecoins.
The STABLE GENIUS Act would:
* Ban the President, Vice President, members of Congress, and federal candidates from issuing or endorsing cryptocurrencies.

* Require the President, Vice President, members of Congress, and federal candidates to place digital assets in blind trusts to ensure they cannot profit from their policymaking decisions.

* Establish civil and criminal penalties for violations.
Americans’ trust in our political and financial institutions is at an all-time low. We need to ensure that no federal candidate or official can profit from and abuse their position of power.
Michael is leading the charge on restoring trust in our elections and government. As your Senator and your next Governor, he will continue working to root out corruption in our politics and curb the influence of pay-to-play politics. You can join him in this fight by chipping in today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250519_stablegenius_act]

name: Team Griswold
subject: death threats and harassment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
Team —
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, Jena Griswold stood up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists—defending our democracy, protecting our elections, and fighting for the truth. But that leadership comes at a cost.
In a powerful new profile by Vanity Fair, Jena opens up about the death threats she received, the harassment she endured, and why she refuses to be intimidated. Read the article here. [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
When Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election, Jena took him on.
When election deniers and conspiracy theorists attacked Colorado’s election systems, Jena responded with legislation to keep voters and election workers safe.
And when the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Trump engaged in insurrection, Jena worked to uphold the Constitution, even in the face of threats to her life.
Now, Jena is running for Attorney General to continue the fight for justice and democracy in Colorado. She’s proven she won’t back down and is ready to do even more for our state. Read the Vanity Fair profile here. [https://www.vanityfair.com/news/story/jena-griswold-colorado-trump-death-threats]
Thanks for standing with her,
Team Griswold
Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General because Colorado needs a strong, proven leader in this critical moment. She'll stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms. She’ll fight for working- and middle-class Coloradans, hold big corporations accountable, and safeguard our land, air, and water.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250519-email]

name: Eva, Fair Fight Action
subject: A coordinated scheme to keep ballot access as far out of reach as possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
The whole team is deeply grateful for your support as we fight for free and fair elections. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998262/546523112/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250519_f_CustomLanguage_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmE4NDRjYS0wYTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0iJcpBNsSxB_QNA9kQVTH8yoy4rbzDyHqCraOHgjx4=&emci=bdbaa0c3-0a35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3ba844ca-0a35-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi there, _I want to take a moment to thank you._ All of us here at Fair Fight Action are _**deeply**_ grateful for your support. I know, especially lately, you might be feeling overwhelmed by the news and constant flow of negative information. It just seems like we can’t catch a break from news on the multi-pronged attack on our democracy by anti-voter extremists. **Unfortunately, these forces never sleep.** That’s because, as we’ve seen time and again, they’re willing to stop at NOTHING if it means trying to strip away voting power. The fact of the matter is this: We’re seeing a nationally coordinated scheme to keep ballot access as far out of reach as possible, especially for Black and brown, young, disabled, unhoused, and rural voters. **That’s why Fair Fight Action is here to stay.** Supporters like you help expose voter suppression efforts, educate and empower people who have been historically shut out of the voting process, and push back against anti-voter legislation on the state and federal level. **Every donation, no matter how big or small, has made a difference to protect the freedom to vote. That’s why, as we start to approach our end-of-month fundraising deadline (time flies), I’m reaching out to personally ask you to consider making a contribution to Fair Fight Action today.** [**With our democracy at greater risk than at any point we’ve seen in our lifetimes, will you make your first donation to Fair Fight Action and help secure free and fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998266/546523116/-814816234?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250519_f_CustomLanguage_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmE4NDRjYS0wYTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0iJcpBNsSxB_QNA9kQVTH8yoy4rbzDyHqCraOHgjx4=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998267/546523117/-814816234?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250519_f_CustomLanguage_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmE4NDRjYS0wYTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0iJcpBNsSxB_QNA9kQVTH8yoy4rbzDyHqCraOHgjx4=)
---
Right now, we face threats like the SAVE Act, which sits before the Senate. As Democracy Docket puts it, it’s _“the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American History.”_ Even worse? Since 2024, at least 22 states have introduced their own similar versions of the SAVE Act, and with at least three states signing them into law, we can only expect more to come.
In order to remain prepared for the fights ahead — and trust me, _there are many_ — we are ramping up our fundraising in preparation for elections across the country so that we can make sure ALL voters can access the ballot box, freely and fairly. While our elected officials neglect to protect voting freedom, _Fair Fight Action is picking up the slack for them. _
[**You help make this work possible as an important member of the team. Please take your support to the next level with a first donation of $33 (that’s roughly last month’s average gift to emails like this one) or any amount today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998278/546523130/-975672924?amount=33&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250519_f_CustomLanguage_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmE4NDRjYS0wYTM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0iJcpBNsSxB_QNA9kQVTH8yoy4rbzDyHqCraOHgjx4=)

clean_body: The whole team is deeply grateful for your support as we fight for free and fair elections. | | | Hi there, I want to take a moment to thank you. All of us here at Fair Fight Action are deeply grateful for your support. I know, especially lately, you might be feeling overwhelmed by the news and constant flow of negative information. It just seems like we can’t catch a break from news on the multi-pronged attack on our democracy by anti-voter extremists. Unfortunately, these forces never sleep. That’s because, as we’ve seen time and again, they’re willing to stop at NOTHING if it means trying to strip away voting power. The fact of the matter is this: We’re seeing a nationally coordinated scheme to keep ballot access as far out of reach as possible, especially for Black and brown, young, disabled, unhoused, and rural voters. That’s why Fair Fight Action is here to stay. Supporters like you help expose voter suppression efforts, educate and empower people who have been historically shut out of the voting process, and push back against anti-voter legislation on the state and federal level. Every donation, no matter how big or small, has made a difference to protect the freedom to vote. That’s why, as we start to approach our end-of-month fundraising deadline (time flies), I’m reaching out to personally ask you to consider making a contribution to Fair Fight Action today. = | = Right now, we face threats like the SAVE Act, which sits before the Senate. As Democracy Docket puts it, it’s “the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American History.” Even worse? Since 2024, at least 22 states have introduced their own similar versions of the SAVE Act, and with at least three states signing them into law, we can only expect more to come. In order to remain prepared for the fights ahead — and trust me, there are many — we are ramping up our fundraising in preparation for elections across the country so that we can make sure ALL voters can access the ballot box, freely and fairly. While our elected officials neglect to protect voting freedom, Fair Fight Action is picking up the slack for them. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, Eva (she/her/ella) Director of Development Fair Fight Action = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Peter, I was recently on _MSNBC_ to discuss Donald Trump’s attempt to arrest Members of Congress for doing our jobs: providing oversight. While on air, I shed light on how Trump is pushing the absolute limits of presidential power to threaten co-equal branches of government. name: Hillary Scholten
subject: who gets the tax cuts?

body:
House Republicans unveiled their latest tax bill, and it’s no surprise that they want the biggest tax breaks to go to the wealthiest Americans.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998395/546523512/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDY2MzkxYS0wYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdPd_KmGi_W8YYJ1ONOsL49bGoBj8BMbYpqXNlBEqNk=)
---
| Who doesn't love a tax cut? I know I do.

But the real question is, who gets them?

House Republicans unveiled their latest tax bill, and it’s no surprise that they want the biggest tax breaks to go to the wealthiest Americans. Meanwhile, people who actually need relief – families, seniors, farmers, the middle class – are all left with scraps.

**On top of that, this bill also raises the debt ceiling, all to pay for handouts to billionaires and big corporations.**

Don’t believe me–let’s do the math:

❌ This bill lays out a **15% cut that overwhelmingly benefits the biggest corporations and the wealthiest 1%**.

❌ At the same time, they’re proposing **cuts to SNAP** , which helps families in our district and across the country put food on the table.

❌ And on top of it all, their plan includes changes that could result in **millions of people–yes, millions– losing their health insurance.**

That’s not fiscal responsibility. That’s robbing families to reward billionaires.

Let me be clear: I support significantly expanding tax cuts for the middle class and real relief for farmers and working families. That’s where my priorities are – and that’s the fight I’m taking to Congress every day.

[_**But I can’t do it alone. Defending this seat is critical if we want to flip Michigan blue and remain a check to the Trump administration’s reckless agenda. Can I count on your support to power this campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107998396/546523513/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-05-19_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDY2MzkxYS0wYzM1LWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdPd_KmGi_W8YYJ1ONOsL49bGoBj8BMbYpqXNlBEqNk=)

body:

Whether it’s talking about Social Security, housing, job creation, healthcare, the cost of living, education, delivering for the next generation, stopping DOGE, or more, I **always** want to know what you’re thinking about. _It’s the best way I can serve you and families across Oregon._
